subject: Peter, I’m tired too
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
I never imagined the state of our country and democracy would fall so far.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44276715/340895379/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGIxOWVhYi03M2JmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PPmslW8YvH1lJ4ubKhO4634cW5ZUvUz-5AcN4vVAAKM=)

Peter – I understand that Democrats are tired. We’ve been fighting for democracy and our progressive principles for so long.

We endured President Trump’s long campaign of lies and racism, a painful Election Day, 4 years of his presidency, and even a violent insurrection attempt on our Capitol.

When I first won this seat for Congress in 2012, I never imagined the state of our country and democracy would fall so far.

But my whole life I have been committed to public service and progressive policy – from working as a teacher to being elected to a school board and now as a Congressman.

_And I’m not going to stop now._

**What about you, Peter?**

[**If you’re with me in the fight for our nation during this crucial midterm year, will you consider chipping in just $3 to help me fight for progress? I’m depending on grassroots donors like you to help me reach my $5,000 fundraising goal so that I can talk to more voters about our progressive values. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44276716/340895380/653852622?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220418_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGIxOWVhYi03M2JmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PPmslW8YvH1lJ4ubKhO4634cW5ZUvUz-5AcN4vVAAKM=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44276723/340895387/653852622?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20220418_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGIxOWVhYi03M2JmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PPmslW8YvH1lJ4ubKhO4634cW5ZUvUz-5AcN4vVAAKM=)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Hollywoke Punches Florida
body:
[****](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f3c17418bcdd4215a313651dcf6ee176&_e=vgb0Zt7fAfDTJzmBej4jlquZki-qim94h6sDMEeqaCEPI1uNsUIftxvFnBwckbywoaWkuUo37YLIhrXLqSS7tWW_YJUmTjYPo46neIDmLKpusJgKSj22dLJ5Y0erys4rczQYVrrm5LGcOGMhlRpAw4gVkNM3UqtUMbblV9m5f3B_EiYJA8wJ26iyTWrIIAdfnFIuGaojUgOrwnkqVPuuU8I7HDL4FvW6NQDUiymUQM-ZApybD_wbNwgWyYCTq0YW7a5XK7p_i3vmA6JD2ISfT-4UqwvxKpxSWzYKtL0syNQp7Y5TKykZWze9rpBYlppAE-xyKEOHXXO9gQVweMvpk_OjZJcISKzdYN3MaX2-_A500qX-hxfFdJlRkJ0whIeb9Ik78PpEIROLFF2Q5n-dSQ%3D%3D)

Peter,
Florida was again the Left's favorite punching bag as out-of-touch Hollywood elites continued their smears against me.
But I can tell you this, if Hollywood is attacking you, you must be doing something right.
I wish I could say I was surprised to see spoiled Hollywood hypocrites lecture parents about what is best for their children, but sadly their willingness to lie, distort and distract is par for the course. _**Their dishonesty knows no bounds. **_
_**If the same Hollywood elites who upheld degenerates like Harvey Weinstein now oppose our efforts to protect parental rights, I wear that like a badge of honor. **_
Rest assured - I'm not worried about what out-of-touch "entertainers" have to say, and I'm certainly not going to be intimidated by people who don't live in reality. **And the chances of me backing down to Disney-owned ABC or the low-rated Oscars is precisely zero. No amount of sloganeering from the liberal machine will change that.**
Despite these baseless charges from Hollywoke and the legacy media, I was proud to sign the Parental Rights in Education Bill to ensure that children K - 3 are not taught R-rated content in their G-rated years.
Peter, I will always stand up for parents and families and for what's right. **I 'm not backing down.**

clean_body: Peter, Florida was again the Left's favorite punching bag as out-of-touch Hollywood elites continued their smears against me. But I can tell you this, if Hollywood is attacking you, you must be doing something right. I wish I could say I was surprised to see spoiled Hollywood hypocrites lecture parents about what is best for their children, but sadly their willingness to lie, distort and distract is par for the course. Their dishonesty knows no bounds. If the same Hollywood elites who upheld degenerates like Harvey Weinstein now oppose our efforts to protect parental rights, I wear that like a badge of honor. Rest assured - I'm not worried about what out-of-touch "entertainers" have to say, and I'm certainly not going to be intimidated by people who don't live in reality. And the chances of me backing down to Disney-owned ABC or the low-rated Oscars is precisely zero. No amount of sloganeering from the liberal machine will change that. Despite these baseless charges from Hollywoke and the legacy media, I was proud to sign the Parental Rights in Education Bill to ensure that children K - 3 are not taught R-rated content in their G-rated years. Peter, I will always stand up for parents and families and for what's right. I 'm not backing down. Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. body:
Here are four quick things you need to know:
1. Ron Johnson called the Senate GOP agenda that could raise taxes on 32% of Wisconsinites “a positive thing.”
2. He complained about _only doubling_ his wealth as a U.S. Senator.
3. He rigged the tax code in a way that benefitted himself and his biggest political donors — and admitted it!
4. He flaunts his corruption because he thinks he can get away with it.

We are going to prove him wrong this November by replacing Ron Johnson with Sarah Godlewski — someone who actually gives a damn about working families and is willing to get out there and fight for them.

**[Please consider making a contribution of $4 (or more!) to Sarah’s grassroots campaign for the U.S. Senate to help her flip this seat blue in November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44277636/340923371/-1761982453?refcode=em22_220418_taxday_fnd_gq_act___s4w_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220418_taxday_fnd_gq_act___s4w_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGUzMTQyZi04NGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YVaeDNZ3PZ76ra5AYVJwU9BqWNACNeyI8X9zxL9P5P8=)**

We must stand with Liz Cheney!

---
**BREAKING: Republican National Committee votes to CENSURE Rep. Liz Cheney for her involvement with the January 6th investigation**

**We 're disgusted by the RNC** \- so we're gathering 25,000 good Democrats to sign our open letter thanking Cheney for her work on the committee!

_Unless we hit our 25,000 signature goal, Cheney could be SILENCED by the GOP ..._

[We can't let Republicans bully her! She needs to know that Americans do appreciate her bravery. SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9812?t=7&akid=1859%2E878179%2EUhGeuF) | [Donate $2 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9812?t=8&akid=1859%2E878179%2EUhGeuF)
---
TO: LIZ CHENEY
FROM: A Proud Democrat
Subject: THANK YOU!

_Dear Congresswoman Liz Cheney,_

**While we don 't always agree with you, we truly appreciate your patriotic commitment to putting the country ahead of your party.**

It has been so refreshing to see a Republican who _REFUSES_ to bow down to Donald Trump and the far-right MAGA caucus.

**We 've seen Republicans attack you daily, strip you of your leadership position, and even threaten to throw you in jail! But you've been steadfast in your mission to follow the facts and protect our democracy - _we 're SO grateful!_**

**But I know that despite your noble actions, Republicans will continue to bully you into sabotaging the investigation and saving Donald Trump ...**

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of Americans across the country that stand with you! That 's why I'm signing this letter and chipping in $2 to Voter Protection Project to help elect more politicians who will stand with you in Congress and fight to protect our democracy.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9812?t=9&akid=1859%2E878179%2EUhGeuF) **_x. A GRATEFUL AMERICAN_** | [Donate $2 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9812?t=10&akid=1859%2E878179%2EUhGeuF)

name: James Tarantin
subject: Passover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
Peter, we have to protect our traditional values.
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a4ed6a956458423cb70a412db5b56c8f&_e=r5IQprYbY1l45pyLfh4wp4bG_B_ca8KKLKH9Y-QIdTFLapGGAf9xQf1UJMenFTpkH4O9itqrvwvoTCb1cZ4aAedtbqA69uULal5i_9Z-eJErJrwQrExwINdAE4qnEzV5YQLZB-TRXF2u2NtRcMqO6gtioqsCM5FsT4KwofPRT3e4VlPKnNIsiydI8P3AmeI7sIDST9naa-_eDmBigsTlTcBX351TpUWe1Psm0qrB5dLaEVX82CipueWsJY8HKaRy_fvJHOCs3BWqSxvGXhQTNp492yeROLwzs9rWFhVP3W4Tc37sFinGt16BR9GFnWNliCG-DShX2e3we97aCZDCC-DqoqLpS4imFH18DpUB-XaQHrR46bCk9MelvPHxI8GLdk1lti4MN-QvcBb2YnoxlP8PFulpn5-GpR2RRxSTt5Wf9LmfXPCC8CR8i-XaeDUlEmdLh1UXu65iH01XQWT899MVwaQ7cdmIQhOiPeoFmcU%3D)

Peter,

It’s Passover, the celebration of the Israelites exodus from Slavery. **_To me and many others, this holiday demonstrates the divine miracle that shows God comes before the government._**

Yet, not a single radical liberal would ever admit that. To them, these are political talking points for social media, while they quietly push anti-Israel policies and extend their hands to terrorists.

**I don’t say that lightly either. Look what happened with the Taliban in Afghanistan and the extremists in Iran. Now the Biden administration wants to have open discussions with these groups which are full of international terrorists?**

They persecute Christians, Jews, women, and anyone else they decide is beneath them while chanting “Death to America.” These are the people Joe Biden wants to have a diplomatic relationship with.

Now, while the radical liberals and Joe Biden want to befriend terrorists, we need to remember what this time of year represents. [**It’s about celebrating and protecting our traditional values, especially the Judeo-Christian values that founded our United States**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a4ed6a956458423cb70a412db5b56c8f&_e=r5IQprYbY1l45pyLfh4wp4bG_B_ca8KKLKH9Y-QIdTFLapGGAf9xQf1UJMenFTpkH4O9itqrvwvoTCb1cZ4aAedtbqA69uULal5i_9Z-eJErJrwQrExwINdAE4qnEzV5YQLZB-TRXF2u2NtRcMqO6gtioqsCM5FsT4KwofPRT3e4VlPKnNIsiydI8P3AmeI7sIDST9naa-_eDmBigsTlTcBX351TpUWe1Psm0qrB5dLaEVX82CipueWsJY8HKaRy_fvJHOCs3BWqSxvGXhQTNrREcwRBek3Hf3YFueltcI-ZSJc7OJ0HuJHyypKOs3CJkXOv_hpP8zdGWCbWSNXquUnLD-iw8JEivo2iN-qXWVc1c8IY-X9ZJtzyb4aYDBNquuJH90lNBpQsCg_Rbk5WhYz0nXKX3pa4zPk2DPwbpvxovOE8HUmwaRWiwIPEzzEp1qKD7UEZST6piRq2g3QdzodgTsTlsC1K6n4yPc5ThL4%3D)

[**STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN TO PROTECT OUR JUDEO-CHRISITAN VALUES**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a4ed6a956458423cb70a412db5b56c8f&_e=r5IQprYbY1l45pyLfh4wp4bG_B_ca8KKLKH9Y-QIdTFLapGGAf9xQf1UJMenFTpkH4O9itqrvwvoTCb1cZ4aAedtbqA69uULal5i_9Z-eJErJrwQrExwINdAE4qnEzV5YQLZB-TRXF2u2NtRcMqO6gtioqsCM5FsT4KwofPRT3e4VlPKnNIsiydI8P3AmeI7sIDST9naa-_eDmBigsTlTcBX351TpUWe1Psm0qrB5dLaEVX82CipueWsJY8HKaRy_fvJHOCs3BWqSxvGXhQTNoOejj3re8ZGTJq3p3h7Qu-3pzf4QHy31RpQ8NlFkXQzPdJHwkJsYffWhKezbi9ealvdjnxEmfc0Tz24Qj3V8gVmHCT8xVYR9nIIe85RrIxwFjwTzbr2rxWwmi-ruWGYb5FYPg84QJwujwfi6sx9RbP9KdnKmrhU-0rFurBUuCT2j0NB71Pi2qsN0-i04YyKPOTwMGZ-kS42waIrxWMBEDI%3D)
We need to start making history and standing for the values that made this nation so great to begin with. **Take me for example, I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate, and I’m running because much like these Holy Days of passover, America is seen as a miracle to the world.**

**We cannot allow our miracle to be extinguished because of radical anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and The Squad who only want to see us grow weaker by the day.** [**We must stand up for the values that made this nation great, are you with me?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a4ed6a956458423cb70a412db5b56c8f&_e=r5IQprYbY1l45pyLfh4wp4bG_B_ca8KKLKH9Y-QIdTFLapGGAf9xQf1UJMenFTpkH4O9itqrvwvoTCb1cZ4aAedtbqA69uULal5i_9Z-eJErJrwQrExwINdAE4qnEzV5YQLZB-TRXF2u2NtRcMqO6gtioqsCM5FsT4KwofPRT3e4VlPKnNIsiydI8P3AmeI7sIDST9naa-_eDmBigsTlTcBX351TpUWe1Psm0qrB5dLaEVX82CipueWsJY8HKaRy_fvJHOCs3BWqSxvGXhQTNtZVqEhqPTzvly5TzGvD11hI15fju7Vir-L3Y9HzZ8BEMhsv7d4wvSj41JIoMYHcNV8Du0jAxJ7_auThyhXnLiscZkTTV_FbrNT-jROvR1dNTmaL-Une1nfdpfAlFuIwurZ68o4tDCgHJ9hfQfPCYvsiro8LKhRfBOgvMbIZ7tDRmK7kxDijDctVQL7V662HsHCjlgpE9RNR3RrN6qBtVaI%3D)

[**STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN TO PROTECT OUR JUDEO-CHRISITAN VALUES**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a4ed6a956458423cb70a412db5b56c8f&_e=r5IQprYbY1l45pyLfh4wp4bG_B_ca8KKLKH9Y-QIdTFLapGGAf9xQf1UJMenFTpkH4O9itqrvwvoTCb1cZ4aAedtbqA69uULal5i_9Z-eJErJrwQrExwINdAE4qnEzV5YQLZB-TRXF2u2NtRcMqO6gtioqsCM5FsT4KwofPRT3e4VlPKnNIsiydI8P3AmeI7sIDST9naa-_eDmBigsTlTcBX351TpUWe1Psm0qrB5dLaEVX82CipueWsJY8HKaRy_fvJHOCs3BWqSxvGXhQTNo1Z0smmGepD7Og8VuBXOQThE82EnF7VIwloMNNs2ACi006SW_N07RXSxuPw6RK192VMpNSOfEuqGhG6YWsiqobsQD2QHcHlsS96PlOjrlamVJJo-l8NUN18HNhAIV0BW3IsOp9qnH7eceqxp2p14lVPCbfqDXIwLcC7ZpBVF8bt-dLxXy-Ey_feidH5xBuXnr_T4VYORLCrTenREU94trw%3D)
**If you’re anything like me then I know you’re Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and you agree that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values.** We need to get our country back to that way of thinking and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate.

America is a miracle to this world, and I need your help so we can restore and protect our traditional values. clean_body: Peter, we have to protect our traditional values. Peter, It’s Passover, the celebration of the Israelites exodus from Slavery. To me and many others, this holiday demonstrates the divine miracle that shows God comes before the government. Yet, not a single radical liberal would ever admit that. To them, these are political talking points for social media, while they quietly push anti-Israel policies and extend their hands to terrorists. I don’t say that lightly either. Look what happened with the Taliban in Afghanistan and the extremists in Iran. Now the Biden administration wants to have open discussions with these groups which are full of international terrorists? They persecute Christians, Jews, women, and anyone else they decide is beneath them while chanting “Death to America.” These are the people Joe Biden wants to have a diplomatic relationship with. Now, while the radical liberals and Joe Biden want to befriend terrorists, we need to remember what this time of year represents. We need to start making history and standing for the values that made this nation so great to begin with. Take me for example, I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate, and I’m running because much like these Holy Days of passover, America is seen as a miracle to the world. We cannot allow our miracle to be extinguished because of radical anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and The Squad who only want to see us grow weaker by the day. If you’re anything like me then I know you’re Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and you agree that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values. We need to get our country back to that way of thinking and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate. America is a miracle to this world, and I need your help so we can restore and protect our traditional values. | | | Patriot,

This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times, Washington Post, and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me.
And that is why I decided to run for re-election.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Patriot. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. The Democrats even placed a $2M ad buy just moments after I announced my campaign for re-election.

And that's why I need your help.

_**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60170595:Jc_BdVoAN:m:1:3299561967:C91D21959915295A341C49577A06C0D7:r "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even
$35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest
tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.")**_

Ron Johnson

clean_body: | | | | Peter, This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube. I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times, Washington Post, and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say. I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech. Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me. And that is why I decided to run for re-election. I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Peter. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me. Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. The Democrats even placed a $2M ad buy just moments after I announced my campaign for re-election. And that's why I need your help. "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now." Ron Johnson | | | "Fight for Freedom" | | | | "RonJon Announcement" | Peter, It's Ron Johnson. I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate. I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster. body:
|
| | | Peter,

I know there is a lot going on, but I wanted to connect with you and get your input.

We hand-selected 50 top patriots to take our Official 2022 Trump Priorities Survey, and you are one of them.

---
| | | [Take Our Trump Priorities Survey](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60172278:6HLZDVoNi:m:1:3317145305:60A051C0B8930AD0A889B10E447F1D51:r "Take Our Trump Priorities Survey")
---
I don't want to take up too much of your time, but as a top Conservative, your input is desperately needed.

There are just a handful of patriots that have been chosen to participate, so it's crucial that we get your feedback as soon as you're able to respond.

Your insight will help us prepare a successful strategy so we can continue working to get one step closer to restoring our Trump majority.

**[Can I count on you to take 2 minutes of your time to give top Conservative leaders your input?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60172278:6HLZDVoNi:m:1:3317145305:60A051C0B8930AD0A889B10E447F1D51:r "Can I count on you to take 2 minutes of your time to give top Conservative leaders your input?")**

Thanks,

Sherry, Survey Coordinator (via ROL)

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Build The Wall!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz
body:
Dear Peter:

The disaster at our southern border is reaching the point of no return.

**Our nation is facing an actual invasion.**

The Enemy is at the Gates -- and our nation doesn't have a wall to keep anyone out.

That is going to change!

**If Joe Biden can't -- or won't -- do anything,_then I will_.**

That's why I am launching this national petition drive to BUILD THE WALL. And I hope you will join me today!

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59991165:W5EG95HxN:m:1:2365227053:8A9D40B5F7D3FFCE647889E06599359C:r) [_**Help Matt Gaetz Build The Wall
Click Here to Sign Your Petition **_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59991165:W5EG95HxN:m:1:2365227053:8A9D40B5F7D3FFCE647889E06599359C:r) Because if things weren't already bad enough at the border, **now Joe Biden has ended Title 42** ; a commonsense policy put in place under Donald Trump.

President Trump put this America First policy in place simply to help protect all Americans from the millions of illegals streaming across our border without any safeguards against disease -- like COVID.

**To end this policy now is nothing short of _an outright attack on American lives_.**

And one thing is clear -- Joe Biden has no plans to deal with the millions of illegal immigrants who will now flood across our borders.

**_It's not just me saying it._**

Leading experts in BOTH parties have said the Biden administration failed to prepare for the massive invasion of illegal aliens at the border.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59991165:W5EG95HxN:m:1:2365227053:8A9D40B5F7D3FFCE647889E06599359C:r) [_**Help Matt Gaetz Protect Our Borders
Click Here to Sign Your Petition **_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59991165:W5EG95HxN:m:1:2365227053:8A9D40B5F7D3FFCE647889E06599359C:r) The stakes are too high to let Joe Biden and his radical open border policies continue unchecked.

As it is, hundreds of thousands of illegals stream across the border every day, bringing violent crime, disease, illegal and deadly drugs, and even terrorism.

That's why it's time to finish what Donald Trump started.

**[It's time to BUILD THE WALL](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59991165:W5EG95HxN:m:1:2365227053:8A9D40B5F7D3FFCE647889E06599359C:r)!**

**_Before it's too late._**

Please join me today by **[signing your petition to Build the Wall](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59991165:W5EG95HxN:m:1:2365227053:8A9D40B5F7D3FFCE647889E06599359C:r)** and then **[chipping in $17.76 so I can contact even more Americans](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59991165:W5EG95HxN:m:1:2365227053:8A9D40B5F7D3FFCE647889E06599359C:r)**.

**Because I simply can't do this alone.**

The country I love is more important than threats and intimidation from the inside-the-beltway swamp dwellers.

**But to do it, I need your help.**

I'm not going to let Joe Biden get away with his unconstitutional actions that have put our nation at risk.

I will do everything in my power to fight back against the invasion at our southern border. I am going to do everything in my power to build the wall.

Will you please **[sign your petition today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59991165:W5EG95HxN:m:1:2365227053:8A9D40B5F7D3FFCE647889E06599359C:r)** , and then **[chip in a contribution of $17.76, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even the legal maximum of $2,900 per individual TODAY to help me](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59991165:W5EG95HxN:m:1:2365227053:8A9D40B5F7D3FFCE647889E06599359C:r)**?

**I must have your support right away to keep speaking the truth and speaking up for our America First values.**

**[Please stand with me in this all-important fight today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59991165:W5EG95HxN:m:1:2365227053:8A9D40B5F7D3FFCE647889E06599359C:r).** **[Chip in your most generous contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59991165:W5EG95HxN:m:1:2365227053:8A9D40B5F7D3FFCE647889E06599359C:r)!**

Thanks for Standing Strong,

Matt Gaetz
Congresman (R-FL)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59991165:W5EG95HxN:m:1:2365227053:8A9D40B5F7D3FFCE647889E06599359C:r)

---

name: (1) Missed Message
subject: Fwd: Message from Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
---
| | | Friend,

Gov. DeSantis reached out to top state Patriots - you were of them.

Did you get his message?

\--------Forwarded Message---------
Subject: This isn’t a fair fight
From: Gov. Ron DeSantis
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29701%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fH9WQsOgo4py0vy%2bG5WIuw&sysid=1 "dpwillis67@gmail.com")**

---
I cannot stress this enough - electing strong GOP leaders is crucial to defending our states from the Left’s liberal takeover. Look at what’s happening in blue states - businesses are shuttering, rights are being revoked, and Americans are fleeing to states like freedom-loving Florida.

**[I’m asking every single supporter who wants to maintain their freedoms- in _ANY_ state - to chip in just $14 in the next 24 HOURS.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29702%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eMPxqKVC6lynpCZFY6Bekw&sysid=1 "I’m asking every single
supporter who wants to maintain their freedoms – in ANY state – to
chip in just $14 in the next 24 HOURS.")**
---
| | | [>> RESTORE GOP STATE MAJORITIES <<](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29703%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gJXQparVVf%2fhiMSYvfCVvg&sysid=1 "Restore State GOP Majorities")
---
I won’t lie to you, it’s not going to be easy.

We’re fighting against the entire liberal machine - the White House, the biased corporate media, and big tech tyrants are all coming after us, Friend.

This isn’t a fair fight - they’ve got more power, more money, and a liberal army of activists ready to revoke our rights. State GOP are the last line of defense against the Left’s tyrannical agenda, and we’ve never waivered. **[Republican state leaders like me are leading the charge to defend our rights, but we can’t do it without your help. All I’m asking for is just $14 to restore GOP leadership in our great country.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29704%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZvdgYNajpZL2GL4Kzc16gw&sysid=1 "Republican state leaders
like me are leading the charge to defend our rights, but we can’t do it without
your help. All I’m asking for is just $14 to restore GOP leadership in our great
country.")**

If you can, please chip in today to fuel our fight before the Left’s policies destroy any more states.
---
| | | [>> RUSH $14 NOW <<](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29715%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=obJxYxp6NtmCV33WSm%2f64A&sysid=1 "Restore State GOP Majorities")
---
Thank you for stepping up,

Ron DeSantis
---
| |
* * *
**We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. State Republicans currently hold:** **62 of 99 state legislative chambers** **26 of 45 lieutenant governor seats** **27 of 50 secretary of state offices** **11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials** **Thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.**
---

Washington, DC 20004

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn’t just another alphabet soup political committee. We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. name: Tom Brejcha
subject: He deserved a Pulitzer, he got 9 felony charges
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmvp5hf0pf34656ipv75ef8mencgacafu8puqd4g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbom4o30slq7apbhetgm1db3c1im1o3h6li38sj76cp7dddje2or2pdheepm1or76v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666rj6phnm9p6cdb4mmp6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clg6cor2c5im2oh5u)
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zftt72ci45d1em1htghs94mj1lcpnpf721snjdog_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob5c5h2bs)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z37qudf085qg379fqos2ktfcst27bp732i2thugo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob5c5h2bs)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsqa092rvhch02ihm9v434a6eivr5qmej5pak790_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob5c5h2bs)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies. You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... ... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos. I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. name: Connor Boyack
subject: My Grandpa (a trucker) traveled nearly 8 million miles—this is what he learned.
body:
Have I ever told you about my Grandpa Boyack? He was a lifelong trucker and traveled nearly 8 million miles across our great co
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zogu75005m4t1i86d4i2jff1b800hh80tdnpic8o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbobedb46phb8dtlmap6cplim1rmcc9lethnbdlhmpir9d37m4r74dlmekq7aphgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666rj6phnm9p6cdb2mdgmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933clg6cor2c5j64oh5u)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkdssni8ba8s288q0i19ivtrkgttuu958u4sl43o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob6c9h2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Hello Friend,

Have I ever told you about my Grandpa Boyack?

He was a lifelong trucker and traveled nearly 8 million miles across our great country.

Seeing all these truckers rally together for their--and our--freedom reminds me of all the stories he told me.

My name is Connor Boyack, and I am the author of _The Tuttle Twins_ series.

My grandpa was passionate about the ideas of freedom, especially during my college years when he shared dozens of lectures, articles, and books with me so I could learn about liberty.

We'd go to events together, and he'd share his thoughts with me and was a driving force behind my own intellectual journey.

**His influence is one reason that I wrote _The Tuttle Twins_ series. **

These books each teach the principles of a free society: free enterprise, competition, individual rights, the non-aggression principle, personal responsibility, entrepreneurship, and a variety of other issues--all boiled down to core concepts that children of different ages can easily grasp.

I've set a goal to ship 1,000 copies of The Tuttle Twins books to families, schools, and students across the country. But I need your help, Friend. It costs roughly $10 per book, so I need help raising $10,000 to keep sharing liberty.

[_**Will you be the reason a child can learn about liberty and a free society? Your generous donation of $10, $20, $50, or any amount will make that happen. Click here to donate >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z30hc0ud75t8ek537aa219dj5fc2kk66ar70oorg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob6c9h2bs)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrj6npccercu0cuq669k81ve01g5nm0i66uh4im0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob6c9h2bs)

The freedom my grandpa saw and appreciated isn't quite the same today.

Truckers, perhaps more than most of us, recognize how interconnected we are.

I believe we should listen a little closer to their warning cries and rally to fight back.

If my grandpa were alive, I'd like to think that he'd be joining a convoy and speaking out for the ideas he once spoke to me

Friend, this is our chance to stand together and fight for freedom.

**Think of the influences you had in your own life, the pillars of freedom, liberty, and education that helped guide you.

Will you be a pillar of liberty in a child's life and send a Tuttle Twins book?**

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z67462nhhoifroqnt9apjs1peo41it3nurvg3hko_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob6c9h2bs)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z06383fv8p6cskorjvm9lbgg07gb7ng3bkmfdr38_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob6c9h2bs)

For too long, parents have been at the mercy of curriculum where history is watered down, key principles omitted altogether, and time and attention given to things of lesser importance.

Freedom-loving parents have long been left alone to shoulder the burden of educating their children and passing down a love of liberty.

The Tuttle Twins series closes the gap, helping parents convey the principles of freedom to their kids in a fun way.

Will you help send one or more books to children across the nation? Click any link below to donate.

[_**Donate $10 and sponsor 1 book >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeue5agsnp2qfgj4do2n80l5hqad447n8lkb07ho_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob6c9h2bs)
[**_Donate $20 and sponsor 2 books >>>_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj6bmblh0738bfbf9nblv11e0u0a8s7jace5pfto_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob6c9h2bs)
[**_Donate $50 and sponsor 5 books >>>_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0f5akqmf88nbjdrq2loippd56h5ead6todgo2qg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob6c9h2bs)
[**_Donate $100 and sponsor 10 books >>>_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zraumvrq74hv3sub5baomrvm0vav4oo1cacdef98_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob6c9h2bs)
[**_Donate $500 and sponsor 50 books >>>_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z744pvpdch2h958sp7491bj870e2a5frpkopqfug_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob6c9h2bs)
[**_Donate $1,000 and sponsor 100 books >>>_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt9a13hpe51r5acrseg7mag0g86j1v1s3ai1k2rg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob6c9h2bs)
[**_Donate Any Amount >>>_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb1rt4u51kiv9ueg8kiiqv2ap27qj1c4q9dvpk88_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob6c9h2bs)

Thank you for passing the torch of liberty on to the next generation.

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
President, Libertas Institute

P.S.

I want to share a poem my grandpa wrote as he drove across the country.

**I See America**

I travel the highways
of this promised land.
Where liberty and freedom
will make its last stand.

I travel the plains and canyons
and push through impetuous snows.
I cross rivers and fight winds,
to see America, where it really shows.

The snow-covered mountains
on a moonlight night.
Gives pause to reflect
on this inspirational sight.

On a dark night in Wyoming
when the sky is crisp and clear.
The heavens are twinkling
and the Northern lights seem near.

I see the barren desert
as it blooms into spring.
I survey it as my own,
and dream, I'm its king.

There are beautiful valleys
carpeted with grass.
And fresh mountain meadows
up near the pass.

I travel the Midwest
and watch the corn grow.
I cross the "Rockies"
where the crystal waters flow.

Out on the Prairie
where the sun sets, so low.
I watch it grow larger
with its warm afterglow.

I have watched dams built
from the bottom to the top.
I have seen lakes backed up,
and streams without a drop.

I see the change of seasons
as they march across the lands.
Each, in all their splendor,
making strong demands.

I have seen tornados
rip across the land.
With thunder and lightning
ignoring puny man.

When I'm in a blizzard
I always think of home.
With my family and a fire,
a place where love is shown.

I see the troubles of the world
go rolling past my door.
The travels of the rich
and the movements of the poor.

Many friendly people
I have met along the way.
Sharing this land of "Freedom",
in the things we do and say.

I've learned to study and read,
And in the lonely hours to ponder.
The "Truth" I've found,
And in the Gospel, I'm much stronger.

I enjoy the warmth of my family,
So precious is our time.
Our time together, is focused,
Nothing for granted, it's laid on the line.

I love this land of "Freedom".
and all it represents.
To be able to move around,
and not have to climb a fence.
As you can see, my grandpa loved America, the principles of liberty, and living as a free man. His passion ignited a fire in me that motivated me to commit my life to fighting for liberty.

Will you help pass on the dream of liberty and freedom to America's rising generation?

[_**Click here to donate >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdi71ta9645rmuvkr2gv4mn9t6ua4ft5hhk5pb4g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob6c9h2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv5050cpr95tqsdm9e823s0tn3npk9or7o77usc0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm4ob6c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: BREAKING: Biden raises prices on retirees...

It didn't take long for Biden to sign a bill that could be America's death certificate.| | It didn't take long for Biden to sign a bill that could be **America's death certificate****...**
---
This bill has **raised prices on just about every single item retirees depend on** like...
* **Housing** (mortgage, rent, property taxes, insurance, maintenance, and repairs)
* **Transportation**(vehicles, gas, insurance, maintenance and repairs, car rental, leases, payments, and public transportation)
* **Food**(items purchased at the grocery store as well as dining out)
* **Utilities**(gas, electricity, water, phones, and access to the Internet)

Healthcare and medication aren't even on that list... yet. This could absolutely destroy your plans for retirement and leave you bankrupt with decades left to live... name: Jim Jordan
subject: POLL: Will you personally endorse me for reelection?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm bef
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9s3qsctdsdj99agpcagqfrkb35qqfl9id37gqjo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm6o36cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6db5mlhr2t1im1hneob4clgmcpj3cpq64d9gchjm3dr4mphr0slkmpjmbdjmc3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coorecr66up7cphkcapm6ptgmlin49fg)
It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3qbfkodo2a896u7hibe5s7fmg13stk2r22i3fg0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm6o36cdh2bs)
---

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv5lc3ggsbm357af4ceuhetqpc9suqpitpc6sc6o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm6o36cdh2bs)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztfti411ces79netfv093jh8dtd6obl6tr8h22qg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm6o36cdh2bs)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zb8v7h9sfd58ffjrb7asr456hod03fu62glc7f20_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm6o36cdh2bs)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and **[I hope you’ll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbk8u80gpebj8cgivsv485s1o7sangrrhoai1jg8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm6o36cdh2bs)**.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znllutdjd7gv9t3gt7a37n5h221ld8oo71un9oao_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm6o36cdh2bs)
We’ve got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they’re doing and it’s going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm – from the**American people**.

I hope if you’re still reading this email, you’ll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpmhu5h7lf61ik7tsur6db9ht7ljkhrg2ehp82eg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm6o36cdh2bs)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Humbly requesting your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I've decided to run for reelection in 2022. The Republican Primary is on May 3rd and we're asking for you to personally endorse
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6u4g1ksadns93mi5ksfq23q9dmr1safbqse4eg0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm9or4c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s9hm9rm3cr0eph72sbm66pb0o3nmhib6tr2cpqj8tr1m9qb2t3gmeo6coljedjjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33dpjcorr4sb6e4qb6p37m2qmash5u)
It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1r0to2ep673lfliv5vomeqpnfvmhvq4bd0nh1ag_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm9or4c3h2bs)
---

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbpa59i9hk5408rjja737jhoqa3kfh2hj6iik0io_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm9or4c3h2bs)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrtgakntvo6ud1ab04lah3294f90m7rlgbohojbg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm9or4c3h2bs)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5etatdrjjchf6omoejku04em3uo4h2jvm6717s8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm9or4c3h2bs)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and **[I hope you’ll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdt6lkjlaiv72981nqg0ome8a6pf76gvsrar5mug_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm9or4c3h2bs)**.

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcm7ll2bf1jmnoflnat3luk0j655vmtod1s447q8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm9or4c3h2bs)
We’ve got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they’re doing and it’s going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm – from the**American people**.

I hope if you’re still reading this email, you’ll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq3pnqacqet53ri26a37utegovcg23hg5fighv40_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cphm9or4c3h2bs)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

Hello,
When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful.
People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ **I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened.**
They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service.
**And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other.**
This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue.
**In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $15,000 before midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important: Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to my campaign – every dollar you can afford before our critical midnight deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44282124/340937521/-42398318?refcode=em20220419am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjNkOWJhMC1lMGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e9y7p04jGZx1xkmpwQevTUqEThK9NmGJAIiinF7AhCc=)

Friend, this latest poll is great news for our campaign — but it’s also a stark reminder that Ron DeSantis and his backers are about to become completely focused on attacking our grassroots movement.

Here's why:

**FIRST:** A new poll showed me leading Ron DeSantis in a general election.

**THEN:** Gov. DeSantis went to the CPAC conference, where he _doubled down_ on his efforts to court far-right billionaires and shore up his position as a top contender for the 2024 Republican nomination. Without Trump on the ballot, **_61% of attendees picked DeSantis as their top choice for president._**

**NOW:** With all the pieces falling into place for Governor DeSantis’ planned presidential run, the only thing standing in his way is our campaign. And since polling shows our campaign has what it takes to defeat him, you can bet that he’s going to go all-in on taking us down.

**THAT MEANS: It’s up to us to put an end to Ron DeSantis’ presidential ambitions by capitalizing on our momentum and building the movement to defeat him.**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: POLL: Will you personally endorse me for reelection?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I've come to the decision that as it pertains to the next chapter in my public service, the best move is no move at all. I'm run
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zobaofe85tp9eibjsrde4iqq1k1t8o8vn0rg3g68_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp32cb4m8pbcc3ncarrep3k6aqbdc35cso64o9iehqj1p9icmob0tb46dj76sr0sv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i61j30sllmorr5db66jgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clg6cpr6c9im4oh5u)
It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z23pg8f2a30kfos7m03vshamrkd4l5844naordeg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpjmcoj5c9h2bs)
---

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrlim1e1jgqcjs47g0qtkddje4hdphl0c2p46rpo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpjmcoj5c9h2bs)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjc1qdr037uq074080bsbslbq1kiar9iubn60mo0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpjmcoj5c9h2bs)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3m1v44q489k9fni78d1jd2u2akbmifibvl778p0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpjmcoj5c9h2bs)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and **[I hope you’ll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6vpuae38ao488nue59k91op9u5kvn6pdf4rc3u0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpjmcoj5c9h2bs)**.

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt6cghk4sht1utm4atsfhh4rb9spcrqdr8rn4390_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpjmcoj5c9h2bs)
We’ve got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they’re doing and it’s going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm – from the**American people**.

I hope if you’re still reading this email, you’ll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z30qhl0063jca4cq2lidonn3a06ukhauo9j1qiig_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpjmcoj5c9h2bs)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zv973q49jgb06f07ossu9a7qkij6ntbva8l0kndo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0h2alql4imbfhkqheke7mv1rqtjarr5afjk1llo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5c1j6epj2clh649fg)

Friends,

We recently released a powerful new ad – have you seen it yet?

This new spot highlights my lifetime of service, and why I’ve stepped up to run for Congress at this critical time in our nation’s history.

**I’m fighting the future we’ll leave our children and grandchildren. I’m FED UP with this insanity that’s taken hold in Washington, D.C., and I’m ready to serve as a voice for common sense and lead the charge to _stand up to the woke mob, support our police_ , _protect our elections_ , _stand up for parents’ rights_ , and _HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE_!**

Today, with just weeks until the primary, I’m asking for your help to get out my message.

## April 19, 2022
---
| |

# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success: promises kept.

---
| [The Plan](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MYQcw8gR9BQXFPnSidpy7liR7fI1HuHPDN3CT06u8J-kLI-_5P8cbDiHX5j-5rTQVLIlLGlx4vL9Yrr1NL-18J4rgFiJL03jLBYGcNFxEuibuypjpih5I21u_hVXaIsMbuY0dTNjhEjq7q2D0MMBxbgp4BBaBSKl&c=upEjsx4sCwFNISvYWXcWTXCTXHRT2EFpAb21gHcwB0faO1IEkz8Akw==&ch=TkVBSKl-v9__E2ffSwm128wBjZ2pEB2ClV2J2o-B7MBxH6cdixCRQA==)

name: Laurie Teper
subject: Tomorrow Night + ALL HANDS ON DECK + Door knocking + FREEDOM RAFFLE
body:
_Thank you to those who have signed up for working the polls and to those who have volunteered your time canvassing, working events, leading, making phone calls, etc! You are appreciated very much and valuable to the team!_

**
**
**ALL HANDS ON DECK!!!** Please sign up for one of the counties to stand outside the polling precincts on Election Day, May 17th, handing out Courtney's palm cards to voters! We have lots of open shifts available! Just email me your preference of county -
Alamance, Durham, Granville or Person and shift:

6:30am-9:30am, 9:30am -12:30pm, 12:30pm-4:00pm, or 4:00pm-7:30pm
After we fill these slots, we will fill Orange County. Early voting locations are also available for 3 hour shifts, morning, noon time, or evening. If you need a T-shirt, let me know your size.

**Don 't miss tomorrow night's Town Hall along with Courtney's opposing candidate, Robert Thomas at 7:00pm at the Durham GOP headquarters, 800 Magnum St**. **Show your support for Courtney! Limited seating so you need to RSVP here:**

**_<https://durham.nc.gop/2022_04_19_congressional_town_hall>[
](https://durham.nc.gop/2022_04_19_congressional_town_hall)_**
Please attend and bring some friends! **Wear your Courtney Geels T-shirt!**

**This Saturday, April 23 we are Door Knocking in ALAMANCE County from 8:45-11:30. Meet at****CHIK-FIL-A, 1477 University Dr in Burlington. Courtney will provide a tray of Chicken Minis!**
Sign up HERE: <https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0E4CADA629A3FACE9-canvassing>

**It****is important to sign up for planning purposes! And****while you are there,** scroll down to the other dates in Durham and Orange County, and please sign up ahead of time!

FREEDOM RAFFLE!!

Support our 2nd Amendment and enter to win a brand new Sig Sauer P365XL Spectre 9mm Luger valued at $1,199.99! Tickets are 1 for $20, 6 for $100. Get your tickets at _[www.courtneygeelsforcongress.com/raffle](http://www.courtneygeelsforcongress.com/raffle)_ See the attachment

Please spread the word for volunteers and send them my way!

Follow us on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/courtneygeels), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/courtneygeels/), and give us a like on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CourtneyGeelsForCongress) to keep up with Courtney.

Be sure to like and share!

__Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity Together!__

Laurie Teper
Volunteer Coordinator
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

They have... | Peter, America has a major grooming problem... It's no secret that the radical left has been using American classrooms as platforms to spread their communist propaganda. They have rewritten history, completely ignored "the science," and are now trying to sexualize children as young as five years old. Look, they can call us sexists, bigots, and transphobic , but we must ignore the noise and focus on protecting our children from these radical ideologies. I joined Jesse Kelly to discuss the corrupt left's agenda, and what we as Republicans should be doing to stop their efforts to radicalize our children. The woke mob is going to do whatever they can to indoctrinate our children... that's what communists do. They seek total control by instilling fear and hatred in the people they swear to protect. Unfortunately, the spineless RINOs are the ones REFUSING to take action. It took us over a year to pass the Save Women's Sports Act in the Oklahoma Senate... and that's just the tip of the iceberg. As the Proven Republican Fighter in this race, I will do everything in my power to protect our children from woke ideologies being taught in American classrooms. We need to guarantee a brighter future for our children, and we start by giving them a proper education. We must act now, Peter. The woke mob wants to normalize their radical ideologies surrounding gender and sexuality and indoctrinate our children using Government schools. Click an option below to protect our children from these disgusting groomers. How is it that the party of "trust the science" is refusing to trust the science? body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davebeckwithforcongress.com/dave-beckwith-for-congress-fighting-for-americas-future-9009943?e=70e89e3dc3)
---
| | [ ](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=1eb37fc6c5&e=70e89e3dc3)
---
| |
---
#
THE BECKWITH BRIEFING

#### News & Notes from the Campaign
---
| | **I’m the candidate to beat Jennifer Wexton this November and take Fearless Freedom back for our District.**
---
| Jennifer Wexton has been riding the coattails of career politicians like **Joe Biden** and **Nancy Pelosi** for too long, and it’s hurting individuals, families, and businesses across VA10. I’m here to give VA10 voters a **better choice** to represent **our voice** in Congress.
---
| |
---
* **Finances** : Wexton is on the Committee on Financial Services, but she was a substitute county judge, not a steward of taxpayer dollars – and it shows. I have 33 years of experience navigating **government financial systems** as an**Air Force program manager** and**Intelligence Community executive**. I know how to fight the bad fiscal policies killing our economy, combat bloated government spending, and cut through red tape holding back our businesses.

---
|
* **Space & STEM industries**: Wexton is on the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology, but she’s a lawyer, not a STEM leader. I’m **an engineer and a space and technology expert.** I know what it takes to drive real investment in these critical VA10 industries.
* **1st Amendment** : Wexton is on the Congressional LGBT Equality Caucus where she’s focused on controlling narratives and compelling speech. In Congress, I’ll be focused on **ending** the federal government’s obsession with identity politics and **censorship** ; instead, I’ll **fight** for your **1st Amendment rights** to worship, think, and speak freely in **all** spheres.

---
| I need your donations to help me spread the word about the Fight for Virginia’s Future! Your investment directly funds advertising and canvassing to get out the vote!

---
| [DONATE](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=860027d8d8&e=70e89e3dc3 "DONATE")
---
|
Remember: polling locations on the 21st are limited! See the info below and check out my [website ](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=1abee84443&e=70e89e3dc3)to make sure you don’t miss your chance to vote for me!
---
|
---
| | Voting Information
---
| **Don’t miss your chance to vote for Dave!**
* **The VA10 Firehouse Primary is May 21st!** Mark your calendars!
* Absentee voting is in person only on Thursday, May 12th from 4PM - 8PM at the Middleburg Barn – check out my [website ](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=61ace0de8a&e=70e89e3dc3)for the details on absentee voting.
* **Congressional Districts have changed!** You may now be in District 10! Check out my [website](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=1c219be7da&e=70e89e3dc3)[ ](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=72a73eabdc&e=70e89e3dc3)for an interactive district map, list of polling places, and registration info.
* **Find me on your ballot!** Candidates have been randomly placed on the ballot. Voters will rank the candidates in order of preference. **My name will be the 11th name listed – but I need your #1 vote!**

---
| | Events
---
| Join me on the campaign trail and bring a friend!
* **Tuesday, 19 April, 7PM** District 10 Congressional Candidate Forum, Middleburg Barn. Attend in person and vote for Dave in the straw poll! This is your chance to show VA10 that Dave is the candidate to beat Jennifer Wexton this fall!
* **20 April, 7PM** Republican Women of Clifton Forum, Clifton Town Hall
* **21 April, 6PM** Patrick Henry College Candidates Forum
* **24 April, 10AM** Bull Run Republican Women's Fashion Show, Stonewall Golf Club, Gainesville
* **27 April, 8AM** Virginia March for Life, Richmond
* **28 April, 2PM** Fauquier Chamber of Commerce Candidate Meet & Greet, Warrenton
* **29 April, 7:30AM** Northern Virginia Republican Business Forum Breakfast, Tyson’s Corner
* **29 - 30 April** Virginia GOP Advance, Hilton Washington Dulles Airport
* **30 April** Patriot Bonfire, Marshall
* **3 May, 7PM** Fauquier County Republican Committee Meeting, Laurel Ridge (Lord Fairfax) Community College
* **6 May, 5:30PM** Lincoln-Reagan Dinner hosted by Prince William Republican Committee, Mannassas
* **7 May, 11AM** City of Manassas Republican Committee Appreciation Brunch

clean_body: | | | | | | | THE BECKWITH BRIEFING News & Notes from the Campaign | | I’m the candidate to beat Jennifer Wexton this November and take Fearless Freedom back for our District. | Jennifer Wexton has been riding the coattails of career politicians like Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi for too long, and it’s hurting individuals, families, and businesses across VA10. I’m here to give VA10 voters a better choice to represent our voice in Congress. | | Finances : Wexton is on the Committee on Financial Services, but she was a substitute county judge, not a steward of taxpayer dollars – and it shows. I have 33 years of experience navigating government financial systems as anAir Force program manager andIntelligence Community executive. I know how to fight the bad fiscal policies killing our economy, combat bloated government spending, and cut through red tape holding back our businesses. | Space & STEM industries: Wexton is on the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology, but she’s a lawyer, not a STEM leader. I’m an engineer and a space and technology expert. I know what it takes to drive real investment in these critical VA10 industries. 1st Amendment : Wexton is on the Congressional LGBT Equality Caucus where she’s focused on controlling narratives and compelling speech. In Congress, I’ll be focused on ending the federal government’s obsession with identity politics and censorship ; instead, I’ll fight for your 1st Amendment rights to worship, think, and speak freely in all spheres. | I need your donations to help me spread the word about the Fight for Virginia’s Future! Your investment directly funds advertising and canvassing to get out the vote! | "DONATE" | Remember: polling locations on the 21st are limited! See the info below and check out my make sure you don’t miss your chance to vote for me! | | | Voting Information | Don’t miss your chance to vote for Dave! The VA10 Firehouse Primary is May 21st! Mark your calendars! Absentee voting is in person only on Thursday, May 12th from 4PM - 8PM at the Middleburg Barn – check out my the details on absentee voting. Congressional Districts have changed! You may now be in District 10! Check out my an interactive district map, list of polling places, and registration info. Find me on your ballot! Candidates have been randomly placed on the ballot. Voters will rank the candidates in order of preference. My name will be the 11th name listed – but I need your #1 vote! | | Events | Join me on the campaign trail and bring a friend! Tuesday, 19 April, 7PM District 10 Congressional Candidate Forum, Middleburg Barn. Attend in person and vote for Dave in the straw poll! This is your chance to show VA10 that Dave is the candidate to beat Jennifer Wexton this fall! 20 April, 7PM Republican Women of Clifton Forum, Clifton Town Hall 21 April, 6PM Patrick Henry College Candidates Forum 24 April, 10AM Bull Run Republican Women's Fashion Show, Stonewall Golf Club, Gainesville 27 April, 8AM Virginia March for Life, Richmond 28 April, 2PM Fauquier Chamber of Commerce Candidate Meet & Greet, Warrenton 29 April, 7:30AM Northern Virginia Republican Business Forum Breakfast, Tyson’s Corner 29 - 30 April Virginia GOP Advance, Hilton Washington Dulles Airport 30 April Patriot Bonfire, Marshall 3 May, 7PM Fauquier County Republican Committee Meeting, Laurel Ridge (Lord Fairfax) Community College 6 May, 5:30PM Lincoln-Reagan Dinner hosted by Prince William Republican Committee, Mannassas 7 May, 11AM City of Manassas Republican Committee Appreciation Brunch Interested in attending or hosting a Meet & Greet in a local home with Dave? name: SIGNATURE REQUESTED (via Team Scalise)
subject: First bus of illegal immigrants arrived at Joe's doorstep
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Do you stand with the 21 GOP Governors trying to eliminate the federal mask mandate?
**FIRST:** Biden canceled President Trump's border wall project...
**THEN:** Illegal migrant crossings from the Southern border went through the roof...
**AFTER:** Texas officials pleaded for help...
**AND:** Border agents were left defenseless...
**NOW:** Texas Governor Greg Abbott sent buses of illegal immigrants to Joe Biden's doorstep in Washington, DC.
We're doing everything we can to bring back Trump's border wall and reinstate his America First agenda. The only way we have any hope of restarting building the border wall is to get 1,500 signatures by tonight!
[**Can you be one of the signatures we desperately need?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60175082:6NbZBVomN:m:1:3317145305:0DEAE116A31D31B0D82AED876508FF8F:r)

Thank you,

name: Citizens for Turner
subject: How much more Joe Biden can your family afford?
body:
| | | | | |
---
Friends, I need your help. Gas prices continue to rise because President Biden crippled America’s energy independence. Joe Biden **canceled the Keystone XL pipeline** and other American energy projects. Joe Biden made the**United States dependent on foreign energy**.
---
| | | | | [Bring Back American Energy!](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=1012554&act=NE1B&c=493811&pid=12501752&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fturner%2Fsupport-mike-turner&cf=64880&v=a9bc398e9f07d9ae65eac8dfeb29126d428ae43df52345c5c3fbf5aec4fa5284)
---
| | | | Now you and your family are paying the price for his errors. Ohio’s average gallon of gas is **nearly $4.00.** Enough is enough. Join me in putting America back on track to energy independence and lower gas prices.
---
| | | | | [I LIKE MIKE!](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=1012554&act=NE1B&c=493811&pid=12501752&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fturner%2Fsupport-mike-turner&cf=64880&v=a9bc398e9f07d9ae65eac8dfeb29126d428ae43df52345c5c3fbf5aec4fa5284)
---
| | | | I hope I can count on your continued support. Thank you, Congressman Michael R. Turner
---

subject: I endorsed Sarah Palin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC
body:
I need you to show your support
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osB8PS5HpN)

Friend,

Did you hear?

Sarah Palin recently announced that she was running for Congress to represent the great state of Alaska. I immediately gave her my complete and total endorsement.

She was one of the most popular Governors because she stood up to corruption in both State Government and the Fake News Media. _They were out to destroy her, but she didn't let that happen._

I encourage all Republicans, especially my top supporters, like YOU, to unite behind this wonderful person and her campaign to put America First. I am calling on YOU to join me in publicly endorsing SARAH PALIN.

**[Please add your name IMMEDIATELY to CO-ENDORSE Sarah Palin as we work together to SAVE AMERICA.>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59996060:sB8PS5HpN:m:1:2532013465:C1CC4FB09A239391D6A52F95EBDDCAFE:r)**
