The Miami Times shows me closing the gap with Marco Rubio in this critical Senate race. We're gaining ground – but we're still in the margin of error, and Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says 2022 could be a red wave.
**I've overcome long odds before. **The daughter of a maid and a janitor, I became the first in my family to go to college. I became Orlando's first woman police chief – and I even prosecuted a corrupt president for his high crimes against our democracy.

**But there's no question that this Senate race is my toughest fight yet – and I need your help to go ALL IN and flip Florida blue. **
The GOP has already raised more than $143 MILLION to defeat Democrats like me, flip the Senate and erase all of the critical progress we're making. Rubio himself is breaking GOP fundraising records, raising more than $6 MILLION in just the last few months.

name: Nikki Fried
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

Every time Ron DeSantis sees something he doesn’t personally like, whether it’s a student wearing a mask or two mothers raising a child, he tries to ban it.

And now, Dictator Karen has decided that math textbooks are somehow offensive. So he’s banning those, too.

State officials just announced that they were cutting 41% of proposed math textbooks for “prohibited topics.” Because apparently, algebra, geometry, and trigonometry are too controversial for Florida students. 🙄

I don’t know about you, but banning math books for “prohibited topics” sounds pretty authoritarian to me.

It’s simple math, Peter. If our Governor cares more about enacting authoritarian book bans and provoking outrage over math class (of all things) than he does about helping Florida families make ends meet, then it’s time for us to replace him. If you agree, click here to chip in $10 and support my campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=419textbooks]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=419textbooks] Express Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=419textbooks] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=419textbooks] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=419textbooks] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=419textbooks] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=419textbooks]

That’s why I’m going around the state talking about actual problems Floridians are facing and spreading the word about my plan for lower costs and higher standards of living — something DeSantis has failed to do for his entire three years in office.

It’s time for us to elect leaders who will step up and address the problems Floridians actually care about instead of wasting time throwing tantrums about math textbooks. Help us do it by chipping in $10 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=419textbooks]

Thanks!
— Nikki

Miami, FL 33143

name: John King
subject: We need a teacher as governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
The data doesn't lie – when teachers run for elected office, they break barriers, challenge norms, and win.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44293351/340981840/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220419-b1_fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220419-b1_fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220419&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S2_C1&&&&amount=10&refcode2=b348d702-efbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQ4ZDcwMi1lZmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PdVpptlkgRRDaje6gzIJqvLPed7lG-22OBOZklCEzOY=)
---
| Peter, The data doesn't lie – when teachers run for elected office, they break barriers, challenge norms, and _win_. In 2018, 177 teachers ran for seats in state legislatures. Not only did a whopping 68% advance to the general election, but 43 of those teachers were elected to serve in their state capitol. Schools are the cornerstones of our communities and teachers are at the forefront of shaping our collective future. But creating lasting change takes a village, and there’s work that needs to be done on equitable economic development, housing, affordable health care, and more. **That’s why I’m running for governor: to ensure education is front and center in addressing these complex issues and to be the voice that stands up for all Maryland educators, students, and families in Annapolis.** I’ve taught history in countless classrooms, but now I need your support to help me make history by winning this election. _**[If you can, please pitch in $100, $10, or even just $1 to help me become Maryland’s first Black governor – and the first ever educator of color elected to statewide office.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44293352/340981841/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220419-b1_fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220419-b1_fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220419&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S2_C1&&&&amount=10&refcode2=b348d702-efbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQ4ZDcwMi1lZmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PdVpptlkgRRDaje6gzIJqvLPed7lG-22OBOZklCEzOY=)**_ | | | [$5 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44293353/340981842/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220419-b1_fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220419-b1_fr_full-JK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220419&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S2_C1&&&&amount=5&refcode2=b348d702-efbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQ4ZDcwMi1lZmJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PdVpptlkgRRDaje6gzIJqvLPed7lG-22OBOZklCEzOY=)

**Education can be the difference between life and death, and I know that because that’s what happened to me.** After both my parents passed away, I had a very hard time – like many kids who experience trauma at a young age. I got in a lot of trouble to the point where I was actually kicked out of high school, and it is because of the public school teachers and school counselors who gave me a second chance that I was able to get back on track.
In fact, the public school teachers and school counselors who were there for me when I needed them most are the very reason I chose to pursue a career in education myself. Had it not been for the truly lifesaving second chance they gave me, I would never have had the opportunity to go on to serve as the 10th U. S. Secretary of Education – one of the greatest honors of my life.
Now I’m running for governor to ensure the second chances and opportunities afforded to me are possible for every Marylander. **Because I know firsthand that teachers understand better than anyone how the right support from the right public institutions can play a major role in lifting up entire communities.**

clean_body: The data doesn't lie – when teachers run for elected office, they break barriers, challenge norms, and win. | = | Peter, The data doesn't lie – when teachers run for elected office, they break barriers, challenge norms, and win. In 2018, 177 teachers ran for seats in state legislatures. Not only did a whopping 68% advance to the general election, but 43 of those teachers were elected to serve in their state capitol. Schools are the cornerstones of our communities and teachers are at the forefront of shaping our collective future. But creating lasting change takes a village, and there’s work that needs to be done on equitable economic development, housing, affordable health care, and more. That’s why I’m running for governor: to ensure education is front and center in addressing these complex issues and to be the voice that stands up for all Maryland educators, students, and families in Annapolis. I’ve taught history in countless classrooms, but now I need your support to help me make history by winning this election. = | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Education can be the difference between life and death, and I know that because that’s what happened to me. | | ANTRIM CNTY, Mich. — "The 1st District deserves a Congressman who supports our Constitution, freedoms, and right to be heard," said Dr. Lorinser. "I will protect election results even when they don't go my way. "It's now clear my opponent had his hands all over the conspiracy to overturn the election lost by the previous administration. In December of 2020, Bergman's interference continued the threat to our democracy, and our Constitutional right to vote and be counted." A [**new bombshell investigative report by journalist Mardi Link of the Record Eagle**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44278738/340927272/-2137054058?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTcwMzUyOS1jZWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7bMFsv0qivVs5-COaOMcg7q74U1j72qfCpLaLsczfjY=&emci=bc1b65ab-c7bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=25703529-cebf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427) highlights the Representative’s "inappropriate" involvement in the conspiracy to overturn election results, according to Dr. Bob Lorinser. Through the Freedom of Information Act, Link discovered Bergman helped coordinate county officials and out-of-state political operatives who were granted access to examine Dominion voting machines in Antrim County. In November 2020, a human error in a Republican clerk's office resulted in an _unofficial_ report of Republicans and Democrats switching vote results in Antrim County. Officials quickly corrected the human error, but months later, conspiracy theorists used it as the catalyst for "election fraud" across the entire United States. In addition, it triggered forensic audits of Dominion voting machines. On Jan. 6, 2021, during the attack on the US Capitol, Jack Bergman voted against the certification of President Biden. Dr. Lorinser says the article highlighting Bergman's involvement shows an attempt to disavow Michigan's presidential voting in Antrim County. "My opponent’s actions are disturbing, shocking, and worthy of further investigation," said Dr. Lorinser. "His involvement threatens the principles upon which this nation was born."

Lorinser says just as disturbing is Bergman's staffer claiming the challenges in Antrim County were not political or partisan. "The voters of the 1st District demand accountability and an explanation directly from our Congressperson why he was involved at all," said Dr. Lorinser. "As indicated by sources in the investigative report, my opponent's behavior here is highly unusual, suspicious, and clearly partisan-motivated. This was not only shameful and dishonest; it was a real threat to the country." Lorinser says there was no evidence of fraud in the 2020 election, and Jack Bergman has since doubled down on his dishonesty. **"Doubling down on a lie is not strength. It's dishonorable." —Dr. Lorinser**** ** "It's time to end the conspiracy, dishonesty, tales of falsehoods, and outright lies," said Dr. Lorinser. "We must return to a 'government of the people, by the people, for the people.' We need honesty in Congress, and I look forward to the opportunity to bring dignity and integrity back to this office for Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula."

name: Kelly Burton, NDRC
subject: Welcome to the team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
The next decade of congressional and state legislative maps will be drawn in 2021.

|
---

[ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44296877/340988684/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmM2Y4MmM5LWYxYmYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JobRjc0iS_1Y228YlTkZcOXn1ZdVc0zY4FXJQFe-qwY=&emci=26410948-c6a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=9f3f82c9-f1bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8431045)

| | Welcome to the team, friend!

When the NDRC launched in 2017, we laid out a four-pronged strategy to finally bring an end to GOP gerrymandering all over the country:
1. **Winning targeted state-level elections** that can shift the balance of power in favor of fair maps
2. **Fighting against manipulation of states'** redistricting processes
3. **Mobilizing grassroots support** for fair maps
4. **Supporting efforts to reform redistricting**

We've made incredible progress with this strategy, helping to **elect 11 governors, flip six state legislative chambers** across our target states, and enact redistricting reform in five states. We decreased the number of seats drawn by Republicans and set the table for a fair process in big battleground states.

**But the next decade of congressional and state legislative maps are being drawn now** , which makes our work mobilizing grassroots support for state-level reform and protecting fair redistricting processes across the country more critical than ever.

This is why **we need you on board**. All of the progress we've made so far has been thanks to grassroots support from people like you, and our success will be determined in part by your support, too.

clean_body: The next decade of congressional and state legislative maps will be drawn in 2021. | | | Welcome to the team, friend! When the NDRC launched in 2017, we laid out a four-pronged strategy to finally bring an end to GOP gerrymandering all over the country: 1. Winning targeted state-level elections that can shift the balance of power in favor of fair maps 2. Fighting against manipulation of states' redistricting processes 3. Mobilizing grassroots support for fair maps 4. Supporting efforts to reform redistricting We've made incredible progress with this strategy, helping to elect 11 governors, flip six state legislative chambers across our target states, and enact redistricting reform in five states. We decreased the number of seats drawn by Republicans and set the table for a fair process in big battleground states. But the next decade of congressional and state legislative maps are being drawn now , which makes our work mobilizing grassroots support for state-level reform and protecting fair redistricting processes across the country more critical than ever. This is why we need you on board. All of the progress we've made so far has been thanks to grassroots support from people like you, and our success will be determined in part by your support, too. Follow us on social media to stay up to date with our work as we fight to finally bring an end to GOP gerrymandering: | Thank you, Kelly Burton President, NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. | The [10th Congressional District Republican Committee](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oD97jztBg529kTZ2G48_psNNuDwrRn-_NQ6dZVThNe2QpChGu6WgeWJXMphDjNw0C2qxHySanuVp2w6p3l_yO5edxMFbiGR_CXK5_z4kvpWQQnUDftNrZhkscg5dOtWtKEHB8sWe9r4=&c=lPjZe8mnr1nynSPdEbJwLTAAUhuk8ee35qDMAbvnA68I4Qou9a0D7Q==&ch=ZSK5GjYV4gOJ4tYpUwI-mjETQo184ZXcZY-ztlOKvVKH1dZ65hpCbg==), Chaired by Geary Higgins, will be holding a Candidate Forum this evening in Middleburg (23320 Foxchase Farm Lane, Middleburg 20117). I am excited for this opportunity to meet fellow Republicans from across the district and discuss the numerous critical topics facing the voters of the 10th.
As a Conservative, entrepreneur, small business owner (see below), farmer, founder of non-profits fighting the Communist Chinese influence on our college campuses and lifelong resident of Loudoun County. Like my Grandfather, [former Congressman Frank Wolf](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oD97jztBg529kTZ2G48_psNNuDwrRn-_NQ6dZVThNe2QpChGu6WgeYVLbY-84zWAklXChrOrwEH5rZt5sPH1qUrYQKAceUOgUyyTktWpiJeJdAh2-SAwOpQg-qe2ZoijNlqY6iA6kblKlbtXS_PTWoxWAs59D6J5mEsgYgNfeJciV6446M2Qr8SjrcwLJ8Ku&c=lPjZe8mnr1nynSPdEbJwLTAAUhuk8ee35qDMAbvnA68I4Qou9a0D7Q==&ch=ZSK5GjYV4gOJ4tYpUwI-mjETQo184ZXcZY-ztlOKvVKH1dZ65hpCbg==), service to my community is my top priority!!
I look forward to seeing you this evening at the Middleburg Barn. | SMALL BUSINESS: THE HEART OF THE 10TH PROUD TO BE A PART OF THIS COMMUNITY
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| From Sterling to Warrenton, from Leesburg to Manassas, small businesses and the entrepreneurs that create jobs and offer their products and services are the heart and soul of the 10th Congressional District.
I started my company, [Caleb's Country Services](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oD97jztBg529kTZ2G48_psNNuDwrRn-_NQ6dZVThNe2QpChGu6WgeQkdAa7MWmHm6_r_VtWJAbbWsPuBmLsSR05YiXWIKpVHDLNG_rz6Bc8zDdpzoSv9_zwyZYbPCKp5Eg07A0rGy3bLIuhSxBSXxA==&c=lPjZe8mnr1nynSPdEbJwLTAAUhuk8ee35qDMAbvnA68I4Qou9a0D7Q==&ch=ZSK5GjYV4gOJ4tYpUwI-mjETQo184ZXcZY-ztlOKvVKH1dZ65hpCbg==), as a teenager. First mowing neighbors lawns, then filling in as older friends went off to college and growing my business to become one of largest landscaping companies in the region. It took lots of long hours and lots of personal sacrifice with strong support from my family, friends, customers and neighbors. I was proud to be honored, and one of the youngest listed, in Loudoun Times's ["40 Under 40"](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oD97jztBg529kTZ2G48_psNNuDwrRn-_NQ6dZVThNe2QpChGu6WgeV63AWOVl7d0pzDNrxgqge9FVEE07MxjL84XRI37yAO_VX5mYvOUiAIpo0mgiQFWnZtTaGIWoJk2eHZsUdoaqb9zMpOW6dhThVHiUPQJbu49KEaAHm_E7WrohmrVwKDRMrUsHdsS2Afk2E710Oj1lBwKNnadaJYVId6eN048nwK0WhkyvEHRMKh4WUOx3Hgic0liIvQe-rYcGg3a568MCluM60PP8VS3sw==&c=lPjZe8mnr1nynSPdEbJwLTAAUhuk8ee35qDMAbvnA68I4Qou9a0D7Q==&ch=ZSK5GjYV4gOJ4tYpUwI-mjETQo184ZXcZY-ztlOKvVKH1dZ65hpCbg==). Small businesses are not as the progressive Democrats like Barak Obama and Jennifer Wexton think... "If you've got a business, you didn't build that."
I know first hand the trials and tribulations of government's heavy regulatory hand. Now as a cattle farmer (40 head in Round Hill) or previously, as I struggled to save [Pica Deli](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oD97jztBg529kTZ2G48_psNNuDwrRn-_NQ6dZVThNe2QpChGu6WgeQkdAa7MWmHmBz9etrhXz9nLEk_420LhsHirdaX1asgqYeMAxCenUxFdqnMHdgykUGIEZeHSIYibOfd6T_kCTMbinGRsAidy5g==&c=lPjZe8mnr1nynSPdEbJwLTAAUhuk8ee35qDMAbvnA68I4Qou9a0D7Q==&ch=ZSK5GjYV4gOJ4tYpUwI-mjETQo184ZXcZY-ztlOKvVKH1dZ65hpCbg==) as small businesses were crushed by the government's Covid policies, we need a new approach, fresh ideas with commonsense solutions to the country's problems.
I am honored to be a part of the small business community, a daily customer and I will be privileged to represent you in Washington.

SATURDAY, MAY 21 - 9 AM TO 4 PM
VOTE FOR CALEB MAX

The 10th CD Republican Committee has selected a party run process for selecting our Republican Congressional Candidate to challenge Nancy Pelosi's friend, Democrat Jennifer Wexton. The party canvass, often called a "firehouse or mini- primary" is an extremely simple process. Here is a link on my website about how to vote: [https://www.maxforvirginia.com/how-to-vote](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oD97jztBg529kTZ2G48_psNNuDwrRn-_NQ6dZVThNe2QpChGu6WgefqSJOV9ROrXXwBcHdRuMxd1l04Sv7CUJa4TKcnthVo1khz5VyWwHyHXQiRyCdbWgbUfhC6CByqOZImgyu96BM_DsqNCfZkwGUjlI6J8M1YxEJ9ll1Kz5zA=&c=lPjZe8mnr1nynSPdEbJwLTAAUhuk8ee35qDMAbvnA68I4Qou9a0D7Q==&ch=ZSK5GjYV4gOJ4tYpUwI-mjETQo184ZXcZY-ztlOKvVKH1dZ65hpCbg==)

* The ballot will have you rank your choices, mark CALEB MAX as your first choice (more on rank choice voting [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oD97jztBg529kTZ2G48_psNNuDwrRn-_NQ6dZVThNe2QpChGu6WgeRoTAHwL9DwawI-66ChxuwC6N53a2YyjL2bUUPNe-maiedm1Z_xWICVhdFNZqpxTNNGp3FLRmUshdf9kKcTy6J5fhac-tpwtbaXVT_yiUgLNe3eO_QoHfNM6g5-gjKMxgw==&c=lPjZe8mnr1nynSPdEbJwLTAAUhuk8ee35qDMAbvnA68I4Qou9a0D7Q==&ch=ZSK5GjYV4gOJ4tYpUwI-mjETQo184ZXcZY-ztlOKvVKH1dZ65hpCbg==)).

* Submit your ballot and you may leave...simple. Bring your friends and family and have them vote for Caleb Max!

* If you are unable to attend and have a good reason, you can in person absentee vote early at the following location:

IN-PERSON ABSENTEE VOTING
Thursday, May 12, 2022
4 p.m. to 8 p.m.
The Middleburg Barn
23320 Foxchase Farm Lane
Middleburg, VA 20117

* So Mark Your Calendar today for Saturday, May 21 to Vote for Caleb!!

My campaign will be focused on Country, Community and Common Sense. Country is ensuring that the United States remains an economic and military leader that stands as a beacon of hope for freedom seeking people around the world. Community is supporting the growth of the 10th District's dynamic economy and many small businesses and local organizations, which are the foundation of our society. And Common Sense is an understanding that we cannot continue with the fiscal irresponsibility of the past and must make the hardworking families of this district our main priority. Right now, working Americans suffer from the highest inflation rate in decades.

I look forward to standing up to the Biden Administration and Jennifer Wexton's failed policies which hurt every working family in the 10th Congressional District. As the Republican candidate, we will win in November, flip the House of Representatives from blue to red, and put government back to work for the hardworking families and business owners who call the 10th District home.

| Lifelong Loudoun County resident and business owner, Caleb was recently recognized by the [Loudoun Times 40 under 40](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oD97jztBg529kTZ2G48_psNNuDwrRn-_NQ6dZVThNe2QpChGu6WgeV63AWOVl7d0pzDNrxgqge9FVEE07MxjL84XRI37yAO_VX5mYvOUiAIpo0mgiQFWnZtTaGIWoJk2eHZsUdoaqb9zMpOW6dhThVHiUPQJbu49KEaAHm_E7WrohmrVwKDRMrUsHdsS2Afk2E710Oj1lBwKNnadaJYVId6eN048nwK0WhkyvEHRMKh4WUOx3Hgic0liIvQe-rYcGg3a568MCluM60PP8VS3sw==&c=lPjZe8mnr1nynSPdEbJwLTAAUhuk8ee35qDMAbvnA68I4Qou9a0D7Q==&ch=ZSK5GjYV4gOJ4tYpUwI-mjETQo184ZXcZY-ztlOKvVKH1dZ65hpCbg==) as a business and community leader. He founded one of Western Loudoun's largest landscaping companies and is the grandson of former US [Representative Frank Wolf](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oD97jztBg529kTZ2G48_psNNuDwrRn-_NQ6dZVThNe2QpChGu6WgeYVLbY-84zWAklXChrOrwEH5rZt5sPH1qUrYQKAceUOgUyyTktWpiJeJdAh2-SAwOpQg-qe2ZoijNlqY6iA6kblKlbtXS_PTWoxWAs59D6J5mEsgYgNfeJciV6446M2Qr8SjrcwLJ8Ku&c=lPjZe8mnr1nynSPdEbJwLTAAUhuk8ee35qDMAbvnA68I4Qou9a0D7Q==&ch=ZSK5GjYV4gOJ4tYpUwI-mjETQo184ZXcZY-ztlOKvVKH1dZ65hpCbg==) who served the 10th Congressional District for 34 years, having been first elected in 1980.
Caleb continued his entrepreneurial activities with the purchase of the Pica Deli in Reston and the establishment of his home, a 40 head cattle beef farm, in Round Hill. He grew up as an active member of 4H in Loudoun County and is a member of the Virginia Farm Bureau and Blue Ridge Cattlemen's Association.
Like his grandfather, Caleb is passionate about the international human rights movement. He founded a national, bipartisan non-profit organization called the [Athenai Institute](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oD97jztBg529kTZ2G48_psNNuDwrRn-_NQ6dZVThNe2QpChGu6WgeV63AWOVl7d0KCEADr6HAWMa8nzcHBejkDrJJuFeNH-zwn0ChNdyJCkpFOPvoxcF3_NfKHBsdlBBdM_7G6YEMto=&c=lPjZe8mnr1nynSPdEbJwLTAAUhuk8ee35qDMAbvnA68I4Qou9a0D7Q==&ch=ZSK5GjYV4gOJ4tYpUwI-mjETQo184ZXcZY-ztlOKvVKH1dZ65hpCbg==) and joined in starting Stand Against Chinese Communism (SACC). Both organizations are working to eliminate Chinese Communist Party influence on our college campuses. Caleb has taken a specific interest in fighting the genocide of the Uyghur Muslims and recently was recognized by the Virginia Muslim Association for his assistance to the Afghan refugee and Muslim community after President Biden's botched and deadly withdrawal from Afghanistan.
Caleb is ready to fight for you and all the citizens of the 10th Congressional District!! Go to the Max for Virginia [website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oD97jztBg529kTZ2G48_psNNuDwrRn-_NQ6dZVThNe2QpChGu6WgeYVLbY-84zWAjGrGl5wX44v3SGHwaN2is1k55NyETYZMxdVlbHQN_I646yHhktQNibryYi6VBX4QWiM2DHM-u6uC9dKorA0PjdkXFCwc13JO&c=lPjZe8mnr1nynSPdEbJwLTAAUhuk8ee35qDMAbvnA68I4Qou9a0D7Q==&ch=ZSK5GjYV4gOJ4tYpUwI-mjETQo184ZXcZY-ztlOKvVKH1dZ65hpCbg==) and sign up to join the Max Impact Team!!

clean_body: Caleb Max - Working for Virginia 10 | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | Welcome to the Max Impact Team! Take Back the Tenth | FOLLOW CALEB ON SOCIAL MEDIA | == == == == | As you know, running for Congress takes resources -- if you stand with me, and want to see me elected to represent your values in the U.S. Congress, please consider making a donation! PLEASE DONATE TODAY | | | == | | | == | | | == | | COME OUT TONIGHT AND SUPPORT CALEB! 7 PM - MIDDLEBURG BARN AT THE FOX CHASE FARM | == | | | | | The ==, Chaired by Geary Higgins, will be holding a Candidate Forum this evening in Middleburg (23320 Foxchase Farm Lane, Middleburg 20117). I am excited for this opportunity to meet fellow Republicans from across the district and discuss the numerous critical topics facing the voters of the 10th. As a Conservative, entrepreneur, small business owner (see below), farmer, founder of non-profits fighting the Communist Chinese influence on our college campuses and lifelong resident of Loudoun County. Like my Grandfather, ==, service to my community is my top priority!! I look forward to seeing you this evening at the Middleburg Barn. If you are unable to attend and would like to talk, please reach out to me ==, Thank you for your support!! | | | == | | SMALL BUSINESS: THE HEART OF THE 10TH PROUD TO BE A PART OF THIS COMMUNITY | | | | | From Sterling to Warrenton, from Leesburg to Manassas, small businesses and the entrepreneurs that create jobs and offer their products and services are the heart and soul of the 10th Congressional District. I started my company, ==, as a teenager. First mowing neighbors lawns, then filling in as older friends went off to college and growing my business to become one of largest landscaping companies in the region. It took lots of long hours and lots of personal sacrifice with strong support from my family, friends, customers and neighbors. I was proud to be honored, and one of the youngest listed, in Loudoun Times's ==. Small businesses are not as the progressive Democrats like Barak Obama and Jennifer Wexton think... "If you've got a business, you didn't build that." I know first hand the trials and tribulations of government's heavy regulatory hand. Now as a cattle farmer (40 head in Round Hill) or previously, as I struggled to save == as small businesses were crushed by the government's Covid policies, we need a new approach, fresh ideas with commonsense solutions to the country's problems. I am honored to be a part of the small business community, a daily customer and I will be privileged to represent you in Washington. | | | == | SAVE THESE DATES JOIN ME AT UPCOMING GOP AND CAMPAIGN EVENTS Please RSVP to mailto:TracyKeyEvents@aol.com or Call 703-318-1401 to attend Caleb Max For Congress Receptions | | == | ---|--- | THIS COMING SATURDAY: Caleb Max For Congress Reception Hosted by Jim Rich. Candidate Caleb Max Hosted by Laura and Stephen Robinson Sunday, April 24th River Creek, Leesburg VA Please register by phone or text to Laura at (703) 856-5333 for the address. This is a free event open to all. Meet & Greet with 10th Congressional Dist. Candidate Caleb Max Hosted by Kristin and J.T. Griffin Tuesday, April 26th, 7:00pm to 9:00pm 23305 Fallen Hills Drive Ashburn, VA 20148 This is a free event open to all. Virginia March for Life Wednesday, April 27th. 11:00am Rally Richmond, VA ==. Caleb Max For Congress Reception Hosted by Ms. Kent Gladstone Saturday, April 30th, 4pm - 6pm Leesburg, VA To Sponsor or Obtain Tickets == To Download a link to the Invitation and Share with Friends == Prince William County Republican Committee 3rd Annual Lincoln-Reagan Dinner Friday, May 6th, 5:30pm - 7pm Rose Gold Banquet and Event Center == VOTING BEGINS - 10th CD ABSENTEE VOTING Thursday, May 12th, 4pm to 8pm The Middleburg Barn, 23320 Foxchase Farm Lane, Middleburg, VA 20117 == 5th Annual Loudoun Conservative Gala Saturday, May 14th, 7pm - 10pm Trump National Golf Club ==. And Many More To Come. Watch This Space! | | | == | | | | | == | ---|--- | HOW AND WHERE TO VOTE Scan the Code or == SAVE THE DATE - FIREHOUSE PRIMARY SATURDAY, MAY 21 - 9 AM TO 4 PM VOTE FOR CALEB MAX The 10th CD Republican Committee has selected a party run process for selecting our Republican Congressional Candidate to challenge Nancy Pelosi's friend, Democrat Jennifer Wexton. The party canvass, often called a "firehouse or mini- primary" is an extremely simple process. Here is a link on my website about how to vote: == Please show up at the designated voting location in your county (this probably will not be where you normally vote) on May 21st between 9 and 4. You will find the 11 voting locations below and not in Loudoun and Prince William, that certain Magisterial Districts have designated voting locations (see == for exact precincts): FAIRFAX COUNTY Clifton Town Hall, 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton, VA 20124 FAUQUIER COUNTY Fauquier High School, 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton, VA 20186 LOUDOUN COUNTY Loudoun Valley High School, 340 N Maple Ave, Purcellville, VA 20132 (Leesburg and Catoctin Districts and selected Blue Ridge precincts) Broad Run High School, 21670 Ashburn Rd, Ashburn, VA 20147 (Algonkian, Ashburn and Broad Run Districts) Mercer Middle School, 42149 Greenstone Dr, Aldie, VA 20105 (Dulles and Sterling Districts and selected Blue Ridge precincts) CITY OF MANASSAS Grace E. Metz Middle School, 9950 Wellington Rd, Manassas, VA 20110 MANASSAS PARK Manassas Park Community Center, 99 Adams St, Manassas Park, VA 20111 PRINCE WILLIAM COUNTY Bull Run Middle School, 6308 Catharpin Road, Gainesville, VA, 20155 (Gainesville District) Gainesville Middle School, 8001 Limestone Dr, Gainesville, VA 20155 (Brentsville District) Lake Jackson Vol. Fire Department, 11310 Coles Dr, Manassas, VA 20112 (Coles and Occoquan Districts) RAPPAHANNOCK COUNTY Rappahannock Co. Elem. School, 34 Schoolhouse Rd, Washington, VA 22747 Present your ID to verify you are a registered voter. IF YOU ARE NOT REGISTERED TO VOTE, PLEASE DO SO ASAP - you can go to the == to check on your status or register to vote. The ballot will have you rank your choices, mark CALEB MAX as your first choice (more on rank choice voting ==). Submit your ballot and you may leave...simple. Bring your friends and family and have them vote for Caleb Max! If you are unable to attend and have a good reason, you can in person absentee vote early at the following location: IN-PERSON ABSENTEE VOTING Thursday, May 12, 2022 4 p.m. to 8 p.m. The Middleburg Barn 23320 Foxchase Farm Lane Middleburg, VA 20117 So Mark Your Calendar today for Saturday, May 21 to Vote for Caleb!! . | | On The Campaign Trail Visit Our Website == | It was great to spend Easter with my mother at == while my family was out of town. My best wishes to all celebrating religious freedom in our country and please remember, many around the world do not have this human right that we enjoy. We must protect and champion these freedoms! I met Marlon of the == at the gun show, and he invited me to his restaurant in Manassas. We discussed the issues facing small business owners and the results of both bad policies and failed leadership. | | == | I stopped by the Conservative Women's Outing at == in Purcellville to talk to supporters on this past beautiful Saturday. It was great to catch up with Leesburg Councilwoman and Candidate for Mayor ==! Neighborhood Meet & Greet events are an excellent way for me to connect with voters and learn of their concerns about the Biden Administration and the wrong direction our country is heading. Please email us below or == to my website if you would like to host a meeting. Thank you! | | mailto:noah@maxforvirginia.com | | Country. Community. Common Sense. | | == | ---|--- | My campaign will be focused on Country, Community and Common Sense. Country is ensuring that the United States remains an economic and military leader that stands as a beacon of hope for freedom seeking people around the world. Community is supporting the growth of the 10th District's dynamic economy and many small businesses and local organizations, which are the foundation of our society. And Common Sense is an understanding that we cannot continue with the fiscal irresponsibility of the past and must make the hardworking families of this district our main priority. Right now, working Americans suffer from the highest inflation rate in decades. I look forward to standing up to the Biden Administration and Jennifer Wexton's failed policies which hurt every working family in the 10th Congressional District. As the Republican candidate, we will win in November, flip the House of Representatives from blue to red, and put government back to work for the hardworking families and business owners who call the 10th District home. | | | == | | Learn More About Caleb | | Lifelong Loudoun County resident and business owner, Caleb was recently recognized by the == as a business and community leader. He founded one of Western Loudoun's largest landscaping companies and is the grandson of former US == who served the 10th Congressional District for 34 years, having been first elected in 1980. Caleb continued his entrepreneurial activities with the purchase of the Pica Deli in Reston and the establishment of his home, a 40 head cattle beef farm, in Round Hill. He grew up as an active member of 4H in Loudoun County and is a member of the Virginia Farm Bureau and Blue Ridge Cattlemen's Association. Like his grandfather, Caleb is passionate about the international human rights movement. He founded a national, bipartisan non-profit organization called the == and joined in starting Stand Against Chinese Communism (SACC). Both organizations are working to eliminate Chinese Communist Party influence on our college campuses. Caleb has taken a specific interest in fighting the genocide of the Uyghur Muslims and recently was recognized by the Virginia Muslim Association for his assistance to the Afghan refugee and Muslim community after President Biden's botched and deadly withdrawal from Afghanistan. Caleb is ready to fight for you and all the citizens of the 10th Congressional District!! Go to the Max for Virginia == and sign up to join the Max Impact Team!! | | | == | | | THANK YOU FOR YOUR MOST GENEROUS CONTRIBUTION TO OUR CAMPAIGN | | | == | SAVE THE DATE TO VOTE - FIREHOUSE PRIMARY ON SATURDAY, MAY 21ST | | | | == == == == | | Max For Virginia | PO Box 4306, Leesburg, VA 20177 | | Sent by mailto:media@maxforvirginia.com powered by

name: Katie Pavlich
subject: They Tried to Silence Me
body:
Time is running out for us to fight the lifetime of indoctrination forced upon our college age students.
| | If you've seen me on conservative news shows, or are familiar with my work at TownHall or PJ Media, you know I don't apologize for my conservative values, and I'll defend my constitutional rights to the hilt.

I'm proud of America... **NOT ASHAMED!**

**And, I know since you are reading this, that you aren't ashamed of America or our values either.**

**But there are millions of young people who aren't provided with the truth about your conservative ideas...**

[**Will you help give these young people the opportunity to hear your conservative ideas?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60175166:6PnutVoEN:m:1:3317145305:B825F66151E9D9E14D36E1C90ACF1E63:r)

It's easy to see why young people are impressionable to liberal indoctrination.

They're high school and college students in schools where free speech is under constant assault and where political correctness and socialism is pushed in the classroom.

Liberals bully students showing interest in your conservative ideas.

I should know--just ten years ago I was a young, impressionable student at the University of Arizona.

**It didn't take me long to realize that my teachers didn't just dislike the conservative values my parents had instilled in me..._they hated them._**

My professors relied on MSNBC and CNN as the "gold standard" when it came to presenting the "truth" in their classes.

But I had no idea they'd try to silence my voice until I got involved with a national conservative organization called **Young America's Foundation (YAF).**

With YAF's support and access to their campus lecture program, I decided to invite conservative author and activist **David Horowitz** to speak on our campus.

He had just written a book about "how radical professors at America's top colleges indoctrinate students and undermine our democracy. "

And I was just about to discover just how right he was.

Just two days before the lecture, the school threatened to shut David Horowitz's lecture down unless our campus group coughed up cash to pay for "security" because administrators had deemed the lecture "controversial."

Meanwhile, leftist activists tore down our signs and posters advertising the event so students wouldn't know about it.

Then, just three hours before the start of the event, the school moved the lecture to a hidden-away classroom in the hopes that no one would show up.

Yet, despite every roadblock they threw at us, **the event was a HUGE success.**

University of Arizona students got to hear David Horowitz explain why free enterprise and conservatism are the true roots of freedom.

**And I learned a valuable lesson:**

**The Left will do anything to prevent young people from hearing conservatives because they know that students who hear the truth about our values will reject socialism.**

Oh, you won't hear much about the threats, violence, and intimidation pointed at conservatives in schools from the mainstream media.

But I've witnessed it firsthand.

[**And despite the fear and intimidation tactics these radical leftists use in schools, I want you to know YOU can play a pivotal part to ensure more young Americans hear the truth about our conservative values by joining YAF today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60175166:6PnutVoEN:m:1:3317145305:B825F66151E9D9E14D36E1C90ACF1E63:r)

**You see, YAF had such an impact on my life that today I'm one of their speakers.**

And I personally know how enraged the Left can get when we speak up for commonsense values that used to be taken for granted - such as border security, free enterprise, and traditional family values.

For example:
* When I spoke at the university of Wisconsin, radical campus activists protested my speech by committing an obscene act that should have been treated as sexual harassment. Instead, the university ignored protestors, labeled me as "controversial" and imposed a "security fee" on the local YAF chapter.
* And later, at Kennesaw State University in Georgia, campus administrators tried to prevent me from speaking. They claimed I was "controversial," and campus administrators tried to force the local YAF chapter to pay a heavy handed "security fee" in a clear effort to stifle free speech.

But I'm not the only YAF speaker who's had to deal with this kind of intimidation. Many other YAF speakers have been disrupted... **and even seriously endangered.**

**Ben Shapiro was threatened by a violent Antifa terrorist demonstration, after U.C. Berkeley was forced to allow him to speak after a lawsuit filed by YAF.**

The First Amendment says every American deserves to have their voice heard in the public square. Everyone deserves a chance to share their opinion and defend their viewpoints.

_**But the Left is terrified of your ideas.**_

That's why the Left seeks to SILENCE our voices, instead of debating us.

I've heard many good people say it's too late...there's nothing we can do to stop the Left from indoctrinating young people on college campuses with socialism.

_**But it's simply not true - YAF is living proof we CAN stop them.**_

Time and time again, _**YAF has sued campuses who sought to censor conservative speakers and WON**_ - ensuring young Americans can hear our shared conservative values and ideas.

**Let's face it - with the far Left firmly in control of our public school system and most colleges, young Americans won't hear these basic truths unless YAF is there to tell them.**

And time is running out for us to fight the lifetime of indoctrination forced upon our college age students.

[**If you want to help recruit the largest audiences of young people into the Conservative Movement, I hope you will make a tax-deductible gift to Young America's Foundation today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60175166:6PnutVoEN:m:1:3317145305:B825F66151E9D9E14D36E1C90ACF1E63:r)

Remember, the Left is determined to silence voices like ours in schools across the country.

In fact, they tried their best to stop YAF...

_Your support of YAF is so important because without your help, they'll succeed and your conservative values WILL BE SILENCED._

**This is simply not a battle we can afford to lose.**

We must decide whether our country remains a bastion of freedom or it will be twisted and transformed into a socialist dystopia.

The next generation is the key in ensuring that our nation doesn't make the wrong choice.

Thank you in advance for you support of this crucial mission.

Gratefully,
[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60175166:6PnutVoEN:m:1:3317145305:B825F66151E9D9E14D36E1C90ACF1E63:r)
**Katie Pavlich**
_Fox News Contributor
New York Times Bestselling Author
Editor, Townhall.com
Young America's Foundation Speaker_

---

name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: Help me, Elon Musk. You're my only hope.
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDktNjViZWE1OWQ0YTI5NDAyOWFhZTJkYjdiMmEyMmE4ZmMiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9wcjl6c2Z6aG9sP3NyYz1SQU5PMjcwNDcifQ/tHGi4RuFB9y5kz_5_fmCuA)
---
|
---
Fellow free speech lover, A few days ago, Twitter announced that Elon Musk, the electric car-making, rocket-launching, tunnel-drilling, flamethrower-wielding, richest man on Earth, had recently become its largest shareholder. That's great news for free speech-and great news for us here at the Babylon Bee. You see, my team has been locked out of our Twitter account for several weeks now because we dared to state the shocking truth that a man is a man. You may have read about it in the news, or seen me talking about it with Tucker Carlson on Fox News. Right now, Twitter is holding our account hostage and demanding that we delete our "offensive" tweet in order to regain access. But I promise you - that's not going to happen. Instead, we're standing our ground. We're standing for the truth. And with Elon Musk now holding a sizable portion of Twitter's stock, it looks like our window of opportunity may be opening. [**Will you take a moment right now to stand with the Babylon Bee for free speech by signing this petition to Elon Musk and urging him to reinstate our account?**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDktNjViZWE1OWQ0YTI5NDAyOWFhZTJkYjdiMmEyMmE4ZmMiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9wcjl6c2Z6aG9sP3NyYz1SQU5PMjcwNDcifQ/x1DXlHMBts5OBhdXp4ipwg)
---
[**Sign the Petition**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDktNjViZWE1OWQ0YTI5NDAyOWFhZTJkYjdiMmEyMmE4ZmMiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9wcjl6c2Z6aG9sP3NyYz1SQU5PMjcwNDcifQ/Cvnc8n7NNpiKM_047fa69w)
---
The Babylon Bee is Twitter's number-one target right now - and all because we dared to mock their left-wing orthodoxy.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDktNjViZWE1OWQ0YTI5NDAyOWFhZTJkYjdiMmEyMmE4ZmMiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9wcjl6c2Z6aG9sP3NyYz1SQU5PMjcwNDcifQ/BXRZ28O9GnkUm8xDPjAGWw)We posted this tweet a few weeks back, naming Dr. Rachel Levine, a transgender member of the Biden administration, our "Man of the Year." It was our satirical response to USA Today's decision to name Dr. Levine their "Woman of the Year." Shortly after, I received an email from Twitter letting me know that they were locking the Babylon Bee team out of our account for violating their "hateful conduct" policy. Since then, a few of our editors have been locked out of their accounts. Tucker Carlson was locked out of his account after expressing support for us. Charlie Kirk received the same treatment.
---
And all of this backlash comes because we dared to state the truth: That Rachel Levine, a biological male, is not a woman. [**We will NEVER surrender to Twitter's woke agenda. And with Elon Musk becoming their largest shareholder, it looks like we may finally get the reprieve we've been looking for. But if he's going to use his new influence to take action, Elon needs to hear from millions of concerned Americans. Will you stand with us by signing the petition right now?**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDktNjViZWE1OWQ0YTI5NDAyOWFhZTJkYjdiMmEyMmE4ZmMiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9wcjl6c2Z6aG9sP3NyYz1SQU5PMjcwNDcifQ/CnGYfLlfDhQ0sjAcmlPuzg) Here's the good news - Elon Musk is a fan of the Bee. He has expressed his support for us in the past, and he was even a guest on our podcast last year. But that doesn't mean that our case is a slam-dunk. He has bylaws, legal constraints, policies, and other shareholders to think of. If we're going to stand any chance of getting his attention, we need to assemble _MILLIONS_ of concerned Americans, all urging him to stand up for free speech online by reinstating the Bee on Twitter. [**You can join that call now by signing the petition.**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDktNjViZWE1OWQ0YTI5NDAyOWFhZTJkYjdiMmEyMmE4ZmMiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9wcjl6c2Z6aG9sP3NyYz1SQU5PMjcwNDcifQ/DGNaP742SOzIKUIGBy4jSg) Right now, the Babylon Bee is paying the price for daring to speak the truth. Tomorrow, it could be you. But if we can get Elon in our corner, we can turn back the censorship offensive at Twitter and gain a major foothold in the fight to defend free speech online. Please help us show Twitter and Elon Musk that the Babylon Bee isn't standing alone. Help us show them that we're standing with MILLIONS of Americans who believe that the truth is not hate speech - and who REFUSE to let the truth be censored. [**Click here to sign the petition right now.**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDktNjViZWE1OWQ0YTI5NDAyOWFhZTJkYjdiMmEyMmE4ZmMiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9wcjl6c2Z6aG9sP3NyYz1SQU5PMjcwNDcifQ/hTdqPjZHUR4SN4ixmu8-5Q)
---
[**Sign the Petition**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDktNjViZWE1OWQ0YTI5NDAyOWFhZTJkYjdiMmEyMmE4ZmMiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9wcjl6c2Z6aG9sP3NyYz1SQU5PMjcwNDcifQ/9LcZJ-PV5A3adFl3FC13mw)
---
Twitter can silence us, but as long as we stand together, they can't silence the truth.
---
| | Seth DillonCEO, The Babylon Bee
---
|

subject: Our Latest Endorsement: Represent PA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=3486b27839&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| Friends,

I am proud to announce my endorsement by Represent PA, the only organization in Pennsylvania focused on investing in pro-choice Democratic women candidates across the commonwealth.

Represent PA only supports candidates with a path to victory – and as the only woman in a race against three better-funded male opponents, **this adds to our assurance that we can spread our message, turn out our voters, and win this race.**

Represent PA recognizes that women's rights are on the line. **We need a legislative body that reflects and defends the attacks on women in the current political climate.** I fought for healthcare rights for all for the past decade and, when elected, I will be your champion in Harrisburg**.**
**
[But I Need Your Help To Get There! ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=1640672798&e=3f8e2ea1e3)[_Please make a donation of whatever you can offer to get us over the finish line_](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=b54c99b015&e=3f8e2ea1e3)[.](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=5fae1cdd3a&e=3f8e2ea1e3)**

_Deja_
---
|
---
| | | | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=30ebac4b7d&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Hollywoke Punches Florida
body:
[****](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=08da01cf48804d3e8d50c854bf424cb1&_e=2rNGT2JDBjrxi1kpTwvPOaItJKgkJYyC3ABwTOvOS_bH5Sxi6Uud9kZie03t-Uf_qul8kvA26d1-1GDvYpKx9k3pqMZQvcxq0jVhc1YzjWKp9UWvF00OVTU-J4IAmg6QEyDp4_-OAetygWXLOOHawRsO0-4PXRfkUQWIEcK9cIHqWDUoytn_QM45BMb0lnkF-tsqXZgFDcyfmhASCY14YFfRlrFdvcklaSb8bz_uU_5stEiuzXNhZq_uoCDYzJ3zOUDJHOcUHsbezKXj9rLA_s2bAqT-Z25JYxWLTGlP5zIUgr6OpILq9K-yD95Txw8r2AS9wkk72kAUHR1HSrB0nw0aHbmIULCFeh495O3i2BH9j1EAPnXKdLYlKEsFi_ygzuo1WuFQy1zOFq4T_JW-XQ%3D%3D)

Peter,
Florida was again the Left's favorite punching bag as out-of-touch Hollywood elites continued their smears against me.
But I can tell you this, if Hollywood is attacking you, you must be doing something right.
I wish I could say I was surprised to see spoiled Hollywood hypocrites lecture parents about what is best for their children, but sadly their willingness to lie, distort and distract is par for the course. _**Their dishonesty knows no bounds. **_
_**If the same Hollywood elites who upheld degenerates like Harvey Weinstein now oppose our efforts to protect parental rights, I wear that like a badge of honor. **_
Rest assured - I'm not worried about what out-of-touch "entertainers" have to say, and I'm certainly not going to be intimidated by people who don't live in reality. **And the chances of me backing down to Disney-owned ABC or the low-rated Oscars is precisely zero. No amount of sloganeering from the liberal machine will change that.**
Despite these baseless charges from Hollywoke and the legacy media, I was proud to sign the Parental Rights in Education Bill to ensure that children K - 3 are not taught R-rated content in their G-rated years.
Peter, I will always stand up for parents and families and for what's right. **I 'm not backing down.**
**[Can you help me to punch back and continue to fight against the radical Left and the dishonest corporate media? Rush in $50, $25, or $15 now>>>](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=08da01cf48804d3e8d50c854bf424cb1&_e=2rNGT2JDBjrxi1kpTwvPOaItJKgkJYyC3ABwTOvOS_bH5Sxi6Uud9kZie03t-Uf_qul8kvA26d1-1GDvYpKx9k3pqMZQvcxq0jVhc1YzjWKp9UWvF00OVTU-J4IAmg6QEyDp4_-OAetygWXLOOHawRsO0-4PXRfkUQWIEcK9cIHqWDUoytn_QM45BMb0lnkFRANKsau1uM5fKRKT_PtAYrKNmDHghVVoJ-nESsxpapgObYWJLMf0bSEUJP_carSd2Fus_1jHhv6UVLq_FG6DT2QtoJTWT82Vy1cgrowBM7GXihdI91nw8up8f1GIwaHoih7evp6e2GQhuJDS8IQyh842lPsGKKvz5vlgZ7l81Ip_vn9xnakOgmqw4V4AGz_57Y9gcif0eWjFBbPgSPGjJw%3D%3D "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/hollywoke-punches-florida-hf")**
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

Rest assured - I'm not worried about what out-of-touch "entertainers" have to say, and I'm certainly not going to be intimidated by people who don't live in reality. And the chances of me backing down to Disney-owned ABC or the low-rated Oscars is precisely zero. No amount of sloganeering from the liberal machine will change that. Despite these baseless charges from Hollywoke and the legacy media, I was proud to sign the Parental Rights in Education Bill to ensure that children K - 3 are not taught R-rated content in their G-rated years. Peter, I will always stand up for parents and families and for what's right. I 'm not backing down. "" Sincerely, Ron DeSantis "DONATE NOW" Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Shamaine=20Daniels?=
subject: Nice to meet you!
body:
I'm Shamaine Daniels. I wanted to introduce myself and tell you about my campaign | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d2c5e63f01c7/nice-to-meet-you?e=503f1f1362)
---
[](https://shamainedaniels.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=acb2877aad3a11ad066d89ced&id=442e9b05cf&e=503f1f1362)
[**DanielsForCongress.org**](https://shamainedaniels.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=acb2877aad3a11ad066d89ced&id=2e0001b727&e=503f1f1362)
|
---
# Allow me to introduce myself
[](https://shamainedaniels.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=acb2877aad3a11ad066d89ced&id=4851f4c624&e=503f1f1362)
Hello ,I’m Shamaine Daniels, and I’m a Democrat running for Congress in PA’s 10th Congressional District to defeat Republican Congressman Scott Perry.Perry is one of the most dangerous members of Congress. He was at the forefront of Donald Trump’s “Big Lie” that the 2020 Pennsylvania election should be overturned. He brought a “key figure” in the attempt to overthrow the government into the White House to meet Trump, and he has refused to cooperate with the House committee investigating the insurrection, calling it “illegitimate.”With his recent election as the Chair of the Freedom Caucus - the most extreme, far-right faction in the House, he’s more dangerous than ever. Scott Perry is an embarrassment to all Pennsylvanians. He MUST be stopped, and we CAN stop him. PA-10 is the best opportunity to flip a Pennsylvania Congressional seat from Red to Blue in 2022.[**CLICK HERE to make a donation to help us defeat dangerous, extremist, insurrectionist Congressman Scott Perry.**](https://shamainedaniels.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=acb2877aad3a11ad066d89ced&id=6dad08a7f8&e=503f1f1362) I’m a different type of candidate than we have run against Scott Perry in the past. My family moved to this country from Venezuela when I was 13. My Mom worked hard and gave us a good life. I worked hard too. I went to college, then law school and became an attorney fighting for civil rights, workers’ rights, and immigrants.In 2013, I was elected to Harrisburg City Council. Now in my third term, I’ve worked hard fighting for many of the same constituents whom I will represent in Congress. On City Council, I led the effort to help small businesses open with less red tape and lower fees, and fought for affordable, habitable housing.[**If you think we need new voices and a fresh perspective in Washington, I’m asking you to chip-in to support my campaign.**](https://shamainedaniels.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=acb2877aad3a11ad066d89ced&id=30147a3c57&e=503f1f1362)
I’m also a Mom who worries about my daughter’s future. I want my daughter, and all of our children, to grow up in an America where she is treated equally and paid fairly, a country where her voice and her vote matters, and where she has more and better opportunities to build the life she wants. I also want to leave her a world that isn’t threatened by climate change and where the water is safe to drink and the air is safe to breathe.[**If you share these priorities. If you want your children and their children to grow up in a country, and a world, where the future is bright, CLICK HERE to make a contribution and join our team.**](https://shamainedaniels.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=acb2877aad3a11ad066d89ced&id=7ab244cd02&e=503f1f1362) I’m excited to be running to represent us in Congress, and I’m glad to have you on our team. If you would like to learn more about me, my campaign, and my positions on the issues, please visit my website:
[**DanielsForCongress.org**](https://shamainedaniels.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=acb2877aad3a11ad066d89ced&id=e4665d37d3&e=503f1f1362)
I hope you’ll support my campaign so we can defeat my dangerous opponent and work together to create the America we all want to see. In Congress, I’ll fight and win for ALL of us!With Gratitude,_Shamaine_
|
---
| | | | [](https://shamainedaniels.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=acb2877aad3a11ad066d89ced&id=19185cbd72&e=503f1f1362)| [](https://shamainedaniels.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=acb2877aad3a11ad066d89ced&id=195501bee9&e=503f1f1362)| [](https://shamainedaniels.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=acb2877aad3a11ad066d89ced&id=7946866697&e=503f1f1362)

| Greetings! [**My son Shane gave his life protecting his country.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj3fcimvt07hu77no6v47fiua0uiik2toj2kml9g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpge2o32cjh2bs) As a PhD in Electrical Engineering, he took a job with a telecommunications company in Singapore. What was supposed to be an adventure became a tragedy. Shane was concerned about work he was doing for a Chinese company, Huawei, the largest telecommunication firm in the world, owned by the CCP. He knew the work he was being asked to do violated U.S. export laws. Shane refused to go along with the illegal transfer of technology to China. He resigned from his job and found new work back in the U.S., but on his last day Shane was murdered. [**We were told that our son committed suicide. Despite all the evidence of my son’s murder, Singapore, China and the Obama/Biden administration refused to investigate. **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zne7qnpn87fhelp8jvujbdjav83hgsg4rmmh4kk8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpge2o32cjh2bs) As a Montana mother, grandmother, small business owner, and unapologetic America First conservative [**the loss of my son Shane only strengthened my resolve to defend and serve the American people and End Government Corruption.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zap9cauaujv06hfaenurjahrlo2dpeaebg07b5i8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpge2o32cjh2bs)

| It’s crunch time, Peter: **→ Speaker Pelosi just announced the 12 races that are prime pick-up opportunities for Democrats.** **The good news is** that President Biden won in **10 out of 12** of these districts. **But the bad news is** that Kevin McCarthy just set a fundraising record, raising $31 million in the first few months of 2022. **What needs to happen: We _must_ get resources to our Democrats ASAP.** The first FEC deadline of 2022 is when all campaigns will be judged on their momentum. name: =?UTF-8?B?4piGQ0kgb24gYmVoYWxmIG9mIEhpbGxzZGFsZSBDb2xsZWdl?=
subject: Explore these great works at home
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWUqbU5HQN

Classic children's literature is being ignored and eliminated
from our nation's classrooms at an alarming rate. Beloved
classics like The Wind in the
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWUqbU5HQN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

Classic
children's literature is being ignored and eliminated from our
nation's classrooms at an alarming rate.

Beloved
classics like The Wind in the Willows, Treasure Island, and The
Adventures of Huckleberry Finn are just a few of the books that
are rarely being taught to our nation's children today.

Not only
does this rob young people of classic tales of adventure and
friendship, but they also rob children of fundamental lessons
about the world and how best to live.

That's
why Hillsdale College released a free online course titled
"Classic Children's Literature." Perhaps you've had a chance to
watch a few lectures.

Today,
I'm excited to tell you that the course is now available on DVD!
And you can get your very own box set right now!

"Classic
Children's Literature" explores some of the greatest works of
children's literature, from Aesop and the classic fairy tales to
Treasure Island and Winnie-the-Pooh, and so much more.

When you
get your box set today, you will not only delight your family,
but also evoke a sense of wonder while teaching timeless lessons
to the young and old alike.

Speaking
from my own experience, this course has brought great joy to my
family. It has inspired us to read the classic works covered in
this course together. And I hope you can share this same
experience with your loved ones as you learn more about what
makes these beloved stories so important.

You can
get your DVD box set of "Classic Children's Literature" by making
a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this
secure link:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today

And when
you do, you'll also help expand nationwide educational outreach
efforts on behalf of liberty, such as:

Increasing the number of students taking free online courses.

Growing the readership of Imprimis, Hillsdale's digest of
liberty.

Restoring excellence to K-12 education through an American
classical curriculum.

Promoting constitutional education through social media and the
radio.

Thank you
again for your support of Hillsdale College and for partnering
with us to educate our fellow citizens, especially our youngest
citizens.

Without
you, Hillsdale could not offer these courses free of charge to
anyone willing to learn.

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

P.S.
These DVDs are an excellent gift for parents, homeschool
families, and anyone who cherishes these timeless stories. Get
your DVD box-set of "Classic Children's Literature" by making a
tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this
secure link:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today

clean_body: Classic children's literature is being ignored and eliminated from our nation's classrooms at an alarming rate. Beloved classics like The Wind in the Please see a special message from our sponsor: Dear Fellow American, Classic children's literature is being ignored and eliminated from our nation's classrooms at an alarming rate. Beloved classics like The Wind in the Willows, Treasure Island, and The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn are just a few of the books that are rarely being taught to our nation's children today. Not only does this rob young people of classic tales of adventure and friendship, but they also rob children of fundamental lessons about the world and how best to live. That's why Hillsdale College released a free online course titled "Classic Children's Literature." Perhaps you've had a chance to watch a few lectures. Today, I'm excited to tell you that the course is now available on DVD! And you can get your very own box set right now! "Classic Children's Literature" explores some of the greatest works of children's literature, from Aesop and the classic fairy tales to Treasure Island and Winnie-the-Pooh, and so much more. When you get your box set today, you will not only delight your family, but also evoke a sense of wonder while teaching timeless lessons to the young and old alike. Speaking from my own experience, this course has brought great joy to my family. It has inspired us to read the classic works covered in this course together. And I hope you can share this same experience with your loved ones as you learn more about what makes these beloved stories so important. You can get your DVD box set of "Classic Children's Literature" by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link: And when you do, you'll also help expand nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, such as: Increasing the number of students taking free online courses. Growing the readership of Imprimis, Hillsdale's digest of liberty. Restoring excellence to K-12 education through an American classical curriculum. Promoting constitutional education through social media and the radio. Thank you again for your support of Hillsdale College and for partnering with us to educate our fellow citizens, especially our youngest citizens. Without you, Hillsdale could not offer these courses free of charge to anyone willing to learn. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. These DVDs are an excellent gift for parents, homeschool families, and anyone who cherishes these timeless stories. Get your DVD box-set of "Classic Children's Literature" by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link: This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Two Conservatives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Conservative:

We are proud to announce our support for two new conservative candidates who will help strengthen the House Freedom Caucus and fight for America's future.
✓ CASEY WARDYNSKI (AL-05) - Dr. Casey Wardynski is running for the Republican nomination (May 24) to fill the seat currently held by House Freedom Caucus member Mo Brooks who is running for the Senate this year. Wardynski is a West Point graduate and retired Army officer who
served as superintendent of Huntsville City Schools and as Assistant Secretary of the Army under President Trump.
✓ MIKE SODREL (IN-09) - Mike Sodrel is a fourth-generation Hoosier, Indiana Army National Guard veteran, and local businessman. He is CEO of Sodrel Truck Lines and The Free Enterprise System headquartered in Jeffersonville, IN, where he has employed hundreds of Hoosiers.
Mike is fed up with Washington and he's going to do something about it. He's running for the Republican nomination (May 3) against an establishment-backed career politician.
Please support these outstanding candidates with a generous contribution today!
You can support multiple candidates with one transaction and the House Freedom Fund will pay all processing fees so they can spend 100% of your contributions on voter contact.
Republicans are positioned to win the House in November, but conservatives need to work together now to nominate the toughest fighters for freedom in the primary elections.
So please take action now and support our priority House candidates with a generous contribution.
Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund

 

DONATE

 

"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)

 

House Freedom Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that
promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status
are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.

PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Help me keep the momentum going
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Wow, friend, what a great MDP spring endorsement convention. To those who were there last Saturday, watching from home, or keeping up via email, thank you. It was an honor to be endorsed by so many passionate convention delegates who are ready to fight for our democracy.

Momentum is on our side, but we need to continue this energy if we’re going to prevail in November. Next week the Michigan GOP will endorse who they want to be by opponent. While we don’t know who it’s going to be yet, we know they will be fueled by the momentum of a nationwide anti-democratic movement – led by extremists like the DeVos family.

We saw it earlier this month when Trump stumped in Macomb County for my likely opponent and continued to promote the Big Lie. There is no question that in the coming months we’re going to face the most important battle for democracy in our lifetime. If you can, I’d appreciate it if you could donate to my re-election campaign today to ensure I have the resources to win in November.

While we’re taking our campaign to the next level, we’re continuing to improve secretary of state services for Michiganders all across the state. Four years ago I promised to reduce the time it takes you to do business at a branch office and I am happy to report we’ve done that. The average branch office visit now lasts 20 minutes or less. And, this past week, we began holding Road to Restoration clinics, helping restore driver’s licenses for Michigan residents who have lost their license for violations like failing to pay a ticket or who had a hold placed on their license because of parking violations. These clinics are being held all across the state so please visit our website for more details. [https://www.michigan.gov/sos/0,4670,7-127-1627_108835---,00.html]

The next few months are going to be exciting as we grow this campaign. I am confident that if we can keep up the momentum from last weekend, our campaign will be victorious in November, especially if you’re with me. Support my campaign today with a donation.

Donate >>https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=041922

Onward,
Jocelyn
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

Mask Mandates are Dead--For Now
---
| | | | | |
---
| STAND UP FOR AMERICA.
---
| Unapologetically American. Undeniably Original. The Candidate for We the People.
---
| | | [Visit our Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001acxZc9Qm5KZ3w5Gd2ep2aRJpmM8K6rI9RuBeDcCbsK3o46ZkE7eSTQ-QV3r_piE6N0MneEVjonJZVZ9hWjfHX5NuCijBqamCrdcplX9VTfFl9b7pnGlcUQVkKO9SC8vpJgO-39HUl0yDbAplJt6dtA==&c=W21aM5yPfqtlWJ4bPaIacte7fe59dgsG_0Bt8zTjEfjBrFyCmHTWng==&ch=tmu4VS5dqRH-VMWCxbVY7TiMOJhsaPpEQ_UT72NHGkOupofes5z10Q==)

| Federal Judge Strikes Down Mask Mandate
---
| Dear Friends,
Yesterday, a federal judge in Florida followed the Constitution and struck down the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention's (CDC) unconstitutional, unscientific, and ridiculous transportation mask mandate on airlines, buses, trains and public transportation. Our airline employees and passengers deserve to have this misery end once and for all.
This mandate was pure political theater, and this and other mandates never had any basis rooted in science or data, unless we're talking about political science and polling data. That's why the State of Florida, led by Governor Ron DeSantis, sued the CDC over this unlawful federal mask mandate, and yesterday's ruling marks the beginning of the end for Washington DC's repeated power grabs and federal overreach.
This was always solely about the Democrat Party and other Golabalist Republicans exercising control over us as if he were an emperor whom we must obey without question--the same playbook run by our incompetent governor in Washington State.
The judge's ruling yesterday strikes a blow against Fauci-ism. But the fight is NOT over. The Democrats are waiting to re-impose mandates after the election so we need all the victories we can get. We simply cannot allow moderate Republican Dan Newhouse, who voted to impeach President Trump and sided with Nancy Pelosi over 40% of the time, to have the opportunity to go back to Washington DC and vote against American values and the citizens of Washington's 4th Congressional District at a time when we need our decisions to be made according to the Constitution. That's specifically why President Donald Trump endorsed me--he knows, like you do, that I will always put the well-being of America First and stand up for our values.
As your next Congressman, I will always stand up against bureaucratic overreach and defend liberty. And let me tell you this... We've only just begun to fight.
[Help me stay in the fight? Rush in $25, $15, or $10 as soon as you can so I can continue our fight for individual freedom and liberty >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001acxZc9Qm5KZ3w5Gd2ep2aRJpmM8K6rI9RuBeDcCbsK3o46ZkE7eSTQ-QV3r_piE6Xc2vbRYoaCfjdsG-jaWPX_tMdMIFccYExWBj3qlVUVIbbm66oWaDYYD4OC9yQdYH-GNMA2fgqaoVdk9TKQXMGX__c19M6DnSg_2F23yvc4vp7WGyFBFCMn1g9fdiVtfKeh93Xpqa8a4ZT2PwgKYvYE1bjYrJxIfYxKME7HzIXRhRV6nxyB_frnbdyEEBLLCi&c=W21aM5yPfqtlWJ4bPaIacte7fe59dgsG_0Bt8zTjEfjBrFyCmHTWng==&ch=tmu4VS5dqRH-VMWCxbVY7TiMOJhsaPpEQ_UT72NHGkOupofes5z10Q==)

name: The Heritage Foundation
subject: The current state of America’s military
body:
Right now, America’s biggest adversaries like China are working to surpass our nation’s military capabilities. And critical
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z761qca4qbclm8efaqetmajv0qq100pqqt35ncug_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u6p79p1l6dhm2p5kcaomcshgsprrddbks9i33dbmc1jr2dhkedqeep30c5h6dc77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shgcoo7ed9l61p30pjhe2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5c1j61pr5c3jm49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6nkpt8emr78lt0rudu0udoeugq2rroa3nvts3k8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpgeepb0sth2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Right now, America’s biggest adversaries like China are working to surpass our nation’s military capabilities. And critical problems exist in many areas of the world:
* Countries like Iran act deceitfully and use their military to bully other countries.
* Rogue states like North Korea and Syria pose direct threats to their regions and the security of the U.S.
* And countries like China and Russia have proven they will do whatever necessary to overturn the more freedom-seeking international order and move toward government control and state surveillance of citizens.

On top of all this, our country’s military equipment—including planes, tanks, and ships—is decades-old and years past its useful service. With information like this, you would think our elected leaders would push to ensure a strong future for our nation’s military. But some of them are actually looking to reduce America’s defense spending. Apparently, they would rather prioritize issues like climate change. That’s why I’m emailing you today. I’m told that you are a conservative who wants to ensure that our country remains a beacon of hope, opportunity, and liberty for all the world. And I understand that you are just as concerned as I am about the future of America’s defense.
---
| | So, today, I want to make sure you get a FREE copy of The Heritage Foundation’s **_[2022 index of U.S. Military Strength.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc4n0j2gqvoiqoljce5pnnh8lmht1vb2tvbbh098_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpgeepb0sth2bs)_** We publish this report to help decision-makers in government see how conditions have evolved in the past year and where American strengths, challenges, and opportunities for improvement lie.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi9ed42sthdrfa5fts35qoitj84hp1jglvqm26p0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpgeepb0sth2bs)
---
| | But we also make this important resource available to the general public, so that you are aware of just how well—or how poorly—the government is handling this sacred task. In addition to all of this, you can use this Index to explore topics like:
* Understanding risk in the great competition with China.
* What we risk if we fail to fully modernize the U.S. nuclear deterrent.
* How prioritizing climate change could weaken America’s military.

**You can get instant access to your FREE guide right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/us-military-strength-ebook/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zai190jjpo1jn7vc3e10hpvnusnvvr4mia2f67kg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpgeepb0sth2bs)** There’s certainly some eye-opening information in here, so I really hope you’ll get your copy today. And you can share it with anyone you think would benefit from it. [**Use this link to get your ****_2022 Index of U.S Military Strength_**** today! >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh54qp6rd3h8a5stk16bgmk9qnjg1k3tcoe3ler0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpgeepb0sth2bs) Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
