name: Val Demings (personal story)
subject: that's me [photo attached]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
The words that inspired me
| | |
---
Friend,

That's me you're looking at.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44304359/341015866/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2957-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU4ZjM4OC0wM2MwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2zGoLMhDS1-VbIukEBRcl73xEAnm81i53N3dFqvOxv0=)I grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor. If you had told me back then, as a young Black girl, that I would become the first in my family to graduate college, the first woman to lead the Orlando Police Department, a congresswoman and a candidate for the U.S. Senate, well – I just don't know if I would have believed you. What I _did_ believe then – and what I carry deep in my soul to this day – is the lesson from my hardworking parents to "never tire of doing good."
It was my parents' words that inspired me to get into public service. It was their words that have driven me to do good every chance I get. From my time as a young social worker to my career as a law enforcement officer to my work representing my community in Congress – "never tire" is a mantra that I've held dear.
My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what is possible and what should be possible for every American. **As Florida's next U.S. senator, I will _never tire_ in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans. **I will _never tire_ in continuing to do more good for you and your family.
But when it comes to this race, the GOP won't tire either: The Republican National Committee chair is already attacking me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump tens of MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me.

This is already shaping up to be the most expensive Senate election _ever –_ and with Florida's last Senate race being decided by a narrow 0.12% margin, every dollar we raise will count tremendously. **I know a thing or two about winning tough races, but I need your help because I can't do this alone.**
**[I'm depending on your grassroots support to power this historic campaign and help me fight back against the GOP's attacks – and right now, I'm falling short of my midnight goal. Can you make a $5 donation today to help make sure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect and expand Democratic Senate control?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44304360/341015867/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk2957-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU4ZjM4OC0wM2MwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2zGoLMhDS1-VbIukEBRcl73xEAnm81i53N3dFqvOxv0=)**
Thank you so much for sharing this journey with me. It means the world to have you by my side.

Val Demings

clean_body: The words that inspired me | | | Friend, That's me you're looking at. grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor. If you had told me back then, as a young Black girl, that I would become the first in my family to graduate college, the first woman to lead the Orlando Police Department, a congresswoman and a candidate for the U.S. Senate, well – I just don't know if I would have believed you. What I did believe then – and what I carry deep in my soul to this day – is the lesson from my hardworking parents to "never tire of doing good." It was my parents' words that inspired me to get into public service. It was their words that have driven me to do good every chance I get. From my time as a young social worker to my career as a law enforcement officer to my work representing my community in Congress – "never tire" is a mantra that I've held dear. My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what is possible and what should be possible for every American. As Florida's next U.S. senator, I will never tire in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans. I will never tire in continuing to do more good for you and your family. But when it comes to this race, the GOP won't tire either: The Republican National Committee chair is already attacking me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump tens of MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me. This is already shaping up to be the most expensive Senate election ever – and with Florida's last Senate race being decided by a narrow 0.12% margin, every dollar we raise will count tremendously. I know a thing or two about winning tough races, but I need your help because I can't do this alone. = Thank you so much for sharing this journey with me. It means the world to have you by my side. subject: Exciting announcements!

body:
Thanks to the support of thousands of donors like yourself, I am proud to say that my campaign has raised $843,000 and has more than twice as many fin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c2c0b8a9acff/exciting-announcements-5395339?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |

|

| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=d78f43ae84&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
|
,

Thanks to your unwavering support, my campaign is building the momentum we need to secure the Republican nomination here in the 10th district and defeat Jennifer Wexton this November!

With financial reports released last week, we learned that our campaign has raised $843,000 - more than twice as much as any other candidate in the race. We also have twice as many financial resources on-hand!

Building these resources is critical to our success in November, and I want to say **thank you** to every one of you who has contributed to make this campaign a success. I wouldn't be able to do this without your support.

In case you missed it last week, we also released our first TV advertisement!

[You can take a look here:](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=9a09706b30&e=fc83fb200d)
---
| [ ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=043cbdb86f&e=fc83fb200d)
---
|
This ad will begin playing on TV today, making our campaign is the first to start spreading our message on television in this election.

With the support of thousands of donors across the district, I am confident that we have the energy and support we need to win this nomination and turn our attention to defeating Jennifer Wexton.

If you haven't yet had a chance to pitch in, [will you consider making a small donation of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to help build our campaign, defeat Jennifer Wexton, and put an end to Jo Biden's destructive, left-wing agenda?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=d863db958f&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=b101ca176b&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")
---

---
| [Contribute $50](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=df57537c8c&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=6a230e8e31&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute any amount](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=7f479b1c5d&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute any amount")
---
|
I'm counting on you to help me defeat Wexton and put an end to the craziness of the radical left.

Thank you for your support, and I look forward to working with you to win in November!

For love of country,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District

subject: A huge victory for freedom
body:
[****](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60174961:J0v1SVoNZ:m:1:3253819041:EED66F11B38E21182167226F0DE5198D:r)
Peter,
Yesterday, a federal judge in Florida followed the law and struck down the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention's (CDC) unconstitutional, unscientific, and frankly ridiculous transportation mask mandate. Our airline employees and passengers deserve to have this misery end once and for all.

This mandate was pure theater, and this and other mandates never had any basis rooted in science or data. **That 's why Florida sued the CDC over this unlawful federal mask mandate, and today's ruling marks the beginning of the end for Washington's repeated power grabs and federal overreach.**
**[HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60174961:J0v1SVoNZ:m:1:3253819041:EED66F11B38E21182167226F0DE5198D:r "HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT >>> RUSH IN $25 >>> RUSH IN $15

>>> ")**
This was always solely about the Brandon Administration exercising control over us as if he were an emperor who we must obey without question.

The judge's ruling strikes a blow against Faucism. The Democrats are waiting to re-impose mandates after the election so we need all the victories we can get.
**[Can I count on you to help me continue the fight for our freedom? Rush in any amount now >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60174961:J0v1SVoNZ:m:1:3253819041:EED66F11B38E21182167226F0DE5198D:r "Can I count on you to help me continue the fight for our freedom? Rush in any amount now >>> ")**
As Governor, I will always stand up against bureaucratic overreach and defend liberty. And let me tell you this... **I 've only just begun to fight.**
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

name: Kellie Rhodes
subject: In deepest gratitude
body:
Dear Friends,

I am filled with a deep sense of gratitude for your support over the past
year. Because of you I was able to travel throughout Colorado’s western
slope and San Luis Valley on a listening tour. We were invited into homes
and community centers where we met hundreds of hardworking people, heard
amazing life stories, and shared our vision of empathy and unity.

I felt buoyed by our shared understanding that democracy demands more than
allowing our hearts and minds to become seated behind a dividing line. That
it requires striding confidently over illusory lines with an outstretched
hand.

I am also immensely grateful for my amazing team who worked tirelessly
behind the scenes while holding down full time jobs, attending graduate
school, and raising families.

It has been a wonderful experience during which I learned first-hand the
strengths and vulnerabilities of the democratic process. Less than half of
one percent of registered democratic voters in Colorado’s District 3
participated in caucus or assembly. It is my understanding that the
Republican assembly had a similar turnout.

This is an exciting and pivotal moment in American history when the vast
number of Americans see great value in moving beyond division to join with
each other’s need to thrive.

Here is a link to my address to the Colorado Democratic Assembly
<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DDCouyZmOcU>.

Please reach out if you would like to talk further.

While my run for congress has come to an end, I will keep you informed as
we continue our journey to unite individuals and communities through our
Fierce Empathy movement.

In deepest gratitude,

Kellie
Kellie Rhodes
Former US Congressional Candidate CD3
970-769-3169
rhodestocongress(.)com

Because of you I was able to travel throughout Colorado’s western slope and San Luis Valley on a listening tour. We were invited into homes and community centers where we met hundreds of hardworking people, heard amazing life stories, and shared our vision of empathy and unity. I felt buoyed by our shared understanding that democracy demands more than allowing our hearts and minds to become seated behind a dividing line. That it requires striding confidently over illusory lines with an outstretched hand. I am also immensely grateful for my amazing team who worked tirelessly behind the scenes while holding down full time jobs, attending graduate school, and raising families. It has been a wonderful experience during which I learned first-hand the strengths and vulnerabilities of the democratic process. Less than half of one percent of registered democratic voters in Colorado’s District 3 participated in caucus or assembly. It is my understanding that the Republican assembly had a similar turnout. This is an exciting and pivotal moment in American history when the vast number of Americans see great value in moving beyond division to join with each other’s need to thrive. Here is a link to my address to the Colorado Democratic Assembly <>. Please reach out if you would like to talk further. While my run for congress has come to an end, I will keep you informed as we continue our journey to unite individuals and communities through our Fierce Empathy movement. In deepest gratitude, Kellie Kellie Rhodes Former US Congressional Candidate CD3 970-769-3169 rhodestocongress(.)com

name: Cynthia Mendes
subject: Why our economic security policy hits home for me
body:
| | | Hi Friend, **As a single-mom who has worked multiple jobs to put myself through school and afford a place for myself and my daughter, our campaign’s economic security policy is deeply personal to me.** Prior to becoming a Senator I worked in healthcare, but my salary was so low that I had to take on a second job cleaning mansions in Newport. We need to make it possible for working people to get by. Here’s what Matt and I will do in office to help families, like mine, all across the state: 1) **_We will enact a $19 minimum wage to guarantee every Rhode Islander, including tipped workers, a living wage._****** Every Rhode Islander deserves a wage that allows them to make enough money to meet their basic needs. 2) **_Because economic security is fundamentally tied to housing, we will build 10,000 green, permanently affordable homes._** Right now, it’s too hard for Rhode Islanders to find an affordable place to call home. Everyone who lives in the 10,000 green, affordable homes created under this program will pay no more than 20% of their income on rent. We will also cap rent increases at 4% annually. 3) **_We will raise taxes on the richest 1% – people making over $450,000 per year – who are currently paying a smaller portion of their income in state and local taxes than_**** _everyone else_**** _._** These funds can then be invested in programs, such as green affordable housing construction, that will promote economic security for everyone in the state. Friend, so many families are hurting. We need solutions that get to the root causes of economic insecurity like low wages, unaffordable housing, and lack of funding for key services because the richest 1% aren’t paying their fair share. **[If you agree, add your name to support our economic security platform, and give us your feedback on which of these policies is most important to you.](https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-on-to-matt-cynthias-economic-security-platform?source=direct_link&&link_id=0&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&email_referrer=email_1515221&email_subject=why-our-economic-security-policy-hits-home-for-me)** Grateful and hopeful, Cynthia

---
| | Sent via [ActionNetwork.org](http://actionnetwork.org). To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Matt and Cynthia for RI, please [click here](https://actionnetwork.org/email_unsubscribe/matt-cynthia-for-ri?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&email_id=email_1515221&list_type=group).
---

body:
This whole two-year campaign is about defeating indicted Ken Paxton, the most corrupt Attorney General in Texas history. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/2022-13621750?e=5d8d80652b)

| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=87b3fab89f&e=5d8d80652b)

| | ,

**Being Texan is both a right and a responsibility.** That's why I'm proud to be running in the Democratic Primary runoff election for Texas Attorney General.

With the election only a few weeks away, our campaign has hit the ground running. We're building momentum and a coalition across Texas. This campaign has earned the endorsement of key leaders like **Houston's Mayor Sylvester Turner** and **Houston's Former Mayor Annise Parker** along with the **Texas AFL-CIO**. Our volunteer base has been growing with the help of our [TikTok videos](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=1db2929e5a&e=5d8d80652b). And now, more than ever, people are prepared to roll up their sleeves and fight to restore integrity to the Office of Texas Attorney General.

**So, I am asking you to join me in defending our democracy. **

[**Watch our latest ad, "Defending Our Democracy,"**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=5384801f3a&e=5d8d80652b) below and [**sign up to volunteer**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=d88de5733e&e=5d8d80652b) to join us in this fight for the future of our democracy.

[](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=8ecef714fb&e=5d8d80652b)
[_Watch our latest ad, "Defending Our Democracy" here._](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=3e180992ca&e=5d8d80652b)

With your help, we can do this together.

Onward!

Joe [**Donate today and help us spread our message across the entire state.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=fe50da8aeb&e=5d8d80652b)

This campaign has earned the endorsement of key leaders like Houston's Mayor Sylvester Turner and Houston's Former Mayor Annise Parker along with the Texas AFL-CIO. Our volunteer base has been growing with the help of our . And now, more than ever, people are prepared to roll up their sleeves and fight to restore integrity to the Office of Texas Attorney General. So, I am asking you to join me in defending our democracy. below and to join us in this fight for the future of our democracy. With your help, we can do this together. Onward! disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44289131/340965372/99826739?refcode=fl_em_ta_20220419crowsplit_rjc_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2UwNTJjMy1lOGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tuCwQpQ5qw4yJ2Xz2aih5Ek3vptedKKdi9tM-M96CcI=)
---
Hey Peter, Rep. Jason Crow here from Colorado’s 6th District (right next door). Serving in Congress isn’t a job for the faint of heart. It takes real commitment, tenacity, and persistence to get things done, especially when going up against powerful special interests and corporations who want to preserve the status quo. **But if there’s anyone who I know will be a tireless champion for Colorado’s working families, it’s Dr. Yadira Caraveo.** You probably already know this, but as a pediatrician, a union representative, and a legislator, Yadira has been fighting on behalf of Colorado families for years. I can’t wait to fight alongside her in Congress for our healthcare, our environment, and our children. I can also tell you right now that I’ve been in a LOT of meetings about this critical election in November, and one thing has become clear: **The path to Democrats holding the House of Representatives goes through Colorado, and particularly through the new 8th District.** Everything Democrats believe in is on the line this year — affordable healthcare, addressing the climate crisis, protecting choice — and we cannot afford to lose this seat. Yadira is up against some _truly_ extreme MAGA-aligned GOP opponents, and Coloradans deserve a representative who will fight for them, not corporations or the far-right Republican base. [**So, if you’re able, will you split a donation between mine and Yadira’s campaigns today? Neither of us are taking a penny of corporate PAC money for our Congressional campaigns, which means support from grassroots supporters like you is crucial — more than that, it’s how we’re going to win our races and deliver for working families in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44289132/340965373/-1660238226?refcode=fl_em_ta_20220419crowsplit_rjc_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2UwNTJjMy1lOGJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tuCwQpQ5qw4yJ2Xz2aih5Ek3vptedKKdi9tM-M96CcI=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Hey Peter, Rep. Jason Crow here from Colorado’s 6th District (right next door). Serving in Congress isn’t a job for the faint of heart. It takes real commitment, tenacity, and persistence to get things done, especially when going up against powerful special interests and corporations who want to preserve the status quo. But if there’s anyone who I know will be a tireless champion for Colorado’s working families, it’s Dr. Yadira Caraveo. You probably already know this, but as a pediatrician, a union representative, and a legislator, Yadira has been fighting on behalf of Colorado families for years. I can’t wait to fight alongside her in Congress for our healthcare, our environment, and our children. I can also tell you right now that I’ve been in a LOT of meetings about this critical election in November, and one thing has become clear: The path to Democrats holding the House of Representatives goes through Colorado, and particularly through the new 8th District. Everything Democrats believe in is on the line this year — affordable healthcare, addressing the climate crisis, protecting choice — and we cannot afford to lose this seat. Yadira is up against some truly extreme MAGA-aligned GOP opponents, and Coloradans deserve a representative who will fight for them, not corporations or the far-right Republican base. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Rep. Jason Crow | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests. Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. = | = | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | Team, The May 3rd Primary is just around the corner. Of course, we know the road to get here hasn’t been easy. Frank LaRose and the GOP have tried every trick in the book to prevent us from having fair elections. They’ve passed 4 gerrymandered maps, hoping to restrict our voices. **Each and every time, they have failed.**
---
---
[**Tell Us Why Voting Matters**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44290314/340970320/796344222?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjMyNmY4NC1lOWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ic3gQIdHl9yZafKEAhG_6ia0jQ9wSepk3Rg9NHh05bk=&emci=15bb177f-6abf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=22326f84-e9bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14488557)

That’s why today, we want to ask all of our supporters one simple question: [**Why are elections and voting rights important to you?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44290315/340970321/796344222?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjMyNmY4NC1lOWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ic3gQIdHl9yZafKEAhG_6ia0jQ9wSepk3Rg9NHh05bk=&emci=15bb177f-6abf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=22326f84-e9bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14488557) [You can share your reason here to help us show Frank and the GOP why protecting free and fair elections is so important. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44290316/340970322/796344222?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjMyNmY4NC1lOWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ic3gQIdHl9yZafKEAhG_6ia0jQ9wSepk3Rg9NHh05bk=&emci=15bb177f-6abf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=22326f84-e9bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14488557) **Everyone** deserves the right to vote, and nobody should get in the way of that. Thanks,
Team Chelsea Clark

name: Ron Johnson
subject: DECISION MADE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, an
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztlpmbl17d2dq590t58cvkb2d82n2ik6ibc5198o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie8oj6clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65stmckqnapr0c6oectpmmgr68cr1e6r66thgm9r6eddi6timdd5h66o6ct3m6qrrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33dpjcoo7eob66jhb6p1nm2qmash5u)

| |
---
| | | Friend,

This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times, Washington Post, and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me.
And that is why I decided to run for re-election.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Friend. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. The Democrats even placed a $2M ad buy just moments after I announced my campaign for re-election.

And that's why I need your help.

_**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd32h6rlln997j4pfhcgls390gesc4pgdk2cg0dg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie8oj6clh2bs "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.")**_

Ron Johnson
---
| | | [Fight for Freedom](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2itci97m82qe89ih4outfcjpk0jnp50age9re90_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie8oj6clh2bs "Fight for Freedom")
---

---
| Friend, It’s Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z16dks34ct867c66isp731j1ctic3j8rmu7i48dg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie8oj6clh2bs "Please click here to donate now")**

FiveThirtyEight
Election experts at FiveThirtyEight say our race in Georgia could decide Senate control.
$10 million
Republicans have funneled nearly $10 MILLION into the campaign of our potential, pro-Trump opponent to defeat us.
1 Point
Polling shows Rev. Warnock 1 point down, which means this seat and our majority could be in jeopardy.

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: can't thank you enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44306106/341023943/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk950-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjQxMTkzYi0wYmMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2Oc_n5J6W7MaoZeVr8bNoU5_Cj8hrh6aF70MvZizNc=)
Hi Peter,

Thank you. There are no better words to begin this email to you. Thank you, thank you, thank you! We've been through a lot over the last few weeks. National Republican interests tried desperately to kick me off the ballot because they know our grassroots campaign can defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley.

**Each and every time we put out the call for help, this team rose to the moment. We couldn't have defeated this desperate GOP challenge to our candidacy without you.**
I decided to run for U.S. Senate because I'm worried about where our democracy is headed – about division, games and misinformation. This partisan ploy that Republicans just waged against our campaign is just another example of how our democracy is under attack. They spent big trying to kick me off the ballot and suppress the voices of Iowans.

But they failed. Come November, they will lose again. We'll retire Sen. Chuck Grassley – who has turned his back on working Iowans – and we'll expand our Democratic Senate majority in the process.
Here's what's also been on my mind as I've reflected on our victory: $25. Since March, when this meritless ballot challenge from Republicans first started, that's the average contribution that more than 4,000 grassroots supporters pitched in. **Thousands of people giving $25 at a time powered our campaign to victory – and that's exactly how we'll win again on Election Day.**
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for giving this fight your all alongside me. I know we can win thanks to this powerful grassroots movement that includes you, Peter.

Abby
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44306107/341023944/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk950-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjQxMTkzYi0wYmMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2Oc_n5J6W7MaoZeVr8bNoU5_Cj8hrh6aF70MvZizNc=)

name: Sean Patrick Maloney
subject: Trump’s JAW-DROPPING announcement >>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEAN PATRICK MALONEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
[_**Derek, I need your eyes on this right now. Donald Trump just SMASHED every fundraising record and announced a $124 MILLION fundraising haul to take back our Majorities this November. As Chairman of House Democrats’ campaign arm, I’m launching an EMERGENCY campaign to defend swing districts like mine and save our historic Majorities from Trump’s attacks. That’s why I’m calling on 4,278 grassroots Democrats to help close this fundraising gap and WIN. body:
Friend, I wanted to reach out on behalf of my son, Matt West.
Matt is a progressive scientist committed to taxing the rich and saving the planet. He has dedicated his life to studying and developing the renewable energy technology we need to stop climate change. And now Matt is running for Congress in Oregon's 6th district to make sure my future grandchildren ( *wink wink* ) have a planet to live on.

name: Dan Kildee
subject: the biggest honor of my life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hi, it’s Dan.

Yesterday, I filed my candidate petitions to qualify for the ballot and continue serving as mid-Michigan’s voice in Congress.

This is the toughest race I’ve ever run — because of redistricting, we’re in a competitive toss-up race, one of just a handful across the country.

This is the moment that will determine the course of our race between now and November and we’ve to be strong.

Will you click here to donate to the campaign now that we’ve filed to be on the ballot?

name: Carole King
subject: My dear friend Maggie Hassan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
The consequences of the upcoming election are dire
| | |
---
Friend – I'm writing to you today because the consequences of the upcoming election are dire.
**Mitch McConnell is ONE SEAT away from taking back the majority, and my dear friend Maggie Hassan is his top target. **
New Hampshire is a famously independent state, and Senator Hassan won her last race by _just 1,017 votes_!
**[_Will you join me in supporting Maggie’s decisive re-election by chipping in $3 to her campaign today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44306713/341026676/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk933-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTJlOWQwMi0wZWMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VPqBlIxNWx5vPIsQyeR327OhomtLfuyeabgKKm6CUKU=)**
Senator Hassan’s independent leadership helped carry COVID relief and the bipartisan infrastructure law over the finish line to President Biden’s desk. She led the charge to ban the practice of surprise medical billing. And when NH Republicans defunded Planned Parenthood, she delivered critical federal funding to family planning clinics in New Hampshire.
Maggie’s plan is to make sure Granite Staters can meet their family’s economic needs. Republicans refuse to tell us what their plan is.
When the GOP was last in power, Mitch McConnell and his Republican senators tried repeatedly to strip millions of Americans of their health care. Their admitted priority was confirming hundreds of anti-choice judges at every level of our courts, cutting taxes for the rich, and attempting to undermine the 2020 election.
Maggie’s priority is meeting the needs of families in the Granite State from Pelham to Pittsburg.
**We cannot allow Republicans to flip Maggie’s seat and take control of the Senate!**
**[_That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting Maggie’s re-election by chipping in $3 to her campaign right now._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44306714/341026677/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk933-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTJlOWQwMi0wZWMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VPqBlIxNWx5vPIsQyeR327OhomtLfuyeabgKKm6CUKU=)**

**Let me be clear – we need to re-elect Maggie Hassan to continue making critical progress in the Senate. **

**We need to stay engaged and work together to EXPAND our Democrats’ majority – and that starts with re-electing Maggie Hassan. **
The math is simple: MORE Democrats = MORE progress. But it’s going to take ALL of us doing whatever we can to overcome voting restrictions and pundits’ predictions. We cannot afford to be complacent or discouraged.

clean_body: The consequences of the upcoming election are dire | | | Friend – I'm writing to you today because the consequences of the upcoming election are dire. Mitch McConnell is ONE SEAT away from taking back the majority, and my dear friend Maggie Hassan is his top target. New Hampshire is a famously independent state, and Senator Hassan won her last race by just 1,017 votes! = Senator Hassan’s independent leadership helped carry COVID relief and the bipartisan infrastructure law over the finish line to President Biden’s desk. She led the charge to ban the practice of surprise medical billing. And when NH Republicans defunded Planned Parenthood, she delivered critical federal funding to family planning clinics in New Hampshire. Maggie’s plan is to make sure Granite Staters can meet their family’s economic needs. Republicans refuse to tell us what their plan is. When the GOP was last in power, Mitch McConnell and his Republican senators tried repeatedly to strip millions of Americans of their health care. Their admitted priority was confirming hundreds of anti-choice judges at every level of our courts, cutting taxes for the rich, and attempting to undermine the 2020 election. Maggie’s priority is meeting the needs of families in the Granite State from Pelham to Pittsburg. We cannot allow Republicans to flip Maggie’s seat and take control of the Senate! = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Let me be clear – we need to re-elect Maggie Hassan to continue making critical progress in the Senate. Granite Staters know that Maggie will fight tooth and nail to get things done for her constituents and all Americans. She’s a vital force for good in the Senate, and that’s why I’m stepping up to help re-elect her. But it’s going to take ALL of us doing whatever we can to overcome voting restrictions and pundits’ predictions. We cannot afford to be complacent or discouraged. = Whatever you do, don't give up. name: Giffords.org
subject: South Carolina. Pittsburgh. Concealed Carry.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
A mall in South Carolina. A house party in Pittsburgh.
#

A mall in South Carolina.
A house party in Pittsburgh.
Those were just two of the mass shootings that took place this weekend, just days after a man fired on dozens of people in a Brooklyn subway car.
Meanwhile, Republican governors in Georgia and Alabama are celebrating the passage of laws that allow ANYONE to carry a concealed weapon without a permit or training.
This is a divided country on the issue of guns. But the division isn’t between Republicans and Democrats, it’s between elected leaders and the people they serve.
Making it harder for people convicted of violent crimes to buy and carry weapons is something supported by the overwhelming majority of Americans, regardless of political party.
But it’s something that the NRA fights tooth and nail to keep from happening. They spend and spend and threaten legislators into blocking such commonsense measures—just so they can sell more guns.
So please, help us fight back on this critical issue:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to Giffords before our April fundraising drive comes to a close? This is an important month for the gun violence prevention movement, and your support means a lot.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr22?refcode=em220419-1-30&t=1&refcode2=1833_3935704_Unp1dp&akid=1833%2E3935704%2EUnp1dp)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Summer Lee vs. corporate lawyer
body:
There's one candidate who fights for the people and one who fights for corporations.
#
Peter,
**Justice Democrat Summer Lee has spent years taking on big corporations. Her opponent, Steve Irwin, has spent years defending them.**
Summer has fought corporate polluters and won. Irwin spent time at an asset management corporation getting rich by steering investments to oil and gas companies. Now, Big Oil is funding Irwin’s campaign.
Irwin raised $600,000 in the first quarter of 2022. We must help Summer close the gap, because she’s not taking a dime from corporate PACs or fossil fuel companies. She’s relying on our support.
[Can you rush a $3 donation directly to Summer’s campaign right now? Her primary is on May 17, so every day and every dollar counts, Peter.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103357?refcode=em20220419-22934&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=22934%2E1203867%2ET5x3Rp)
[](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103357?refcode=em20220419-22934&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=22934%2E1203867%2ET5x3Rp)
As a labor organizer, Summer Lee fought to raise the minimum wage and led voter mobilization efforts. As a corporate lawyer, Irwin protected companies accused of withholding unpaid wages and sexual discrimination.
The choice in this race could not be more clear, Peter. But Irwin has a lot of money and the support of powerful special interests like Big Oil and right-wing foreign policy hawks. **We need to send Summer a flood of grassroots donations right now to support the final few weeks of her race.**
[Chip in $3 or anything at all right now to help Summer defeat this corporate-backed candidate. We know most congressional races are won by the candidate that spends more money, so we need to bolster Summer’s fundraising right away.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103357?refcode=em20220419-22934&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=22934%2E1203867%2ET5x3Rp)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103357?refcode=em20220419-22934&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=22934%2E1203867%2ET5x3Rp)**
Thank you for all that you do to support our work and our primary candidates.
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=22934%2E1203867%2ET5x3Rp) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=22934%2E1203867%2ET5x3Rp) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220419-22934-footer&t=25&refcode2=22934_1203867_T5x3Rp&akid=22934%2E1203867%2ET5x3Rp)**

Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources. name: Nan Whaley
subject: I have to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
Right now, we have a governor who’s putting wealthy special interests ahead of Ohioans – and allowing corruption to run rampant in our state capital.

Team,
**One year ago today, we launched our campaign.**
First, I am so grateful for your support during this past year.
Now, we’re facing one of the biggest weeks of our campaign yet. We have a debate tomorrow and our final fundraising deadline before the primary on Friday. Our primary – the biggest test yet of our campaign’s strength – is just two weeks away.
**[So, I have to ask, team: will you become a One Year Anniversary Donor to our campaign? Chip in $5 right now to meet our $10,000 goal before Friday’s deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44307068/341028438/-1058194333?refcode=nw_em_220419_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzI3ZTNhNy0xMWMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BDOHPTLQxSKB3HPHV6TSyPJgaTiVqLPg20Ln2Lz38ww=)**
Right now, we have a governor who’s putting wealthy special interests ahead of Ohioans – and allowing corruption to run rampant in our state capital.
**Ohio deserves better.** I fought every step of the way to put people first as mayor of Dayton. I’ll do the same as governor, because our state needs a governor who will fight for every Ohioan, not just the wealthy few.
**[As the only non-millionaire in this race, I am counting on supporters like you. Will you become a One Year Anniversary Donor today? Contribute $5 before Friday’s big deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44307069/341028439/-1058194333?refcode=nw_em_220419_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzI3ZTNhNy0xMWMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BDOHPTLQxSKB3HPHV6TSyPJgaTiVqLPg20Ln2Lz38ww=)**
Onward,
Nan

body:

There’s a lot at stake in this election. I’m up against 3 extremist opponents who are backed by Trump’s closest allies and we’re in a brand new district that Governor Murphy won by less than 1 point.

My opponents are not going to hold anything back. They don’t care about the importance of bipartisanship like we do. They’re just looking to advance their own agendas with fear-mongering buzzwords.

I’m in this fight to make sure there’s someone in Congress who will fight for Jersey Values, not partisan agendas. I’ve brought millions of dollars in critical funding to our state so far, and I’m not done yet.

| Peter,

My bipartisan legislation to ban members of Congress and their spouses from trading individual stocks continues to gain the support and attention it deserves. Pundits doubted our bill would ever gain momentum when we introduced it in 2020, _**but support for this commonsense reform is clear in both Congress - we just added three more cosponsors this week - and the public.**_

My bill would prove to the American people their lawmakers work for our constituents' interests, not our personal portfolios. body:
We’re desperate. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44295301/340984046/1582314273?refcode=utc_em_logoT_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRlMDgwZTFkLWYxYmYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u5ALxcOZMqYQwMdBjtH_weShVfsOTU6WwP1ncsWs9rc=) **⚠️ URGENT⚠️** We’ve said it before, Peter: the GOP is coming after our Democratic majorities with a vengeance, and we can’t afford to sit on the sidelines. **1) House Republicans raised $40.9 million last quarter — making it its best first-quarter fundraising haul EVER.

2) Donald Trump’s Save America PAC announced it has $110.4 million in cash on hand — more cash than the Republican National Committee and Democratic National Committee combined.

3) Senate Republicans raised $43 million last quarter, bringing their overall cash on hand to $44.1 million — the highest in its history.** **[It’s time to fight back. clean_body: | | | | Hi Friend, The Oregon governor's race is up for grabs. Democrats and their special interests are working hard to snag a win here, so we need a candidate who's ready to fight back — The Oregon primary is only a month away, so this is the time to go all out. The recent abuses of power wielded by top-ranking politicians and unelected bureaucratic agency leaders have pushed Oregon into a declining and poorly-run state that many choose to flee. This is a tough race and Marc is on a mission to restore freedom and dignity for the people of Oregon. To make this a reality, we need to get Marc across the finish line in this primary. | | | | Thanks for being a part of this! | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 95, Bend, 97709

name: Aadland For Congress
subject: How to Serve in Congress
body:
Here is my guide
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JPMarzeWKeYPcE2Kc6bxLpz4mqL0rGcxHReVcUmH6YKLDHdlPeqoCrUcKUVe2j1Xu4znWDqJXDO415KYu3ZagQyuho2xNAf-jBvg_UeZbFmT6-9jV9zlmFsP87g48xQoi3LmxPgKY9OXi5oCcSScEW08huCV1mij&c=4xsdtY20QsjeUsQmjkB4OPS5YueebMk0qo-v8MtXIY49VkG0Sa4fAA==&ch=oE-FLmdB0GWvRkVRH3_2YAFfoGL3J0uArAYcyDu1Qd7_lWMgNolDbQ==)
---
|
---
| Upholding the Constitution for the "more perfect union"
---
| |
---|---
|
Living in America is a privilege that carries with it responsibilities for all of us. As your congressman I will always keep in mind my responsibilities to you and the great privilege it is to serve as your representative. I will be guided by my faith and a moral compass grounded in the Judeo-Christian principles that built this nation, while always adhering to the US Constitution.

America is not a completed work, but we continually look for ways to make it the "more perfect union" our founders envisioned while preserving the divinely inspired tenets the Constitution set forth. There is deep wisdom in its words--its conscientious application is a major part of what has kept this nation together despite our vast size, population and diversity.

Serving the people of our district is an honor that carries with it an unending responsibility to our Coloradans and fellow Americans. I will act responsibly, in both the letter and spirit of the law, for the sake of our country in my every action, even when it is not politically or personally expedient.

I'm not a lifelong politician; that makes my view different from those in Washington who have, with their every thought, sought personal or political advantage and advocated for things that are merely intended to get through the moment, untethered to principle or conviction. We must think of America in the long-term and about what is best for our future generations. We must choose the harder right over the easier wrong, or we will continue down this progressive road to ruin.

Members of congress and our executive branch must, for the sake of our people, work towards building trust in our government in a way that is sadly not happening today. Too many in Washington solely concentrate on destroying their political opposition rather than focusing on solving the problems that most effect their constituents.

I will go to Washington as a strong advocate of what truly serves the citizens of District 7 and the country. I will look to ally with those who diligently uphold the US Constitution and strive to serve their constituencies, even if that means crossing the aisle. I believe it is my responsibility to be open to such openings and take positive action. However, I will never work with those who are openly undermining the US Constitution or working against the interests of the United States.

Of course, I will stand firm on championing fundamental issues such as protecting the 2nd Amendment, production of proven energy sources to achieve energy independence, securing our borders, curbing excessive spending, ending practices that lead to further inflation-the list goes on. But, keeping a lookout for opportunities cannot simply be overridden by ideology.

In the military, people would call me a happy warrior. I have found that fighting for the right cause and doing my duty fulfills me. I enjoy solving problems, working with others to achieve greater ends, and building a stronger and more resilient country. You, my fellow citizens will be foremost in my mind for every vote I make and every bill I propose. I will have no other vision in mind.
---

# Stand with Erik Today
---
| I'm asking for your support so that I can represent you in Washington and help turn the tide of failed Democratic policy. Please donate today.

You can help in two ways:
* First, write your current lawmaker and express your concerns about how the government is failing us.

clean_body: Here is my guide | | | | == | | Upholding the Constitution for the "more perfect union" | | ---|--- | Living in America is a privilege that carries with it responsibilities for all of us. As your congressman I will always keep in mind my responsibilities to you and the great privilege it is to serve as your representative. I will be guided by my faith and a moral compass grounded in the Judeo-Christian principles that built this nation, while always adhering to the US Constitution. America is not a completed work, but we continually look for ways to make it the "more perfect union" our founders envisioned while preserving the divinely inspired tenets the Constitution set forth. There is deep wisdom in its words--its conscientious application is a major part of what has kept this nation together despite our vast size, population and diversity. Serving the people of our district is an honor that carries with it an unending responsibility to our Coloradans and fellow Americans. I will act responsibly, in both the letter and spirit of the law, for the sake of our country in my every action, even when it is not politically or personally expedient. I'm not a lifelong politician; that makes my view different from those in Washington who have, with their every thought, sought personal or political advantage and advocated for things that are merely intended to get through the moment, untethered to principle or conviction. We must think of America in the long-term and about what is best for our future generations. We must choose the harder right over the easier wrong, or we will continue down this progressive road to ruin. Members of congress and our executive branch must, for the sake of our people, work towards building trust in our government in a way that is sadly not happening today. Too many in Washington solely concentrate on destroying their political opposition rather than focusing on solving the problems that most effect their constituents. I will go to Washington as a strong advocate of what truly serves the citizens of District 7 and the country. I will look to ally with those who diligently uphold the US Constitution and strive to serve their constituencies, even if that means crossing the aisle. I believe it is my responsibility to be open to such openings and take positive action. However, I will never work with those who are openly undermining the US Constitution or working against the interests of the United States. Of course, I will stand firm on championing fundamental issues such as protecting the 2nd Amendment, production of proven energy sources to achieve energy independence, securing our borders, curbing excessive spending, ending practices that lead to further inflation-the list goes on. But, keeping a lookout for opportunities cannot simply be overridden by ideology. In the military, people would call me a happy warrior. I have found that fighting for the right cause and doing my duty fulfills me. I enjoy solving problems, working with others to achieve greater ends, and building a stronger and more resilient country. You, my fellow citizens will be foremost in my mind for every vote I make and every bill I propose. I will have no other vision in mind. | | | | == | | | Stand with Erik Today | I'm asking for your support so that I can represent you in Washington and help turn the tide of failed Democratic policy. Please donate today. | == You can help in two ways: First, write your current lawmaker and express your concerns about how the government is failing us. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country. | == | Together we can stand against bad policy and for our future. | | | PO Box 630552 Littleton, CO 80163 (720) 464 4488 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with

name: Peter Franchot
subject: I’ve been endorsed by Delegate Marvin E. Holmes, Jr.!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
I’m excited to announce that I’ve been endorsed by my friend and colleague Delegate Marvin E. Holmes, Jr. I first met Marvin while serving in the House of Delegates many years ago. He’s a passionate public servant who has dedicated his career to serving Prince George’s County on issues ranging from job creation, to education, to supporting our HBCUs.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marvinholmesendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marvinholmesendorsement?amount=20.22]
Marvin, I am honored and humbled to have received your endorsement. I can’t wait to partner with you to secure a stronger future for Prince George’s County, and for all of Maryland in the years to come.
It’s no exaggeration when I say that our people-powered movement continues to grow stronger by the day. For the past few weeks, we’ve been reaching out to you about our newest endorsements from current and former elected officials and labor unions. I’ve already received more endorsements than any candidate for Governor, and we have even more endorsement announcements to come!
Our movement is closer to the finish line than any other candidate in this race – which is why NOW is the time to put our foot on the gas. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marvinholmesendorsement?amount=20.22] We need your help to keep meeting our fundraising goals so that we can continue to scale up our statewide operation and build the critical mass of support needed to win the primary on July 19.
Will you help keep our momentum going by chipping in to our campaign? We want to raise an additional $2,600 to go towards critical tools like field literature, yard signs, T-shirts, and advertising, and a groundswell of grassroots support can easily get us there.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marvinholmesendorsement?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marvinholmesendorsement?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marvinholmesendorsement?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marvinholmesendorsement?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marvinholmesendorsement]
Whether large or small, your donation helps power our movement from the grassroots up. Together, we’re going to secure a brighter and stronger future for Maryland’s communities in the years to come.
Thank you for your continued support,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marvinholmesendorsement?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

| | Peter, With our primary election officially less than a month away, Jasmine is busy preparing for her first televised debate that will air on Friday. She’s ready to answer questions, share her vision for Western North Carolina, and prove she’s the best candidate to face off against Madison Cawthorn in November. Cawthorn, on the other hand, declined to attend the rest of the GOP debates and forums. He’s bailing on explaining his vision and record to voters just like he bailed on his constituents when he conveniently switched districts last fall. **We call it like we see it: Cawthorn is not the kind of representative who shows up.[If you think we should replace Cawthorn with a real leader who will get things done for Western NC, chip in $25 to help elect Jasmine today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44295947/340986363/-1808973130?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220419_FR_CawthornBail_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDFmN2Q2MS1mMWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GtTUXPC5BlmBBYL_xk2hqyHsi-Vg1g50YIn617Nptuc=)** | | | [Chip in ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44295948/340986365/-1808973130?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220419_FR_CawthornBail_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDFmN2Q2MS1mMWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GtTUXPC5BlmBBYL_xk2hqyHsi-Vg1g50YIn617Nptuc=)

Let’s be clear: Cawthorn’s the type of politician who will say or do anything to get in the news and put the spotlight on himself. Thanks to you, our campaign has almost double Cawthorn’s cash on hand - and he is sure to take notice and do whatever he can to make up the difference.
Electing Jasmine is the best opportunity we have to finally have a representative who will put us first. She’s going to pave a new path forward for NC-11 – one that will fight for workers, protect families, and show up when her constituents need her.
[**But in order to send her to Congress and elect her as our next leader, we need your help. Will you chip in $25 today to help us stay on track to meet our end-of-month goal? clean_body: | = | | Peter, With our primary election officially less than a month away, Jasmine is busy preparing for her first televised debate that will air on Friday. She’s ready to answer questions, share her vision for Western North Carolina, and prove she’s the best candidate to face off against Madison Cawthorn in November. Cawthorn, on the other hand, declined to attend the rest of the GOP debates and forums. He’s bailing on explaining his vision and record to voters just like he bailed on his constituents when he conveniently switched districts last fall. We call it like we see it: Cawthorn is not the kind of representative who shows up.= | | | = Cawthorn has proven time and again that he is unfit to represent WNC in Congress. He fails to show up for our communities and has one of the worst voter participation records in Congress. Let’s be clear: Cawthorn’s the type of politician who will say or do anything to get in the news and put the spotlight on himself. Thanks to you, our campaign has almost double Cawthorn’s cash on hand - and he is sure to take notice and do whatever he can to make up the difference. Electing Jasmine is the best opportunity we have to finally have a representative who will put us first. She’s going to pave a new path forward for NC-11 – one that will fight for workers, protect families, and show up when her constituents need her. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = – Beach-Ferrara HQ | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Governor Ron DeSantis just secured a MAJOR victory by redrawing Florida’s congressional map, creating 4 MORE new Republican-leaning districts. Now, our race for Texas’ NEW 38th district is the last of the 5 SEATS we need to bring an end to Pelosi’s majority once and for all. As soon as Governor DeSantis’ map was released, the radical Left began scrambling and Pelosi went into a full-blown panic. The Democrats have already resorted to their most predictable and pathetic tacit in response to the new map... ...They’re claiming it’s “racist,” just like everything else they disagree with. Let me be clear, as a Trump-endorsed black conservative, it would be my honor to be the final nail in the coffin of Pelosi’s majority. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: "Wealthiest Americans pay just 3.4% of income in taxes"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Peter, it's simple: Tax the rich. Tax corporations. Invest in our communities.
#
Peter,
Yesterday was Tax Day, and it’s important to remember something: **you'll likely be paying more in taxes than DOZENS of major corporations.**
Working families are struggling to afford groceries, health care, and rent as inflation and corporate greed rise. Meanwhile, many billionaires and corporations are paying a lower income tax rate than teachers, nurses, janitors, and firefighters. Some corporations aren’t paying any income taxes at all. This is not OK. It cannot go on any longer.
Just look at this headline from The Guardian:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12403?refcode=em20220419-1193&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1193%2E420207%2EzCKMlY)
And CNBC reports that, “At least 55 of the largest corporations in America paid no federal corporate income taxes on their 2020 profits."
**Peter, it’s simple: Tax the rich. Tax corporations. Invest in our communities.**
That’s why I introduced the Ultra-Millionaire Tax Act with Senator Elizabeth Warren. The bill would narrow the racial wealth gap, help level the economic playing field in this country, and ensure that the wealthiest finally begin to pay their fair share. It’ll do all of this while investing trillions of dollars into our communities.
I’m fighting alongside Senator Warren and President Biden to fix the broken tax system. We must tax the rich and corporations.
[**Can you fuel my fight with a $3 donation today? We can only do this with a grassroots movement behind us — as corporate CEOs send their lobbyists and smear campaigns to block change.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12403?refcode=em20220419-1193&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1193%2E420207%2EzCKMlY)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12403?refcode=em20220419-1193&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1193%2E420207%2EzCKMlY)**
I don’t take a cent of corporate PAC money because I know this is a fight between the people and corporate greed. We can enact bold, transformative change together, Peter.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220419-1193-footer&t=22&refcode2=1193_420207_zCKMlY&akid=1193%2E420207%2EzCKMlY)**
---

name: American Update
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9834%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Ed%2bc6%2ftop1zHlu5ZaSjJnA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29863%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u4kwxUx55kc%2b4e5IxnWgrA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29864%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2kphrMFVfIlGS3BachJ2Vg&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29875%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XLxEbgIcta5sRADFMHtQFg&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
