This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: JazzLewis.com
subject: Major wins for the people ✊🏿✊🏽✊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=logo]
Folks,
The 2022 session of the Maryland General Assembly has come to a close! It is my honor to serve the families of the 24th legislative district as State Delegate, and I’m proud of the work we did this session to tackle our community’s most pressing issues and ensure our government serves the people.
Let’s keep going,
Jazz
1. Passing Legislation that Serves the People
This year, Jazz submitted ten pieces of legislation on a wide range of topics, including:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/health%20care%20equity.png] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/health%20care%20equity-dark.png][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/health%20care%20equity.png]HEALTH CARE EQUITY
Last session, Jazz passed a bill to establish Health Equity Resource Communities and incentivize healthcare professionals to locate in areas where they are needed most. This year, he made some modifications to help implement this critical legislation. Jazz stands committed to ensuring we tackle the many historical health disparities that exist in our community and our state.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/justice-dark.png][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/justice.png]CRIMINAL JUSTICE REFORM [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/justice.png]
This session, the House of Delegates passed Jazz's legislation to provide small business micro-loans and entrepreneurial training to the formerly incarcerated. Under the Maryland New Start Act of 2022, these new small business owners will not just be equipped to start new lives, but they will be ready to drive our economy forward.
Additionally, Jazz reintroduced legislation to ensure that every incarcerated individual, including those leaving solitary confinement, has access to transition services that will help them adjust back to their communities. Successful reentry puts the formerly incarcerated on a pathway to success, lessening the chances of recidivism and aiding them in their transition back among the public.
Jazz also introduced legislation to effectively scale the use of body-worn cameras for all of Maryland’s law enforcement agencies. This bill will ensure that departments can afford and effectively implement these costly programs. A state-wide body camera program will help ensure that we utilize an effective transparency tool to promote accuracy and transparency throughout Maryland police departments.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/civil%20rights.png] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/civil%20rights-dark.png][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/civil%20rights.png]CIVIL RIGHTS IN EDUCATION
This year, Jazz reintroduced the Hear Our Voices Act to ensure that Maryland students are fully aware and can access Title IX sexual assault protections. This bill ensures that every student and parent has access to needed information to report sexual assault or harassment in our K-12 schools, should they need it. Jazz was honored to work with many dedicated advocates and survivors of sexual assault on this legislation.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/economic%20equity-dark.png][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/economic%20equity.png]ECONOMIC EQUITY [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/economic%20equity.png]
Jazz introduced legislation to examine the systemic racial disparities within the financial asset management industry. The current diversity of our asset managers does not reflect the diversity of Maryland. When the state invests its pension fund, we have a chance to extend new business opportunities to minority asset managers and build a more equitable system.
Jazz also sponsored legislation to promote and incentivize development in areas with mass transit access, including our WMATA stations. This will bring job opportunities where job seekers already are, provide opportunities to those who may not have access to other transportation, and reduce the number of cars on our roads. With this legislation, we are leveraging tax-payer dollars and private investment to create more walkable, transit-friendly communities that place people front and center as we plan out the future of work and our economy.
2. Leading Maryland’s House Democratic Caucus
In addition to serving as Delegate for the 24th district, Jazz serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. In this role, Jazz works with colleagues to shepherd through comprehensive and consequential legislation to take on our defining challenges. As we recover from the COVID-19 Pandemic and address historic issues Maryland has faced for decades, Jazz is proud of the work Democrats in Annapolis have undertaken to serve the people of Maryland better.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/white-checkmark.png] GAS TAX HOLIDAY
With gas prices at historic highs, House Democrats voted and enacted a suspension of Maryland’s gas tax. This 30-day holiday helped drive prices down so that Maryland motorists felt less pain at the pump. While prices continue to remain high, this gives a measure of relief for Marylanders, keeping money in our pockets when we need it most.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/white-checkmark.png] FAMILY-FOCUSED TAX CUTS
To provide much-needed relief to Maryland families, the House of Delegates passed a bipartisan package of legislation to cut taxes on essential childcare items like diapers. These pieces of legislation are meant to boost families' budgets, cut taxes on the products that families need to buy, and ensure that we keep money in the hands of the Maryland families that most need them. <>/td>
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/white-checkmark.png] PROTECTING REPRODUCTIVE RIGHTS
With assaults on reproductive rights occurring across our nation, the House of Delegates took action to protect abortion access. This legislation helps our state train and retain certified medical professionals who are equipped to provide much-needed care to Marylanders. This will ensure that there is an adequate number of professionals equipped to provide abortion and other healthcare needs throughout our state to those who choose to have that care.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/white-checkmark.png] BANNING GHOST GUNS
One of the most alarming trends in gun violence is the vast proliferation of untraceable firearms, otherwise known as “ghost guns,” onto our streets and into the hands of those who would do us harm. These ghost guns do not have serial numbers, and they cannot be traced when they are found at crime scenes. This creates a gap in law enforcement's ability to locate the owner of these firearms and hold them accountable. These guns are also incredibly easy to acquire due to the lack of federal oversight on gun dealers and manufacturers. The legislation the Democratic Caucus supported will ensure we get these weapons off our streets and out of the hands of those who should not possess them.
3. Delivering Results For Prince George’s County
Here are just some of the projects being funded in Prince George’s County and the 24th district thanks to Jazz’s work in the General Assembly:
+ $400 million for capital improvements to create an entertainment district along the Blue Line Corridor
+ $8.4 million for renovations and improvements to parks and playgrounds within the County
+ $4 million for a Prince George’s County Amphitheater
+ $1.2 million in grants to renovate aging schools
+ $1.5 million to renovate the Adelphi Building at the University of Maryland Global Campus
+ $1.2 million for the Suitland Civic Association Building on Silver Hill Road
+ $500,000 for a new headquarters and place for programing for United Communities Against Poverty Impact Center at Historic Fairmount Heights Elementary School
+ $500,000 for renovations to Hill Road Park
+ $250,000 for Scenic Prince George’s, whose mission is to preserve, protect, and enhance the visual environment, scenic beauty, and economic development of Prince George’s County, Maryland
+ $100,000 to the Seat Pleasant Boys and Girls club
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/ResultsForPGC.png]
As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=biobox_btn]
Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

name: Beto HQ
subject: We fell a little short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Our finance team is poring over their spreadsheets.
#
In order to scale up our campaign to the level that we need to win, we have to constantly be hitting our internal fundraising goals.
But last week, we barely missed our $97,000 mid-month fundraising goal. **We need to catch up as soon as possible.** If just three folks from 18326 each chip in, we’ll get back on track and make up for our missed goal. _So we’re reaching out to ask:_
[ Will you be one of the three folks from 18326 who we need to make a contribution today? Whether you can afford to donate $3 or a little bit more, every single donation will make a difference. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55595?refcode=ema20220419-185730&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=185730%2E444211%2E6woMXd)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55595?refcode=ema20220419-185730&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=185730%2E444211%2E6woMXd)**
With more than 60,000 volunteers signed up, we’re working every day to scale this campaign so we can create the biggest organizing program that Texas has ever seen to defeat Greg Abbott. He isn’t fighting for Texans’ best interests. He’s focused on radical political stunts that hurt the economy in Texas and across the country.
This is shaping up to be the most expensive — and competitive — gubernatorial election in Texas history. And Abbott’s team has said that they plan to spend $100,000,000 against Beto.
[ We can’t have Greg Abbott as governor for another term. Please, help us elect Beto in November by being one of the three folks from 18326 who we need to make a contribution before midnight.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55595?refcode=ema20220419-185730&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=185730%2E444211%2E6woMXd)
With your support, we can win this campaign. Let’s get it done!
—Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220419-185730-footer&t=22&refcode2=185730_444211_6woMXd&akid=185730%2E444211%2E6woMXd)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

name: Doug Gansler
subject: Join me for a special evening in Baltimore!
body:
This will be a special opportunity to discuss how electing an experienced federal, state, and local prosecutor will make Baltimore safe. | Hi friends, **On Tuesday, May 3rd, I'll be in Baltimore for an evening reception at the home of my good friends, Paula and Steve Silverman, on Greenspring Valley Road.** This will be a special opportunity to discuss how electing an experienced federal, state, and local prosecutor will make Baltimore safe. If you would like to attend, RSVP by replying to this email or emailing: **[tom@ganslerformaryland.com](mailto:tom@ganslerformaryland.com?subject=5/3 Baltimore Event RSVP&body=)**. Please remember to include the names of all attendees in your message. If you're able, **[please consider making a donation to become a Chesapeake, Susquehanna, Potomac, or Patuxent donor](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bmore.may?refcode=em041922&link_id=3&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-postponed-join-doug-for-a-special-evening-in-baltimore-3&email_referrer=email_1514595&email_subject=join-me-for-a-special-evening-in-baltimore&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1514595)**. For more details, check out the information below, **[visit the event page](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bmore.may?refcode=em041922&link_id=4&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-postponed-join-doug-for-a-special-evening-in-baltimore-3&email_referrer=email_1514595&email_subject=join-me-for-a-special-evening-in-baltimore&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1514595),** or call my team at: (410) 353-7072. I hope you're able to make it! Doug

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44307831/341032345/1278717326?&amount=25&refcode=20220419_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODEzZTI1MC0xNGMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sGzTh7bD9-wOjh0SX8AFMMLc0vz9fdpltTdUzle9jzE=)

**_[Suffice to say, we’re going to need your support to make sure we’ve got the resources to fight back. Can you make a quick donation right now to help out?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44307832/341032346/1278717326?&amount=25&refcode=20220419_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODEzZTI1MC0xNGMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sGzTh7bD9-wOjh0SX8AFMMLc0vz9fdpltTdUzle9jzE=)_**

We can’t let DeSantis take his **extreme, hateful, agenda** to the next level by using Florida as a launching pad for a presidential campaign. But that’s _exactly what he’ll do_ if he wins another term this November!

The good news is we have a way to stop him. **The polls show Charlie neck-and-neck with DeSantis, and some even show Charlie winning outright**. But DeSantis is going to throw everything he’s got at us, and considering the amount of time he’s spent schmoozing with out of state donors, it’s going to be quite a bit.

**So please, pitch in anything you can right now to help us keep up the momentum, fight back against DeSantis’ money, and elect Charlie as our next governor!**

body:
We need to do better

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44307858/341032569/1159074266?refcode=EM_FR_220419MJLeg1_N_TNDP_30DO_4_NG_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTA5ZGJjYi0xNGMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jDp8dR6HNZZ8w54yHovDi2wlGdRDrM0S1bCRvUAo_Q=) Hey Peter, Over a third of US states have already passed legislation to legalize marijuana, bringing in billions of dollars in tax revenue. Not to mention the freedom this legislation affords to their residents and the reduced burden on our criminal justice system. The fact is, the Tennessee legislature is leaving money on the table and leaving us behind because of their antiquated views about a substance that is no more dangerous than alcohol.

**It’s time to move forward.** [**_We need legislators in office who are going to bring progress to this state, both economically and socially. We’re working hard to recruit, train, and support candidates who will support common-sense marijuana legalization in TN. subject: TWO WEEKS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT JENNIFER-RUTH GREEN
body:
I have a vital call-to-action with only two weeks to go until the Indiana Primaries. Read more >>

https://secure.winred.com/jennifer-ruth-green/55f63135b1db8bda?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=GreenJR_PG-E-2Weeks-04152022_20220418&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG-E-2Weeks-04152022&utm_agency=PG
Peter,

The Indiana Republican Primary is exactly two weeks from today, and it is essential that we have the critical Get Out The Vote resources we need to claim victory!

We have a plan, and our volunteers are ready to go, but we need to raise an additional $25k to make it happen. My campaign doesn’t rely on deep-pocketed Democrat donors — it relies on grassroots support from everyday Hoosiers.

It costs money to run ads, travel to campaign events and to different parts of our district to meet with voters, print handouts and yard signs, and buy supplies, water, and snacks for our intrepid volunteers. Will you help us fund these vital needs?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Melissa=20Martz=20Campaign?=
subject: Campaign UPDATE ---- NEXT STEPS FOR US
body:
There are over 200 Patriots on this Email list! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f6d903debf27/campaign-update-next-steps-for-us?e=77bc5297c6)
---
| |
---
| |
# Dear Patriots! We are at the final push!!
The election date is **AUGUST 23rd 2022**. If we want to see a real patriot representing the people of district 18 * ****WE NEED YOUR HELP*****. There are over 200 people on this email list. IF you haven't contributed yet -**NOW IS THE TIME**. Read below to see where you can help in this final hour.

1\. ** BILLBOARD**: We are considering to rent a relatively small digital billboard on a trailer hitch that can be displayed on the property of a local business or church in a high traffic area within the district. To do this we need a church or business that is willing to put the hitch on their property (the sign has a plug),**IF you or someone you know may be willing - Please reply to this email.**

**2\. DOOR KNOCKING:** You can do this **on your own time** as much or as little as you are able. We encourage that people go out in pairs. You can off course door knock in your own nieghborood **OR** at your local strip mall. **You do NOT even have to knock.** If you can find some time to place our door hangers on doorknobs of homes or businesses -**without knocking** \--that is helpful too!! ***If you are able, please reply to this email and we will get you door hangers.

3\. **CONCERT FUNDRAISER:** We are planing a concert for may 27th in Martin County and we need volunteers for that day/eveining. If you can be available to help -- PLEASE reply to this email.

4.**IN KIND DONATIONS** : If you are able to directly purchase campaign signs, door hangers or billboard for the campaign - please reply to this email. Monetary donations can always be made at **www.melissamartz.com.**(Friendly reminder that no one is making money from this campaign!)

**THANK YOU ALL, **

Melissa Martz Campaign

---
| |
---

name: Team Nina Turner
subject: 14 days until Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
“Nina is a leader and that's what we need in Greater Cleveland — a fighter for the people who is committed to lifting working families. Nina will be tough and she will care, not just go along to get along.” - Former Rep. Mary Rose Oakar
#

Hello Somebody!
BIG NEWS: Our campaign has been endorsed by former Rep. Mary Rose Oakar and former mayor of Cleveland Frank Jackson!
_“Nina is a leader and that's what we need in Greater Cleveland — a fighter for the people who is committed to lifting working families. Nina will be tough and she will care, not just go along to get along.”_
\- Former Rep. Mary Rose Oakar
_“I’ve had experiences with her in tough times, in crises, and she’s always been there. Getting things done is what Nina Turner does. And she gets things done in a way that is productive and beneficial for everyone, not just a select group of people.”_
\- Former Mayor Frank Jackson
Our people-powered movement is growing stronger every day! And the people in Cleveland can feel it. But with just _**14 days**_ until Election Day, we can’t let up now — **we have got to keep pushing and doing everything we can to make sure we win this race and send Nina Turner to Congress.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Melissa=20Martz=20Campaign?=
subject: Campaign UPDATE ---- NEXT STEPS FOR US
body:
There are over 200 Patriots on this Email list! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/13457c02c85f/campaign-update-next-steps-for-us-8813045?e=77bc5297c6)
---
| |
---
| |
# Dear Patriots! We are at the final push!!
The election date is **AUGUST 23rd 2022**. If we want to see a real patriot representing the people of district 18 * ****WE NEED YOUR HELP*****. There are over 200 people on this email list. IF you haven't contributed yet -**NOW IS THE TIME**. Read below to see where you can help in this final hour.

1\. ** BILLBOARD**: We are considering to rent a relatively small digital billboard on a trailer hitch that can be displayed on the property of a local business or church in a high traffic area within the district. To do this we need a church or business that is willing to put the hitch on their property (the sign has a plug),**IF you or someone you know may be willing - Please reply to this email.**

**2\. DOOR KNOCKING:** You can do this **on your own time** as much or as little as you are able. We encourage that people go out in pairs. You can off course door knock in your own nieghborood **OR** at your local strip mall. **You do NOT even have to knock.** If you can find some time to place our door hangers on doorknobs of homes or businesses -**without knocking** \--that is helpful too!! ***If you are able, please reply to this email and we will get you door hangers.

3\. **CONCERT FUNDRAISER:** We are planing a concert for may 27th in Martin County and we need volunteers for that day/eveining. If you can be available to help -- PLEASE reply to this email.

4.**IN KIND DONATIONS** : If you are able to directly purchase campaign signs, door hangers or billboard for the campaign - please reply to this email. Monetary donations can always be made at **www.melissamartz.com.**(Friendly reminder that no one is making money from this campaign!)

**THANK YOU ALL, **

Melissa Martz Campaign

---
| |
---

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Will you answer Mark’s call to action?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**We are eleven days away from the end of our critical April fundraising deadline and we’re falling a little short of our goals. So, Mark’s reaching out with an URGENT call to action:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?refcode=em220419-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2608_6688874_l586Wl&akid=2608%2E6688874%2El586Wl)
[**Will you answer Mark’s call and make a contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford so we can hit our goals, defend this seat, and keep Mark in the Senate? It all adds up when everyone chips in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?refcode=em220419-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2608_6688874_l586Wl&akid=2608%2E6688874%2El586Wl)
* * *
Friends —
You know when Mark makes an ask like this it’s crucial. And when he says that any amount goes a long way, he means it.
Whether you are donating $1, $10, or $100 it all adds up quickly and gives Mark and our team the ability to respond to the millions and millions of dollars in attack ads from corporate special interest groups.
We are trying to get to 1 million individual donors before the end of the month, and if you make your first donation today, even if it’s $1, we’re going to reach this goal.
So, here’s the deal: Since Mark isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money, it’s even more important that you make your first donation today. Because these goals are NOT arbitrary.
[**Please — can Mark Kelly count on you to make a contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford to help us hit our April fundraising goals?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?refcode=em220419-1-7&t=3&refcode2=2608_6688874_l586Wl&akid=2608%2E6688874%2El586Wl)

Peter,

I recently went on Fox News for the first time since I announced I was running to represent the great people of Alaska in the United States Congress.

A lot of people are asking me why I decided to run. The simple answer is: _I'm in it for the right reasons._ I've got a public servant's heart, and I'm willing to serve the American people.

I've been fighting for a better America my entire life, and I'm looking forward to proving why I am the best candidate, the only candidate, who can fight to put Alaska First every single day.

Your support will be the difference between a winning and a losing campaign, Peter. Can I count on you to step up?

clean_body: It was my first on-air interview since my big announcement | I recently went on Fox News for the first time... Peter, I recently went on Fox News for the first time since I announced I was running to represent the great people of Alaska in the United States Congress. A lot of people are asking me why I decided to run. The simple answer is: I'm in it for the right reasons. I've got a public servant's heart, and I'm willing to serve the American people. I've been fighting for a better America my entire life, and I'm looking forward to proving why I am the best candidate, the only candidate, who can fight to put Alaska First every single day. Your support will be the difference between a winning and a losing campaign, Peter. Can I count on you to step up? Thank you, Sarah Palin Candidate for Congress for Alaska | Paid for by Sarah for Alaska. | P.O. BOX 871235 WASILLA, AK 99687 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

clean_body: | | | | The results are shocking. | Did you see the results, Peter? Trump-Backed candidate, Kelly Tshibaka, leads in Alaska’s U.S. Senate race. Her opponent, the Biden-Backed candidate, Liberal Lisa Murkowski, is trailing far behind! Tshibaka leads Murkowski by 17% on the first-choice ballot How great is that, Peter! Thanks to your support not only are we BEATING Murkowski in the polls, but Kelly carries 84% of the Republican vote. While this news is FANTASTIC, we cannot slow down. To maintain our 17% lead we need all hands on deck! This poll not only laid out how strong your support has been for Kelly Tshibaka, but it also found out that 87% of Alaska Republicans have a negative view of Liberal Lisa Murkowski. Thanks, Team Tshibaka STAY UP TO DATE WITH KELLY AND THE CAMPAIGN BY CLICKING THIS LINK: "ckq.io/yl3xzs" | | | | =

body:
* * *

[](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/?e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220418_e&n=1) | Hi Friend, Oregon is a mess right now. We need big, bold change and real leadership to get us back on track. But both political parties are doing what they always do...far-left Democrats promising four more years of failed Kate Brown policies...and inexperienced, far-right Republicans with no chance of ending the GOP’s 40 year losing streak in Oregon. More than ever, what we need is a common-sense independent leader to force the two parties to work together for the common good. I’m running to put the people back in charge. I know that Oregonians need more than a 30 second ad to hear from a candidate for governor. That’s why I’m the only candidate pointing Oregonians to my full campaign speech that outlines my priorities and how, as governor, I will bring the state together to put Oregon back on the right track. **WATCH AND SHARE MY FIRST TV ADS** [****](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/ads-apr?e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220418_e&n=2) We already have the entrenched partisan interests running scared. They truly fear state government serving its people ahead of their narrow interests. Help me fight back against their attacks, exaggerations and lies. Join the Betsy Brigade to help get me on the ballot and share these ads with your friends and family so they can hear directly from me. Remember, I won’t be on the May primary ballot, but you can sign up at www.runbetsyrun.com to help get me on the general election ballot in November. It’s not too late to save our state. Sincerely,
Betsy

name: Primary Sinema Project
subject: The most powerful tool Congressional Democrats have:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
And of course Sinema is standing in the way of its use. | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ps-em-wrapper?refcode=em-header&link_id=0&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-icymi-kyrsten-sinema-just-promised-shell-continue-to-block-bidens-agenda-2&email_referrer=email_1515550&email_subject=the-most-powerful-tool-congressional-democrats-have&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1515550)
Peter, here’s the situation: We’re on the precipice of a cutthroat midterm season where it looks like some major swing-state seats are at risk, Democrats’ approval ratings are tanking, and they *still* haven’t passed key elements of President Biden’s agenda. **Not by choice but because of...** [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ps-em-20220419?refcode=em20220419&link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-icymi-kyrsten-sinema-just-promised-shell-continue-to-block-bidens-agenda-2&email_referrer=email_1515550&email_subject=the-most-powerful-tool-congressional-democrats-have&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1515550) **...yep, you guessed it. All roads lead back to Kyrsten Sinema and her refusal to make corporations pay their fair share.** **_[Can you contribute $10 right now to help us build the necessary groundwork in Arizona to ensure that we can oust Sinema? It’s going to take all of us working together to beat her and her corporate backers.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ps-em-20220419?refcode=em20220419&link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-icymi-kyrsten-sinema-just-promised-shell-continue-to-block-bidens-agenda-2&email_referrer=email_1515550&email_subject=the-most-powerful-tool-congressional-democrats-have&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1515550)_** ** __** **** **[Contribute $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ps-em-20220419?refcode=em-20220419&link_id=3&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-icymi-kyrsten-sinema-just-promised-shell-continue-to-block-bidens-agenda-2&email_referrer=email_1515550&email_subject=the-most-powerful-tool-congressional-democrats-have&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1515550)** Congressional Democrats SHOULD be able to use the budget reconciliation process to pass critical and popular policy and make good on their promises to voters without worrying about a Republican filibuster. The original plan was to pass President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda — _and we all saw how well that went_. Kyrsten Sinema blocked Build Back Better once, and now she’s digging in her heels and she’s ready to block progress once again. **Let’s be clear:** Sinema is doing this because she thinks she can’t lose. She’s comfortable throwing her promises back in the face of her constituents because she thinks she can buy re-election with her millions in corporate donations. **We’re hard at work to make sure she’s in for a rude awakening.** It’s time for us to prove that Kyrsten Sinema may be able to be bought but Arizona can’t be. **_[Can you contribute $10 to help us fight back against Sinema and her corporations?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ps-em-20220419?refcode=em20220419&link_id=4&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-icymi-kyrsten-sinema-just-promised-shell-continue-to-block-bidens-agenda-2&email_referrer=email_1515550&email_subject=the-most-powerful-tool-congressional-democrats-have&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1515550)_** Thanks for being with us, The Primary Sinema Project

* * *

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: re: Roe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3350%2E3611125%2EsVQWXW ][IMG]

Folks—GOP extremists are launching attacks on reproductive
rights and women’s health care freedom all across the country in the most
direct assault on Roe v. Wade that I’ve seen during my time in office.

Senate Republicans blocked the Women’s Health Protection Act. And if they
take over the Senate, we know that more restrictive laws like this will be
on their way.

More than ever before, it’s clear that we have to keep and expand our
Democratic Senate majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10862?t=1014&amount=25&akid=3350%2E3611125%2EsVQWXW ]Our best chance to break Senate gridlock and protect reproductive
health care is by flipping Ohio blue and electing Tim. Will you donate to
his campaign so that we can get rid of the filibuster and protect the
right to choose?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10862?t=1015&amount=25&akid=3350%2E3611125%2EsVQWXW ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10862?t=1016&amount=50&akid=3350%2E3611125%2EsVQWXW ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10862?t=1017&amount=100&akid=3350%2E3611125%2EsVQWXW ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10862?t=1018&amount=200&akid=3350%2E3611125%2EsVQWXW ]Donate $200

Reproductive rights isn’t the only issue being held hostage by a 50/50
Senate:

Protecting voting rights.
Combating climate change.
Making health care affordable and accessible.
Increasing the minimum wage.

Every major issue that we as Democrats care about is currently at the
mercy of the Senate, but if we expand our Senate majority by electing Tim
Ryan in Ohio, we can finally change that.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10862?t=1021&amount=25&akid=3350%2E3611125%2EsVQWXW ]Will you join me in supporting Tim by making a $25 contribution to his
campaign? This is our best chance to protect and expand our Democratic
Senate majority and make real progress.

name: Tobias Read Endorsement Alert
subject: four weeks
body:
Yamhill County’s News-Register has picked Tobias as their choice to win the Democratic Primary.
---
| | Dear Peter,

**Team Read has won its first editorial board endorsement!** _Yamhill County’s News-Register_ has picked Tobias as their choice to win the Democratic Primary.

[**We have four weeks to go until the Primary. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANN ROE FOR CONGRESS Ann Roe for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44301107/340999887/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFmYjVjNC1mOWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BGpielPJ1dwUf2SyjWMK_XrbekH4UGoZcv-FYmW8EeM=&emci=30a7114a-46bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e5afb5c4-f9bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15639879)

Hi team,

It's been an exciting month. We're getting closer to the primaries and spending more time talking to voters, but we can't forget what the goal here is: **Flip WI-01 and get Bryan Steil out of office.**

Here's where you come in:

**[Bryan Steil has 1.5 million dollars in the bank from his corporate donors, but he is scared about losing this race. Can you contribute $5 today to help us close this fundraising gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44301108/340999888/2093580292?refcode=em22_220419_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFmYjVjNC1mOWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BGpielPJ1dwUf2SyjWMK_XrbekH4UGoZcv-FYmW8EeM=)**
****[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44301109/340999889/2093580292?refcode=em22_220419_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFmYjVjNC1mOWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BGpielPJ1dwUf2SyjWMK_XrbekH4UGoZcv-FYmW8EeM=) ****
* * *

**Events Roundup:**

**April 2nd, Team Roe went canvassing!**

Team Roe went out knocking on doors (in the snow, uphill, both ways) to get out the vote for all of the amazing candidates endorsed by the Rock County Democratic Party! Supporting Democrats in these local elections is so important because it means we have the opportunity to create change in districts all across Wisconsin.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44301110/340999890/2093580292?refcode=em22_220419_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFmYjVjNC1mOWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BGpielPJ1dwUf2SyjWMK_XrbekH4UGoZcv-FYmW8EeM=)
---

**April 7th, Ann spoke with UAW retirees in Kenosha**

Ann was invited to speak with UAW retirees in Kenosha to talk about the importance of fighting for workers and labor rights. Workers are the backbone of our economy, and it's important that we keep on supporting their fight for rights in the workplace.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44301111/340999891/2093580292?refcode=em22_220419_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFmYjVjNC1mOWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BGpielPJ1dwUf2SyjWMK_XrbekH4UGoZcv-FYmW8EeM=)
---

**April 10th, Chicago Fundraiser**

In Evanston, friends and supporters joined Ann to listen to her message about why she's running for Congress. Listening to supporters and hearing their stories makes this campaign successful. Thank you to everyone who came out and joined us.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44301112/340999892/2093580292?refcode=em22_220419_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFmYjVjNC1mOWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BGpielPJ1dwUf2SyjWMK_XrbekH4UGoZcv-FYmW8EeM=)
---

**April 14th, Walworth Dems event**

Ann was invited to speak to the Walworth Dems about what she plans to do for Wisconsin when she is elected into Congress. It was a wonderful opportunity to connect with voters and share more about her vision for change.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44301113/340999893/2093580292?refcode=em22_220419_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFmYjVjNC1mOWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BGpielPJ1dwUf2SyjWMK_XrbekH4UGoZcv-FYmW8EeM=)
---

**April 15th - April 17th, Team Roe's Weekend of Action!**

We kicked off signature collection around Wisconsin's 1st Congressional District this weekend. A huge **THANK YOU** to all the volunteers who came out in support of getting Ann on the ballot this November.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44301114/340999894/2093580292?refcode=em22_220419_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFmYjVjNC1mOWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BGpielPJ1dwUf2SyjWMK_XrbekH4UGoZcv-FYmW8EeM=)
---

* * *

**COMING UP:**

**Ann will be speaking at the WI-01 Congressional District Convention!**

We are excited to share that Ann will be speaking at the Wisconsin Democratic Party 1st District Convention on April 30. This will be the first in-person state convention since 2019 and it's an honor to join fellow active Dems.

We are here thanks to you, and we are grateful for all your continued support.

**[Running all of these events and voter outreach is SO exciting — but also expensive. So we need your help. Can you chip in $5 to help Team Roe get Ann's message out all across the district?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44301115/340999895/2093580292?refcode=em22_220419_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFmYjVjNC1mOWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BGpielPJ1dwUf2SyjWMK_XrbekH4UGoZcv-FYmW8EeM=)**

Thank you,

Team Roe
****[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44301116/340999896/2093580292?refcode=em22_220419_newsletter&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFmYjVjNC1mOWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BGpielPJ1dwUf2SyjWMK_XrbekH4UGoZcv-FYmW8EeM=) ****
****[DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44301117/340999897/2093580292?refcode=em22_220419_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFmYjVjNC1mOWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BGpielPJ1dwUf2SyjWMK_XrbekH4UGoZcv-FYmW8EeM=) ****

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/30a7114a-46bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/e5afb5c4-f9bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFmYjVjNC1mOWJmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BGpielPJ1dwUf2SyjWMK_XrbekH4UGoZcv-FYmW8EeM=&id=117463758). name: Team Olikara
subject: Help get Steven Olikara on the ballot!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Olikara for Senate
body:
Image of Olikara campaign logo with photo of Steven Olikara and link to campaign website:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/OfS%20logo%20w%20headshot.png]
[https://www.stevenolikara.com]

Dear Peter,

Dear Garrett,

We have done over 100 events across the state and garnered the support of public educators in Brown County, entrepreneurs in Milwaukee, and farmers in the Driftless. Now, we have the opportunity to get Steven on the ballot for the U.S. Senate!

Button that says: "I'M READY TO GATHER SIGNATURES"
reply to: contact@stevenolikara.com

Picture of Steven with a bullhorn in front of a UAW sign.
Steven addressing crowd at UAW rally for workers in Oshkosh

But we need your help. We have just over a month to gather the signatures necessary for Steven's name to appear on the primary ballot.

Please reply "YES" to this email if you can ask friends and family to sign nomination papers for Steven.

See you in the field!

- Team Olikara

This is a movement to build a more inclusive, honest, and kind form of politics, and we need your help to continue reaching more voters in Wisconsin.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Niki=20Conforti?=
subject: We Must Protect Our Children!
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/72715bd63772/conforti-for-congress-7060693?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Public schools today have stopped teaching our kids how to think - and are now teaching them what to think.

Social Emotional Learning (SEL), which is being taught in our schools today, is simply the method for teaching Critical Race Theory (CRT) to our children. It is masked under names such as _Leader in Me_ and _Wit and Wisdom,_ among others.

Are you wondering why our school systems, which were once among the top in the nation, are now struggling to reach average? It is because SEL focuses on teaching our kids a value system based in collectivism. They are taking away our children's innocence. They are taking away our children's individualism. They are teaching equity - not equality, which is very different. Equity emphasizes equal outcomes - everyone is the same. This is a Marxist theology that has now creeped into our school systems.

Sean Casten and Marie Newman have come out in defense of CRT being taught in our schools. Casten has gone so far as to say that opponents of CRT are just "right-wing fear mongers". Call me what you will, I expect our school systems to work with the best interest of the child in mind - not the government.

If you want your US Congressional Representative to stand up for our children and work to end the indoctrination of our kids - Vote Niki Conforti for Congress June 28th!
Please consider donating to the Conforti for Congress campaign. [Click here](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=49f7162c4a&e=25f4fa3311)
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---
| PS: Follow my campaign on [Facebook](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=40756288fd&e=25f4fa3311), [Twitter](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=00459238bf&e=25f4fa3311), and [Instagram](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=03c99c3f47&e=25f4fa3311)!

Sean Casten and Marie Newman have come out in defense of CRT being taught in our schools. Casten has gone so far as to say that opponents of CRT are just "right-wing fear mongers". Call me what you will, I expect our school systems to work with the best interest of the child in mind - not the government. If you want your US Congressional Representative to stand up for our children and work to end the indoctrination of our kids - Vote Niki Conforti for Congress June 28th! Please consider donating to the Conforti for Congress campaign. | Thank you, Niki Conforti Candidate Illinois 6th Congressional District | PS: Follow my campaign on , , and ! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Conforti for Congress, All rights reserved.

| | Friend,

**The Radical Left Democrats are pushing abortion on demand.**

The House recently passed a bill to legalize abortion throughout all nine months of pregnancy. This assault against the unborn is _evil_ and a _stain on our country._

When I am elected, I will fight each and every day to end the evil that is abortion.

David Curry

subject: Just a few seconds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Recent polls show that I am RAPIDLY closing the gap
| | |
---
Friend, I only have a few seconds, so I’ll make this quick.
I was born in Jacksonville, Florida just three years after the Supreme Court ended school segregation. Growing up in the South as a poor, Black female was challenging to say the least – but I was driven by faith and my parents' instructions to **_“Never tire of doing good.”_**
**And that’s why I’m running for Senate now – because I know there is so much good I can do for Florida’s working families.** Recent polls show that I am RAPIDLY closing the gap between Marco Rubio and me, but I can’t surge ahead without your help.
If I win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep our Senate majority. That's why the GOP has already poured MILLIONS into Florida to ensure it stays red, so please: [**Will you rush $5 or more to help me stay in this fight and defeat Rubio?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44309142/341040054/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2887-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2MzNDc0OC0xYmMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxp2mjeyhJ2IiehabZdJO28unKpYjb9lKCVBsj7kQYg=)

name: Marco Lopez
subject: personally reaching out, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor | Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
Arizona has become ground zero for the GOP's attacks on our freedom
| | |
---
Friend, from the new 15-week abortion ban to an assault on voting rights, Arizona has become ground zero for the GOP's attacks on our freedom. The only way we can be _sure_ to defeat these extremists is by electing a Democratic governor in November – and that's exactly what our movement is about.
I know we _can_ win this race, flip Arizona blue and finally end the era of failed GOP leadership led by extremists like our Trump-backed opponent, Kari Lake (R). **Arizona delivered Joe Biden the presidency and helped flip the Senate blue – but we _still_ have a Republican governor. This is the year to change that, but I need your help.**
**I asked my team to pull a list of our top supporters – those with the valuable insights we need to win this race – and you were at the top of the list, friend.** **Your input is absolutely critical to our strategy, and I need to hear directly from _you_. **
**[So please, will you take just 60 seconds now to complete our Campaign Strategy Survey? name: Ron Johnson
subject: DECISION MADE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, an
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znk8mr5qte3vmjsn7kpso99qavqohvpd17jl2ml0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onjm1h36tr7c5h72pb4epo72sbgchqj7dhim8qnaor66mp7csj1e5r7dctimpj3fduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdn6dj30tr0cpqm5cr1cuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1ob6c9h2bs)

| |
---
| | | Friend,

This is a longer email than usual but for the past months, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times, Washington Post, and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me.
And that is why I decided to run for re-election.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Friend. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. The Democrats even placed a $2M ad buy just moments after I announced my campaign for re-election.

And that's why I need your help.

_**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6ovj4id1hsm8bokmrqgevtod0vg0ccs787tmuag_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1ob6c9h2bs "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.")**_

Ron Johnson
---
| | | [Fight for Freedom](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z23t6itg0viq498n66ubr9fkq4r9mne4adn2rfu8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1ob6c9h2bs "Fight for Freedom")
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znd8ob32h911b2qmticads63rs98c5qg31p4p5lg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1ob6c9h2bs "RonJon Announcement")
---
| Friend, It’s Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvls7o2dsc87vghmots39kiu3lqe6ts2l75i7q38_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1ob6c9h2bs "Please click here to donate now")**
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2a1caqio8p3v4p8gi3jqsd7qid37h9rs65lvr58_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1ob6c9h2bs "SAVE THE SENATE")
---
| | Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc.
---
PO Box 1159
Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

#
Derek -
Every single Republican Senator, except one, voted against impeaching Donald Trump for threatening to withhold weapons Ukraine needed to defend itself from Russia unless they gave Trump dirt on Hunter Biden.
The American people need to know that.
They need to know that Republicans are frauds when they run ads saying Joe Biden and Democrats are soft on Russia.
VoteVets can tell that story better than any outside group.
VoteVets Advisor Alex Vindman can tell that story better than any person alive.

| | Friend,
_Have you heard the great news?_

**The last mask mandate standing has finally been lifted** - Biden and the CDC's unconstitutional mandate for public transportation was _struck down_ Monday afternoon. [_"A federal judge in Florida has voided the national mask mandate covering airplanes and other public transportation as exceeding the authority of U.S. health officials in the coronavirus pandemic."_](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=f03a5cc12b&e=edf8a4d16d)

Last month, we told you that [_21 Republican Attorneys General had filed suit against the Biden Administration_](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=90b3f209ea&e=edf8a4d16d) for their unlawful transportation mask mandate. They have never stopped fighting against Biden's federal overreach and tyrannical mandates - and now, their fight has paid off.

**This ruling is a victory for freedom-loving Americans.**

Biden and liberal bureaucrats pushing for permanent masking were dealt a major blow yesterday. Momentum is on our side - and with the midterm elections right around the corner - **Republican Attorneys General need your help to continue _winning_ the fight against Biden's overreach.**

Friend, can you celebrate this tremendous victory by [pitching in $10, $25, or $50](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=0ee1b81c21&e=edf8a4d16d) to back Republican Attorneys General defending the Constitution?

name: HER Time
subject: The money behind the anti-LGBTQ bills
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dCtwn7HAU7D5yrRNvEKOhNrzHfC3ns--PEvbPrkt9Lw=/-oiegNvTBPMNUO9tTL-ahbN9Luk2ItfCNF7u_il4nqc=)
Over the last four years, anti-LGBTQ groups have raised _insane_ amounts of money -- over $110 million, as estimated by the Southern Poverty Law Center. The legalization of same-sex marriage in 2016 kickstarted a massive fundraising effort by homophobic organizations, one that has only gotten stronger.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dCtwn7HAU7D5yrRNvEKOhNrzHfC3ns--PEvbPrkt9Lw=/SCpFI9euqCM5Nyxsn5Skbt5n7rPX0jJoGrNrow2BM9c=)
---
**Now, Republican lawmakers across the country are taking the opportunity to pass anti-LGBTQ bills, knowing they have the support of these organizations.**
We need Congress to stand up for our LGBTQ youth and their families by passing the Equality Act.
[**Help show Congress the broad public support behind the Equality Act by signing on to our petition now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/dCtwn7HAU7D5yrRNvEKOhNrzHfC3ns--PEvbPrkt9Lw=/h355pfjueiKD9s5Ps6KMCpyWdlKuCM21M-X9ZQgu4Vw=)

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: This shouldn’t be normal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
It should not be normal for a pediatrician to take care of kids who have been shot, but for doctors like me, it is.

| I’m at the hospital this week and already, I’ve seen too many patients—too many innocent children—suffering from gunshot wounds. **It should not be normal for a pediatrician to take care of kids who have been shot, but for doctors like me, it is.**

This past weekend, two mass shootings rocked South Carolina. It’s heartbreaking and enraging to see gun violence destroy families and harm our children while politicians like Nancy Mace continue to ignore this incredibly important issue.

[We need a leader who won’t be afraid to stand up for our future generations and public safety. If you agree, add your name to our petition before midnight tonight →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44302422/341006405/231651494?refcode=AA_EM_PT_3MO_220419_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=ckLjbf5nt9HiXPLeIr4RgYHQ7ggby77Xphj3Tv9fTPiXr7DQliOVPZnvE0yaSrTy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWRiMjY5MS1mY2JmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Iq0GRujQlMv3mTDmwiZMuDLgNkq6j0qu-ilzvJDDbc=&emci=ef05cc2b-e8bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=99db2691-fcbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6125529)

There’s no reason why we should live like this. No one should have to be afraid to go to a mall, church, school, or any public place because of a lack of common-sense gun legislation.

While our kids are in danger, Nancy Mace is flaunting her **NRA** endorsement. This is why we need to take action.

[Sign on today if you agree that we need representation who will fight to protect families and children from gun violence →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44302424/341006407/231651494?refcode=AA_EM_PT_3MO_220419_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=ckLjbf5nt9HiXPLeIr4RgYHQ7ggby77Xphj3Tv9fTPiXr7DQliOVPZnvE0yaSrTy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWRiMjY5MS1mY2JmLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Iq0GRujQlMv3mTDmwiZMuDLgNkq6j0qu-ilzvJDDbc=&emci=ef05cc2b-e8bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=99db2691-fcbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6125529)

body:

Friend, Rand Paul sent you a message. Did you see what he said?
_“When I first ran for the Senate in 2010, Club for Growth Action was instrumental in my election._**_Now, they’re working to elect the next generation of liberty lovers like me who won’t bow to Fauci or Biden, and we need to help them.”_** [**STAND WITH RAND >> CHIP IN**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zds4m014ig58bru0ti34jt63j6o7u0al70nf7l9g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1pr7clh2bs) Friend, Rand is working to FIRE FAUCI and fight for freedom in the Senate, but he needs your help.
With the Democrats controlling Congress, Rand desperately needs MORE relentless conservatives to join him in DC._[**You won’t let him down, will you?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsc3mqrncgbkvmq828fp068a69ucmqs46809jqbg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1pr7clh2bs)_ [**HELP US TAKE BACK THE SENATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1e5f061iivccflmd0lb68pgirigtocgm5ca3nr8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1pr7clh2bs) [**CHIP IN $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5j13jj29j570jjor54akrsevpolpg8vsvtquloo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1pr7clh2bs) [**CHIP IN $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfibd32gn9mj7q9f2qmr9p3fddvmseetq4a9r3m0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1pr7clh2bs) [**Chip in ANY AMOUNT today!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zai8ftucl3laeohq2f5epp7j5kusfb97kokcgcu0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1pr7clh2bs) Thanks, Jake Club for Growth Action

I am sick and tired of President Biden and Dr. Fauci’s mandates and blatant disregard for American freedom. That’s why I am working with Club for Growth Action to help lead the charge in FIRING FAUCI and taking back the Senate, **_but we can’t do it without your support_**. Club for Growth Action is working day and night to flip the Senate, and they’re really counting on pro-liberty Americans like us to help out. [** >> HELP TAKE BACK THE SENATE << **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8vgm2eefp18bebhp5k4bcscuaukdp8p35cjolrg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1pr7clh2bs) [**CHIP IN $100**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8s936661vagq53q8lgc26fvmr8df4snt68dqt90_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1pr7clh2bs) [**CHIP IN $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1o1ca00o8tmpo54dcaf643ilbtlf85j74efpvr8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1pr7clh2bs) [**CHIP IN $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjmqa30c61q338s95618r860pgbeac7vhl1ohf00_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1pr7clh2bs) [**CHIP IN $10**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvsdg514s0t97n21am7ebp1n8v0poh6nhid5ljdg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1pr7clh2bs) [**_CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh0h2iltdgked1ud64k98t70a1vffmcbf2uq5bn8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1pr7clh2bs) I told Club for Growth Action my supporters would not let them down. **[_You’ll stand with me, won’t you?_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlogstcufinrsaltppa0m4bf1dmeddfl8nbjndg0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1pr7clh2bs)** [**YES >> CHIP IN TODAY**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrl91kbq3pff2301d223n4h264bubvlf35dbh298_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1pr7clh2bs) In Liberty, [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdjrfd1qsvde648n9aogtqfrirm0idfqk4qs94f8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0cpie1pr7clh2bs) Rand Paul Club for Growth Action is an independent expenditure committee established by the Club for Growth. name: Erik Aadland
subject: Absolute power corrupts absolutely
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AADLAND for COLORADO
body:
The integrity of our elections starts with things like this.
Despite the efforts of the Obama lawyer turned Colorado Secretary of State to tip the scales against me, I still got back on the ballot thanks to the overwhelming support of our Republican Assembly.

If you don't know what I'm talking about, then I'll fill you in. Just a couple of weeks ago, I was the first candidate to turn in my petition signatures to get [**on the ballot for Congress in Colorado's 7th district.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e41520fcd1f243119f643197b6d25c4f&_e=YgGfsZa5URQvCCGqB210u8gT6P3zPynAf5jjRsA_Wqf6lTupICxZX269hntrXpfyOqDAZ4YG_xDye7_yP4r0A1Mr7jF_G0h_nogOJTGt_lVVd-HLXZCnz0JLzdEU2cb7IVPv_3DccwmnkgdEyXEC5d1K4lGgG_ZIQ4-aq8JLJ0voZ8H2K0vhXa7GraNCCfBbDW7zHOcbRQH138hZOr43zput30IHnGsNwK6qcQxLF5_0DAtpNLKoz8UPSmixOr5hOHaWtbMAUTbdiYrC8tCo2u1qgtMoNfO5T_SajL0AtB0E0TUIsMrrOykORTY9rN1FconGc2OjfN3xqaK3TGB2p2Aekp8_KAwkhbb8ahp_JATrXhJdUMpId10LPzlckL8MZiWb8uiPIVPQGi_tkn1FeYJ1Kulr4cgmdTSFeMU0iwZ9hmwf-tjjVOhVzjFaiD0r)

I turned in 2,000 signatures from registered Republican voters. The state requires 1,500 to get on the ballot. **Coincidently the Secretary of State invalidated over 25% of those signatures putting me just below that threshold.**

**Now I'll be the first to tell you I don't believe in coincidences, especially with the radical left gunning for me since the polls started listing me as the top candidate for this seat.**

Here's what I know for certain - the radical liberals in Washington know that this swing seat is a key part of Republicans winning back Congress, [**that's why we can't back down when they try to intimidate us.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e41520fcd1f243119f643197b6d25c4f&_e=YgGfsZa5URQvCCGqB210u8gT6P3zPynAf5jjRsA_Wqf6lTupICxZX269hntrXpfyOqDAZ4YG_xDye7_yP4r0A1Mr7jF_G0h_nogOJTGt_lVVd-HLXZCnz0JLzdEU2cb7IVPv_3DccwmnkgdEyXEC5d1K4lGgG_ZIQ4-aq8JLJ0voZ8H2K0vhXa7GraNCCfBbDW7zHOcbRQH138hZOr43zput30IHnGsNwK6qcQxLF59zfkOq-tL_ZYu-gD-sk6aQGHIqoeGD7CrI1V2hwmWeYBnFpChMhoeQhdF9LpaXdjE2sFXktAOBQo7vXwDcJ5XpEBoGxeiQsDVBKYsQ6_xArZhQWakBmC4PhFwkF0gJqMOWI3ZYu-AbbNjS6amWrXvKeyQyLqm_2D22R4bEc-AMPBP8O5ZhjgXZShI3bSHbLnq0bx5bDsuvcbMWt6dxwayg)

"Absolute power corrupts absolutely" and that is exactly what we're seeing with the one-party rule in Washington. [**It's time we put end to that with this election, and with your support we can make that happen.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e41520fcd1f243119f643197b6d25c4f&_e=YgGfsZa5URQvCCGqB210u8gT6P3zPynAf5jjRsA_Wqf6lTupICxZX269hntrXpfyOqDAZ4YG_xDye7_yP4r0A1Mr7jF_G0h_nogOJTGt_lVVd-HLXZCnz0JLzdEU2cb7IVPv_3DccwmnkgdEyXEC5d1K4lGgG_ZIQ4-aq8JLJ0voZ8H2K0vhXa7GraNCCfBbDW7zHOcbRQH138hZOr43zput30IHnGsNwK6qcQxLF5_IdMBCIJ_yvHh5oWTD90PviC6fCtkiVVvrRZJjCuf4RICbgcKC-lUdxmcHzDdChQllMIQP-R-TBnQNAVDFNXK0qAJ0XZGL9GC9YXoORxENkEgIid1HkZfd_MnuACRE09YkdhkEBmZ4AZyi7ey8K_ovrQi7Strsj8k6XnpXcAaazAQn9B6AaLV6Y7qXi8mDUO9b32aLNs9DQHoFE83wdDti)

Thank you for your time and help,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e41520fcd1f243119f643197b6d25c4f&_e=YgGfsZa5URQvCCGqB210u8gT6P3zPynAf5jjRsA_Wqf6lTupICxZX269hntrXpfyOqDAZ4YG_xDye7_yP4r0A1Mr7jF_G0h_nogOJTGt_lVVd-HLXZCnz0JLzdEU2cb7IVPv_3DccwmnkgdEyXEC5d1K4lGgG_ZIQ4-aq8JLJ0voZ8H2K0vhXa7GraNCCfBbDW7zHOcbRQH138hZOr43zput30IHnGsNwK6qcQxLF5_fXlWNoDakA4zoZmjwsU_9VL_OMGI4dvmVgErR973RF-XvNTcbfd0MkvnSx-5LO9rpnBJzGSau0XN-VB6lJ51qK3UNiz8LiHLqJAWPzxm2gA2j9L40_roSsNHORiDJc1eC6rzYyVqH4nrPSNq76F2chN24DKtbwzxDReMy1gIEDVHs91IsGVivvTneDrp19lvsjJhedFmukbe2LoVn9XG0)
**Erik Aadland**
Candidate for Congress (CO-7)

clean_body: Can you help? = Peter, Here in Northwest Georgia, you can probably guess which “news” channel most people get their information from. This means they often don’t hear all of the crazy stuff Marjorie Taylor Greene says or tweets on a daily basis. But when they do hear or see her comments like serving in the military is “throwing your life away,” they realize she’s unfit to serve this district any longer. People here may not believe CNN, but they’ll believe one of their own like Holly. That's why we have to get her in front of as many voters as possible, and we have to have the funds to get Marjorie’s own words on direct mail and in ads. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = Thank you for your support, Holly McCormack for Congress || || Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States ** | Paid for by Holly for Congress

name: Alex Walker
subject: My solution to the voting rights issue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9918?t=6&akid=1868%2E878179%2EhiS-cM) The 2020 election was the most secure election in American history.

And yet: Last year, 441 voter suppression bills were introduced in this country.

Let that sink in... The teams of lawyers. Thousands of pages. Countless hours of work.

_For what?_

And what was Lauren Boebert's response to the record-breaking turnout in 2020?

**She said the election was stolen and voted to overturn the results!**

When rioters stormed the Capitol, destroyed her colleagues' offices, chanted death threats and flew a Confederate Flag through the halls of Congress, and left five people dead - Boebert cheered them on.

Still to this day, Boebert falls in line with the right-wing extremists who want to strip away our right to vote, the most fundamental right to ensuring that we have a democracy in this country.

Well, I'm not falling in line.

**We don 't need 441 bills to keep people from voting. If we want to keep our elections safe, secure, and sane... here's how we do it:**

**-> Protect mail-in ballots and early voting** to cut down on long lines at the polls and make it easier for people of all ages to vote

**-> Give workers Election Day off** so everyone - not just those who can afford it - can be heard

**-> Invest in smart technology** that makes our elections more secure, efficient, and transparent

**-> Regulate Big Tech** to stop them from spreading disinformation that erodes the integrity of our elections

When it comes to voting rights: Let's stop with the conspiracies, the violence, and the B.S. [**If you want to protect our right to vote, will you please split a donation between my team and Voter Protection Project today? It 's going to take a massive grassroots effort to defeat Lauren Boebert, so anything you can give is a huge help.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9918?t=7&akid=1868%2E878179%2EhiS-cM) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9919?t=8&akid=1868%2E878179%2EhiS-cM)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9920?t=9&akid=1868%2E878179%2EhiS-cM)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9921?t=10&akid=1868%2E878179%2EhiS-cM)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9922?t=11&akid=1868%2E878179%2EhiS-cM)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9923?t=12&akid=1868%2E878179%2EhiS-cM)
Thank you,

Alex
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1868%2E878179%2EhiS-cM). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1868%2E878179%2EhiS-cM).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1868%2E878179%2EhiS-cM) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=1868%2E878179%2EhiS-cM). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1868%2E878179%2EhiS-cM)

body:
I can feel it. Can you?

| Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, It’s me: Chairman Michael Whatley. I’m working alongside party leaders from across the country every single day to lay the groundwork for a historic victory in 2022. _Everyone I’ve spoken to has been so impressed by what our movement has been able to achieve in North Carolina. And every time they ask, I tell them it’s all thanks to you._ Because of you, we were able to secure North Carolina’s Electoral College votes for President Trump, re-elect Senator Thom Tillis, and secure loads of other HUGE WINS up and down the ballot for Trump-Endorsed Republicans. **[I know that with you by my side we’re going to win back the House and the Senate in 2022.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9rDFIRCTiNIn7kFG5En6vZBg04MCJ3hgDIat8ZsIm0EpT0JJzWf0NMFFUvEPTd2LfWhdUG4xBadEYcnIWiCB_kjbvs-H30-xqu6MizcJXkIp4U0nYOL-xz1QJl8D_BmAVvw_F_700NdYj68aPPpFdXue23JJE7bzbA_urH0uCYH3kasoettXPMQiuX4mKliUxGbpjI67ynAyrXwZxVVnxuzOL5vr_4hyQZ0m3eDcF6hw4OEszgLHw8M1mhdojrgtXrkgZz9FG9rfHm8JFl30UTSAJQLOww5zY4y0uB_2_ZTnu0G3N35H-2jVtWYPH9DuVUeD9IcMrir67J6t0EYenC-TAfKrkAYVY6iO_udxCQ1Y&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=830399845604959647&n=1)** **[I know I ask a lot, but that’s because it matters a lot. Based on everything you’ve done for our movement so far, I _know_ that I can count on you to step up and give $5 today, Peter.

From working to make health care more affordable and accessible to improving our public education system, they’re focused on finding real solutions to make North Carolina a better place for everyone. Unfortunately, not all our elected officials are people we can be proud of. = Lieutenant Governor Mark Robinson (R) is a disgrace to North Carolina. ❌ He has denigrated LGBTQ+ people as “filth.” ❌ He disparages our public schools. ❌ He believes that when a woman becomes pregnant, her body is no longer hers to control. ❌ He berated a state senator who spoke up for respect for all people after his hateful anti-LGBTQ+ statements came to light. ❌ Before he was elected, Robinson seemed to believe that the COVID-19 pandemic was a “globalist” conspiracy designed to take down Donald Trump. ❌ And one more thing — last year, Robinson said that any politician who encourages people to take a COVID-19 vaccine “should be voted out of office.” Peter, Roy is hard at work supporting Democratic candidates who share our values and will help move North Carolina forward — not take us back. name: Josh Lafazan
subject: Enough is enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44303137/341010105/1524799354?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmQzODcxNi0wMWMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7I6O8ef5duIlJ1_VvWonkIb-eO_mE6vM_3NT40RrPIQ=&emci=15ea0c0a-fbbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=9fd38716-01c0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=17773801)
---

| | Peter, This past holiday weekend there were 10 mass shootings that occurred throughout the US. These shootings happened following the horrific mass shooting in Brooklyn we witnessed last week that terrorized New Yorkers. **Since the start of 2022:**
* **12,000 people have died from gun violence.**
* **There have been more than 100 mass shootings.**
* **More than 400 children have been killed by guns.**

So many of those shootings could have been prevented if we had nationwide, common-sense gun laws. Politicians have repeated this rhetoric for years, but still no consequential action has been taken nationwide. New York has the SAFE Act, which includes several gun laws that should be adopted nationwide. The chief provisions include:
* Universal background checks.
* Broader definition of what constitutes an assault rifle.
* Gun owners must keep their firearms in a safe when not in use.

Public safety ought to be every elected official's top priority. But too many members of Congress are in the pocket of the NRA and refuse to take action. Gun safety advocates are routinely outspent by tens of millions, which prevents leaders from advancing common-sense reforms. It's a vicious cycle that's resulted in record numbers of gun deaths. My generation has grown up with gun violence and mass shootings that began with the massacre at Columbine High School. It should have ended there. But the problem has worsened. Tens of thousands of people die each year from gun violence. The current course does not work. **It's time we take Congress back from gun lobbyists and take our streets back from dangerous guns.** More to come, _Josh_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info
