clean_body: | | | Peter, This past holiday weekend there were 10 mass shootings that occurred throughout the US. These shootings happened following the horrific mass shooting in Brooklyn we witnessed last week that terrorized New Yorkers. Since the start of 2022: 12,000 people have died from gun violence. There have been more than 100 mass shootings. More than 400 children have been killed by guns. So many of those shootings could have been prevented if we had nationwide, common-sense gun laws. Politicians have repeated this rhetoric for years, but still no consequential action has been taken nationwide. New York has the SAFE Act, which includes several gun laws that should be adopted nationwide. The chief provisions include: Universal background checks. Broader definition of what constitutes an assault rifle. Gun owners must keep their firearms in a safe when not in use. Public safety ought to be every elected official's top priority. But too many members of Congress are in the pocket of the NRA and refuse to take action. Gun safety advocates are routinely outspent by tens of millions, which prevents leaders from advancing common-sense reforms. It's a vicious cycle that's resulted in record numbers of gun deaths. My generation has grown up with gun violence and mass shootings that began with the massacre at Columbine High School. It should have ended there. But the problem has worsened. Tens of thousands of people die each year from gun violence. The current course does not work. It's time we take Congress back from gun lobbyists and take our streets back from dangerous guns. More to come, Josh Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by Lafazan for Congress P.O. body:

name: Team Sullivan Highlights
subject: reasons to celebrate 🎉

body:
we are celebrating our LAST Tax Day with J.B. Pritzker| | |
---
Team, We are celebrating Easter this week — and we’re also celebrating our LAST Tax Day with J.B. Pritzker. Read on to see what our campaign has been focusing on this past week. 💸 **WAS THIS OUR LAST TAX DAY WITH J.B. PRITZKER?**
For the past three and a half years, Illinois families have seen their taxes go up again and again under Governor J.B. Pritzker, to the point where we currently suffer from the highest combined state and local taxes in the nation. **This November, Illinois will have a chance to make yesterday our LAST tax day under tax-and-spend J.B. Pritzker.**

Jesse Sullivan, outsider candidate for governor, is the only candidate who has signed the Taxpayer Protection Pledge — a promise to “oppose and veto any and all efforts to increase taxes.”

clean_body: we are celebrating our LAST Tax Day with J.B. Pritzker| | | Team, We are celebrating Easter this week — and we’re also celebrating our LAST Tax Day with J.B. Pritzker. Read on to see what our campaign has been focusing on this past week. 💸 WAS THIS OUR LAST TAX DAY WITH J.B. PRITZKER? For the past three and a half years, Illinois families have seen their taxes go up again and again under Governor J.B. Pritzker, to the point where we currently suffer from the highest combined state and local taxes in the nation. This November, Illinois will have a chance to make yesterday our LAST tax day under tax-and-spend J.B. Pritzker. Jesse Sullivan, outsider candidate for governor, is the only candidate who has signed the Taxpayer Protection Pledge — a promise to “oppose and veto any and all efforts to increase taxes.” ❌ FACT CHECK: J.B. PRITZKER’S LATEST CAMPAIGN AD Our campaign took to Twitter to correct the record on J.B. Pritzker’s latest campaign ad. We found a whopping FIVE claims in just 30 seconds that needed correction! 🚔 WATCH: “BACKED BY THE BLUE” ENDORSEMENTS More than 20 sheriffs, state’s attorneys and law-enforcement leaders around Illinois are backing Jesse Sullivan and his . Here are just a few we're proud to have behind us: “I support Jesse Sullivan because I know he will do the right thing.” - "I support Jesse Sullivan because of his safe streets plan." - "I support Jesse Sullivan because he has taken the time to come to the police and ask us what we need and what we can do to make public safety better." - 🐣 EASTER WITH THE SULLIVANS This Easter season, let us find hope in the resurrection of Jesus. Some want to remove God from our politics; we need to bring God back in. We are engaged in a great spiritual battle — corruption, immorality, and evil abound in Illinois politics. Thank you for joining us in this fight to bring Christian values back into our politics in order to save this home we love. 📊 ILLINOIS FACT OF THE WEEK One person moves out of Illinois every 4 minutes and 18 seconds. 🙏🏻 STRENGTH IN FAITH CHALLENGE** Thank you to all who prayed with us throughout these 40 days. All of us praying together is a powerful force for good, indeed. In this season of hope, let us continue our work together to Save Illinois. \- Team Sullivan | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

| | |
# [Sign the petition: Demand Big Food and Soda disclose its global political activities and spending >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9cf0c1d3-194c-4223-9498-819cc9ed0630/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1978e6f-b2d6-4032-bc98-6fb3a9d74f27/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Big Food and Soda have a huge sway over everything from what children eat at school to whether essential workers get paid sick leave – and more. Massive corporations like Coca-Cola, McDonald’s, and PepsiCo spend untold millions on electing and lobbying public officials, and on science, charity, and trade groups to influence policy and the politics of food – often misleading us about how unhealthy their products are. But here’s the thing: we don’t know how much these corporations are spending, because across vast regions around the world they don’t disclose that information. That’s why we’re calling on the world’s largest food and beverage corporations to open their books on their global political spending and activities. These corporations should level with the shareholders and the public about their activities. Having to do so will make these corporations think twice about bankrolling public officials that are attacking voting rights, abortion rights, labor rights, public health, climate action, and more. Sign the petition: [Demand Big Food and Soda disclose what they do and spend to influence elections, public opinion, politics, and public policy >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T515ee233-3bf9-4a38-bf31-befe3fb41c1b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

[Folks, Speaker Nancy Pelosi is absolutely right.

**If you look at _history_ , Democrats’ prospects in the upcoming November elections look grim.** The president’s party loses an average of 26 seats in the midterm elections — but right now, we only control the House Majority by 7 seats.

**But if you look to the _future_ , it’s clear the stakes in this election are too high for us to fight with anything less than all we’ve got.** With a horde of MAGA extremists, QAnoners, and literal January 6 insurrectionists running for office, it’s clear that a GOP takeover of the House would be a disaster. | | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00103yAlEyH6SxrPyoJCLWPtFOCtHJtzR1UZyNeSNQ9lngpFZ0lnWYWmJIFlcdWK-Z8YjQDMAILynnQGOGwSdPQ1QyF_T8wOG_jU4FtzXQYg-HyaEJzB2kzdkiCME1BsNnDUdqCpgxHeByPcAO-7vNVTg==&c=DdwaqYoUI9vIqecxZLwd37gl1hUg8qaLlMjBUM0ymPckzOdwsimKHQ==&ch=rN78_G11Ays_CQWPgW5Bu5HOx1FP4JFCt8LckF8x915BhA8wwfbMgA==)

| Peter, The Dolan for Ohio "No Nonsense" Statewide Tour kicks off tomorrow, April 19 through Saturday, April 23 covering 20 cities in 5 days. Joe Biden's failed policies have America bouncing from one crisis to another. While Matt's opponents attack and name call Matt continues to be the only candidate in the Republican Primary offering real solutions. And that's because none of them have a record of results. So...enough of their NONSENSE. Matt Dolan is taking his record of conservative results on the road to cities and small towns across Ohio. Join Matt for "NO NONSENSE" and real solutions that strengthen Ohio and get America back on the right track. subject: re: A MAJOR win for the U.S. Postal Service!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Add your name before midnight >>
| | | **URGENT: President Biden recently SIGNED major legislation to save the Postal Service!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6583?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220419-SigntheCard-BidenUSPSThankYou-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220419-SigntheCard-BidenUSPSThankYou-Pros-sl1&akid=3854%2E9716520%2EjRmQok) | **From:[_dpwillis67@gmail.com_](https://go.dscc.org/go/6583?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220419-SigntheCard-BidenUSPSThankYou-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220419-SigntheCard-BidenUSPSThankYou-Pros-sl1&akid=3854%2E9716520%2EjRmQok)**
---
**To:_President Joe Biden_**
**Signature:_Not Received_**

| [SIGN THE CARD](https://go.dscc.org/go/6583?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220419-SigntheCard-BidenUSPSThankYou-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220419-SigntheCard-BidenUSPSThankYou-Pros-sl1&akid=3854%2E9716520%2EjRmQok)
---

Democrats and President Biden won a HUGE victory for the USPS and all Americans who rely on their local post office.

The Postal Service Reform Act will stabilize USPS finances, block service cuts, assist postal workers, and more -- **helping undo YEARS of partisan Republican sabotage against the U.S. Postal Service.**

To thank President Biden for his leadership and commitment to this fight, we're asking 10,000 Democrats in Pennsylvania to sign our thank you card!

[**Your signature is missing, so please add your name right away -- click here to sign the thank you card >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/6583?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220419-SigntheCard-BidenUSPSThankYou-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220419-SigntheCard-BidenUSPSThankYou-Pros-sl1&akid=3854%2E9716520%2EjRmQok)

Thank you,

Team DSCC

| Peter,
This is about you.
Bickering, finger-pointing, and personal attacks. **That's what my opponents are spending millions of dollars on.** Instead of representing conservatives in Pennsylvania, they're spending every second and every cent they have trying to destroy each other.
**_In short, they're not trying to fight for you, they're fighting for themselves. _**
With Joe Biden and the Democrats driving up inflation, opening the border, and blundering abroad, we don't need any more childish antics from our Republican candidates, **we need an adult in the room who will fight for YOU.**
That's why I'm running, and I need your help.
Share our new ad and sign up to knock doors, make phone calls, or work the polls for us on election day. **Let's make this race about We the People. **

body:
It’s no coincidence that most have a few things in common. | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kc-email-wrapper?refcode=em-header&link_id=0&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-help-us-hit-100-thousand-calls-3&email_referrer=email_1515665&email_subject=what-kind-of-congressman-do-you-have&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1515665) **Quiz - What Kind of Congressman Do You Have?** Answer yes or no:
1\. My congressman has no problem accepting donations from any source.
2\. My congressman is part of a network of established party bosses who have held power for decades.
3\. My congressman has a team of millionaire donors backing his campaign.

**If you answered yes to at least 2 of these, you have a classic establishment Congressman.** Team, we are trying to change the rules. Kina Collins is a working class leader from a union family. She is rejecting all corporate PAC money because she wants everyone to know who she represents, and she has spent years on the ground fighting shoulder to shoulder with the people of her district. **Kina is not a party boss, she’s a peoples’ advocate, and that is the kind of leader we need in Congress.** [**We are going to need everyone’s help to overcome the gate-keepers of establishment politics. Can you donate today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em20220419-kc?link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-help-us-hit-100-thousand-calls-3&email_referrer=email_1515665&email_subject=what-kind-of-congressman-do-you-have&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1515665) [Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em20220419-kc?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-help-us-hit-100-thousand-calls-3&email_referrer=email_1515665&email_subject=what-kind-of-congressman-do-you-have&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1515665) Our campaign has already received more than 8,000 individual donations, but that’s not going to be enough. By election day, we are going to need to have received at least 12,000 individual donations. 60 donations of $3, $15, or $50 every day till June 28. [**Can you chip in $15 right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em20220419-kc?link_id=3&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-help-us-hit-100-thousand-calls-3&email_referrer=email_1515665&email_subject=what-kind-of-congressman-do-you-have&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1515665) Thank you,

name: Joe Cunningham
subject: addressing the teacher shortage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina
body:
| For far too long, the state legislature and governor have failed our teachers. Now, the SC Senate plans to put teacher’s starting pay at less than $40,000 a year—an embarrassingly low increase that won’t do anything to fix the mass exodus of teachers from our public schools.

**That’s why last weekend, I held a roundtable for teachers in Charleston. A lot of politicians talk AT our teachers, but rarely do they actually LISTEN to them.**

Teachers are essential to giving our kids the tools they need to succeed. So why are our leaders in Columbia saying they don’t have money to fix the teacher shortage while they’re pushing to lower income taxes for the wealthiest South Carolinians?

1 in 7 teachers have left recently, which is putting our kids further and further behind where they need to be.

**[I need you to sign my petition today to stand up for teachers in S.C. as our leaders in Columbia continue to ignore their needs.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44312495/341055290/-1081398236?source=JC_EM_PT_6MO_220419_1_1&utm_source=jc_em_pt_6mo_220419_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGY3MjVjNy0yYWMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goMzWfO4qnj8y_4HoJUbMRkV4ws5oS2uW2RlZkMcRTE=&emci=13f725c7-2ac0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=18f725c7-2ac0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18275523)**
[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44312496/341055291/-1081398236?source=JC_EM_PT_6MO_220419_1_1&utm_source=jc_em_pt_6mo_220419_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGY3MjVjNy0yYWMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goMzWfO4qnj8y_4HoJUbMRkV4ws5oS2uW2RlZkMcRTE=&emci=13f725c7-2ac0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=18f725c7-2ac0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18275523)
I released my plan to combat the teacher shortage a while back. From further training to more support and higher pay, there’s a lot that I plan to do as soon as I’m in the governor’s mansion.

clean_body: | For far too long, the state legislature and governor have failed our teachers. Now, the SC Senate plans to put teacher’s starting pay at less than $40,000 a year—an embarrassingly low increase that won’t do anything to fix the mass exodus of teachers from our public schools. That’s why last weekend, I held a roundtable for teachers in Charleston. A lot of politicians talk AT our teachers, but rarely do they actually LISTEN to them. Teachers are essential to giving our kids the tools they need to succeed. So why are our leaders in Columbia saying they don’t have money to fix the teacher shortage while they’re pushing to lower income taxes for the wealthiest South Carolinians? 1 in 7 teachers have left recently, which is putting our kids further and further behind where they need to be. I released my plan to combat the teacher shortage a while back. From further training to more support and higher pay, there’s a lot that I plan to do as soon as I’m in the governor’s mansion. Help is on the way, but we need to keep the pressure up in the meantime. Please sign my petition today→ Thanks, Joe | = | | If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from our team, Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina Joe Cunningham PO Box 21012 Charleston, SC 29413 United States **

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Finchem fights back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
I'm not taking it lying down |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7b37728d4b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
Did you catch me on Steve Bannon’s War Room?
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=be5eaf3eeb&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| I was on The War Room discussing recent attacks to _keep me off the ballot!_

This started with a failed attempted recall 6 months ago. In a predominantly Democrat county, Pima County, they couldn’t get the signatures to do it! Failure number 1.

Now, the same people filed a similar petition in Maricopa, to try and get me removed from the ballot based off of news articles – wildly hyperbolic news articles!

**We just had a pre-trial hearing and now we understand that there will be a ruling on whether or not to dismiss the case on April 20 th.**

**_They are after Arizona Patriots – Paul Gosar is under fire too!_**

Here’s what they are trying to do. This won’t work. They won’t get me off the ballot.

**What this does is drain time and resources. When we need to be going on the offense!**

A recent poll showed that in the Secretary of State Race that I am winning in the polls, but there are still about 70% undecided voters.

**And we need to be spending our time reaching and educating these voters, not fighting off hyperbolic, phony attacks!**

[This is where I need your help. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=93f9328df6&e=44b8c466b0) I am fighting to remain on the ballot (a fight we should win), and we need to go on the attack and not let the Leftist Liars keep me down.

_This is why we will be launching an aggressive advertising campaign to specifically target the 70% of undecided voters in Arizona._

**Now, I know that you know what I believe and you understand that I am the ONLY America First Election-Integrity candidate in the race – now we need to get the rest of Arizona on board!**

[_Please help me take the offense today with a generous donation. We need to take the offense and show the Lying Leftists they can’t slow down our campaign!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=32eb0693b7&e=44b8c466b0)

_[Can you chip in $25, $50, $100, or $250 or more today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4fb4a7fbc1&e=44b8c466b0)_
Thank you for your support!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e977306ff7&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of State15508 W Bell Rd.STE 101-423Surprise, AZ 85374
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=607db97cc6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=607db97cc6).

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: Let’s go clamming!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
Your invite is below | | [ ](https://www.brenthennrich.com/?link_id=0&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-headed-in-the-right-direction-3&email_referrer=email_1515901&email_subject=lets-go-clamming)
---
Hey there, Peter. My birthdays have taken a back seat to those of my kids (and my wife) in recent years. If you're a parent, too, you can probably relate. But this year we _are_ doing something special, and I hope you can join us.
---
|
---
**Save the date: Thursday, April 21st at 10 am!**

**We 'll meet at the Cranberry Road Beach Access Point in Long Beach. Make sure to bring your own clamming tools. Also, be sure you have your Clamming License before you arrive. **

As things open up across the state, I'm amped to finally start hosting in-person events. RSVP for the Birthday Clam Dig at this link: **[https://fb.me/e/4zuFQfqeT](https://fb.me/e/4zuFQfqeT?link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-headed-in-the-right-direction-3&email_referrer=email_1515901&email_subject=lets-go-clamming)**

Hope to see you Thursday!

My finance team would not be happy if I didn't mention our budget. So here goes.

If you've kept up with my most recent messages, you know the campaign has been _really low_ on our April fundraising goal - far below where we need to be to hold our lead against two dangerous GOP opponents.

We're inching our way up and now about 16% of the way there --still a long way to go to catch up with less than half the month to go.

If you're able, I'm asking you to please pitch in so I can maintain my lead in this race with a contribution today. Here's a link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brent-hennrich-for-washington](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brent-hennrich-for-washington-c2g?refcode=20220419_birthday_clam_link&link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-headed-in-the-right-direction-3&email_referrer=email_1515901&email_subject=lets-go-clamming&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1515901)

** Thanks again for all your support, and I hope to see you Thursday!

-BH

\-- Brent Hennrich Candidate for U.S. Congress, WA-03
---
[ **Contribute now** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brent-hennrich-for-washington-c2g?refcode=20220419_birthday_clam_button&link_id=4&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-headed-in-the-right-direction-3&email_referrer=email_1515901&email_subject=lets-go-clamming&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1515901)

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: I’d love to hear from you! [SURVEY]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Will you take a moment to tell me your biggest concerns?
Peter --

As we inch closer to the midterm elections, we continue to battle the economic fallout from the COVID-19 pandemic, pushback against Russia's war on Ukraine, and face an influx of dangerous attacks on reproductive freedom and voting rights at the state level.

At the same time, we've made strides toward an economy that works for everyone with the RECOMPETE Act. We passed the greatest investment in American infrastructure in a generation. And we witnessed the first Black woman, Ketanji Brown Jackson, be confirmed to the United States Supreme Court.

**Progress is possible, but it 's never easy.**

I don't plan on slowing down the progress we're making any time soon, and it's important I hear directly from you.

**[Now that we're six months away from the midterm elections, there is still much work to be done. Will you take a moment to share with me some of your biggest priorities?](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZaxgSeeq_eX6DDKY85KBeedPDcacGYLfJ3aU6q9TP4w=/zSVTKhkcKmVPjhGU154CxCDruNF5ZDcnmnjqvOIltu8=?ms=em22_220419_sprng1_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&refcode=em22_220419_sprng1_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&source=em22_220419_sprng1_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220419_sprng1_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZaxgSeeq_eX6DDKY85KBeedPDcacGYLfJ3aU6q9TP4w=/zSVTKhkcKmVPjhGU154CxCDruNF5ZDcnmnjqvOIltu8=?ms=em22_220419_sprng1_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&refcode=em22_220419_sprng1_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&source=em22_220419_sprng1_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220419_sprng1_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})
I'm working to make Congress work for the people and make progress on the issues that matter to you. Your response to this survey will help me craft the best strategy to continue our work so that we can keep up our momentum in 2022.

**[Please take just one minute to fill out my quick spring survey to tell me your priorities. Hearing from you directly gives me the tools and knowledge I need to best represent you in Congress.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZaxgSeeq_eX6DDKY85KBeedPDcacGYLfJ3aU6q9TP4w=/zSVTKhkcKmVPjhGU154CxCDruNF5ZDcnmnjqvOIltu8=?ms=em22_220419_sprng1_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&refcode=em22_220419_sprng1_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&source=em22_220419_sprng1_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220419_sprng1_esrv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

As always, it's an honor to serve you,

Derek Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

Peter -- As we inch closer to the midterm elections, we continue to battle the economic fallout from the COVID-19 pandemic, pushback against Russia's war on Ukraine, and face an influx of dangerous attacks on reproductive freedom and voting rights at the state level. At the same time, we've made strides toward an economy that works for everyone with the RECOMPETE Act. We passed the greatest investment in American infrastructure in a generation. And we witnessed the first Black woman, Ketanji Brown Jackson, be confirmed to the United States Supreme Court. Progress is possible, but it 's never easy. I don't plan on slowing down the progress we're making any time soon, and it's important I hear directly from you. ={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}} ={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}} I'm working to make Congress work for the people and make progress on the issues that matter to you. Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. name: =?utf-8?Q?Emily=20Beach?=
subject: More “walk the walk”, less “talk the talk”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Beach for Congress
body:
#ClimateAction | | | | [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=15186469fd&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Climate change threatens our way of life all around the world. Our own Peninsula is facing drought, rising sea levels, and the threat of wildfires.

**Climate Action is my #1 priority in this Congressional race, because if we don’t take significant action now our children and grandchildren won’t have a livable planet.**

But I have hope– and a clear vision for our future! We must take action in big and small ways to heal mother earth.

[**Will you join us today? Sign up to help take our message about Climate Action out to voters before they begin voting in early May.**](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=746e695b3e&e=de8b2615ea)

It’s one thing to “talk the talk” about climate action, but it’s more important to “walk the walk.” Even small choices we make have a profound impact. Our four-person family had one car for nearly 15 years, so we carpooled more and learned different travel habits. I bike throughout Burlingame for meetings at City Hall or around town, and use Caltrain and SamTrans buses frequently. My husband and teenagers ride bikes, Caltrain, buses, and shuttles for their daily commutes. Like many of you, we’ve installed solar panels, reduced landscaping water needs, and transitioned to ESG investments.
---
| [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=01ee99db49&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| In my role as Councilmember, Mayor, and former Chairperson of our county’s Transportation Authority, I’ve helped make big things happen, too. I’ve championed pedestrian and bicycle safety improvements, public transit, sustainable building codes, electric charging stations, green infrastructure, Bayfront open space, and the region’s first-ever sea level rise zoning codes. I advocated on a state-wide environmental policy committee for local recycling and green waste resources, and producer responsibility. Last year, I served on a federal infrastructure advocacy committee to amplify the need for more sustainable transportation investments in the Bay Area.

In Congress, I will build on the environmental work I’ve done locally and regionally. I’ll help build a coalition to pass a Green New Deal that will protect our planet, reduce our dependence on fossil fuels, and create new high-paying jobs.

[**But I need your help today to ensure an authentic climate champion like me gets to Congress, so I can fight for the future of our planet. Sign up to volunteer now, there’s no time to waste!**](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=746f481170&e=de8b2615ea)

I am committed to a progressive environmental agenda that accelerates our transition to clean energy and creates a cleaner, stronger America – because everyone deserves to live in a safe and healthy environment.
---
| Onward,

Emily Beach
---
| P.S. Voters receive their ballots in early May, so we need your help now to reach as many voters as possible. If you haven’t already donated, can you please chip in [$50, $150, or $250 today](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=ba6fd4610b&e=de8b2615ea) so that more people see our [tv ads](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=ad0438f36a&e=de8b2615ea) in the critical weeks ahead?
---
| [Donate](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=0aa58eb6c8&e=de8b2615ea "Donate")
---

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: People yell “Chips!” at me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220419&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220419&amount=28]
Team,
There are a few key issues you can always count on Michiganders to bring up in conversation: the roads, protecting our beautiful natural resources, the roads again... But the last few years have brought another issue front and center: microchips.
America’s supply chain used to be a pretty niche issue, left to the logistics professionals. But, it’s something I’ve become obsessed with since the early days of the pandemic, when I found myself on the phone haggling with a Chinese businessman in the middle of the night for a seven-cent mask. Supply chains are something the people in my district have come to fundamentally understand.
I don’t have to give you a history lesson on Michigan’s long-standing connection to the auto industry. We quite literally put the world on wheels. So, when something prevents auto-makers from operating, everyone in this state is eventually bound to feel it.
And the microchip shortage has hit our auto industry hard. The GM plants in and around my district were shut down for the better part of a year, all because they couldn’t get a fourteen-cent microchip to power things like airbags and breaks.
I've started to notice that folks in my district are just as plugged into this issue as I am, because the microchip shortage *always* comes up at campaign events. Audience members literally shout “chips!” during speeches, and finish my sentences when I start getting into the finer supply chain details in one-on-one conversations.
It’s a lesson in how something seemingly abstract can quickly turn into a kitchen table discussion – and on just how important it is for elected officials to be accessible to the people they serve. These types of conversations fuel my work. Thanks in advance for your help as I continue to work on this critical issue.

clean_body: Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220419&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220419&amount=28] Team, There are a few key issues you can always count on Michiganders to bring up in conversation: the roads, protecting our beautiful natural resources, the roads again... But the last few years have brought another issue front and center: microchips. America’s supply chain used to be a pretty niche issue, left to the logistics professionals. But, it’s something I’ve become obsessed with since the early days of the pandemic, when I found myself on the phone haggling with a Chinese businessman in the middle of the night for a seven-cent mask. Supply chains are something the people in my district have come to fundamentally understand. I don’t have to give you a history lesson on Michigan’s long-standing connection to the auto industry. We quite literally put the world on wheels. So, when something prevents auto-makers from operating, everyone in this state is eventually bound to feel it. And the microchip shortage has hit our auto industry hard. The GM plants in and around my district were shut down for the better part of a year, all because they couldn’t get a fourteen-cent microchip to power things like airbags and breaks. I've started to notice that folks in my district are just as plugged into this issue as I am, because the microchip shortage always comes up at campaign events. Audience members literally shout “chips!” during speeches, and finish my sentences when I start getting into the finer supply chain details in one-on-one conversations. It’s a lesson in how something seemingly abstract can quickly turn into a kitchen table discussion – and on just how important it is for elected officials to be accessible to the people they serve. These types of conversations fuel my work. Thanks in advance for your help as I continue to work on this critical issue. | **AMERICA FIRST REPUBLICANS
TO RALLY WITH BILL SPADEA
AT SPRING LAKE MANOR** **Seaside Park, NJ -** The America First Republicans for Monmouth County will host an America First rally on Wednesday, April 20 at Spring Lake Manor from 6:00 - 9:00 pm. All America First Republicans from Monmouth County are invited. Food and drinks will be served.
**Who:** America First Republicans:
\+ **Mike Crispi** , who is challenging 42-year incumbent Chris Smith for Congress in New Jersey's newly reconfigured Fourth District
\+ **Gary J. Rich** , former Freeholder who is challenging County Political Boss Shaun Golden for Monmouth County Sheriff
\+ **Daniel Francisco** , candidate for County Commissioner, Project Veritas veteran, Englishtown Councilman, and lead plaintiff in a major pro-Second Amendment case
\+ **Steven Rich** , candidate for County Commissioner, financial advisor and former Chairman of the Monmouth County Young Republicans
**Featured Guest:** Bill Spadea, NJ101.5 host, founder of the Common Sense Club, and promponent of the Parents' Bill of Rights.
**What:** An **America First Rally** in Monmouth County for the America First Republicans who will appear in COLUMN A on the June 7 Primary Election ballot.
**When: **Wednesday, April 20, 2022 -- 6:00 - 9:00 pm.
**Where: **Spring Lake Manor, 415 NJ-71, Spring Lake, NJ 07762
**Why:** Establishment Politicians like Chris Smith and Shaun Golden have held office for too long. They've rigged the system to serve themselves and they've failed to deliver results for the people they serve. It's time for new blood, new energy, new perspectives, and a genuine commitment to putting America First!

**RSVP:** AmericaFirstforMonmouth@gmail.com
\- 30 - [www.MikeCrispi.com](https://103086.io.directiq13.com/hit?sid=xq9pvnil95zzoby98d&linkid=1&link=8a66bd260a83422e9a557f6a9f17a363)

name: Team Reeves
subject: Bryce Reeves Announces Endorsement by Delegate Margaret Ransone
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REEVES FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bryce Reeves Announces Endorsement by Delegate Margaret Ransone
| | | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/01000180430c0b23-72cafd4b-11bc-49d9-b847-c5060a8444e0-000000/OL76Yecqxgun4hJ2ozj5cihaLfk=267)
---
| **Bryce Reeves Announces Endorsement by Delegate Margaret Ransone** Today, Senator Bryce Reeves (R-Spotsylvania) announced a new endorsement for his campaign in the 7th Congressional District, by Delegate Margaret Ransone (R-Westmoreland) of the 99th District of the House of Delegates. Delegate Ransone said, “I’m proud to endorse Bryce Reeves because he has been a major advocate for parental rights and the safety of our children in the General Assembly. In 2013 he passed legislation enshrining a parent’s fundamental right to the care, upbringing and education of their children. And when Bryce got a report that we were last in the nation for children aging out of foster care, he went to work and passed legislation to fix that crisis. More than just legislating, Bryce has lived his life like this by coaching lacrosse and football with children in the community. He has my full endorsement in the race for the 7th Congressional District.” Bryce Reeves stated, “I'm honored to have the support of Delegate Ransone in this election. For over ten years she has been a trusted conservative voice in the House of Delegates. I know she will be an invaluable resource for our team as we take on Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger this Novemeber." Delegate Ransone represents the 99th District in the House of Delegates, which includes King George County and parts of Caroline County in the new 7th Congressional District. She joins many of her colleagues in the General Assembly supporting Bryce Reeves including Del. Bobby Orrock (R-Caroline), Del. Rob Bell (R-Albemarle), Del. Nick Freitas (R-Culpeper), Del. Tara Durant (R-Stafford), Del. Phillip Scott (R-Spotsylvania), Senator Richard Stuart (R-Westmoreland) and former Speaker Bill Howell (R-Stafford). Other key endorsements for the Reeves campaign include U.S. Senators Mike Lee (R-Utah) and Marsco Rubio (R-Florida) as well as other national groups and leaders including former Secretary of Energy Rick Perry, former Governor and US Senator George Allen, Senator Marco Rubio, SEAL PAC, GOPAC, and FreedomWorks. Prominent activists in Virginia like Paul Galanti and Pete Snyder have also endorsed Reeves in the 7th District race. Bryce Reeves has also received many endorsements from the law enforcement community both nationally and locally. Nationally, he has received support from Tom Homan, who served as Director of Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) under President Trump from 2017-2018 , as well as Tony Pham, who was Acting Director of ICE under President Trump in 2020. Locally, sheriffs from the 7th Congressional District supporting Reeves in this campaign include Sheriff Jenkins (Culpeper), Sheriff Decatur (Stafford), Sheriff Lippa (Caroline), Sheriff Higgs (Fredericksburg), Sheriff Giles (King George), Sheriff Harris (Spotsylvania) and Sheriff Amos (Orange). Bryce has also received endorsements from Sheriffs outside the district, including those in both Louisa and Montgomery counties. In addition, Commonwealth Attorney Travis Bird of Spotsylvania has thrown his support behind Senator Reeves. ### Bryce Reeves is a small business owner, auxiliary sheriff’s deputy in Culpeper County, former Army Ranger, and former Prince William County narcotics detective. He currently represents the 17th District in the Virginia Senate, which includes the City of Fredericksburg and the Counties of Albemarle (part), Culpeper (part), Louisa (part), Orange, and Spotsylvania (part). Senator Reeves serves on the Senate Committee on Rehabilitation and Social Services and sits on the Committees on Local Government, General Laws and Technology, and Privileges and Elections. In addition, Senator Reeves is the Co-chair of the Virginia General Assembly Military and Veterans Caucus. Senator Reeves resides in Spotsylvania County.
---

| Some personalities are just addicted to failure apparently! **Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham has doubled-down on COVID-19 tyranny through an extended emergency, even though our state was recently reported to have scored in the bottom ten states for coping with the pandemic. **

The announcement of renewed COVID-19 “emergency health orders” extending through May 16th, _came just days before the federal mask mandate for travelers was lifted nationally._
---
| [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=54130c3a30&e=102b599530)
---
| New Mexicans will just have to live vicariously through the social media posts being shared across the country of elated pilots, flight attendants, and passengers _**who are finally seeing less government overreach when it comes to COVID-19. **_

As our governor attempts to place residents in another _flight or fright_ response over the Omicron BA.2 variant, _New Mexicans are not having it_. Following the renewed emergency health order, Twitter began trending with _#FireMLG_ :

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: We’re pulling back the curtain on our financials farther than most campaigns
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
This campaign is for the people by the people. We think it’s only fair that you decide exactly where your money goes.
#
You’ve been a great supporter of our campaign, and we’re committed to showing you just how much we mean it when we say we’re building a people-powered movement.
Does that mean we don’t take a dime of super PAC, fossil fuel, or corporate dollars? **YES**. But it also means that we value transparency and authenticity _a lot_.
That’s why we’re going to do you one better than just telling you where your donations go.
In case you missed it, we’re less than a month away from Primary Election Day, and we’re working towards our Finish Line Fund goal of $25,000.
**Today, we’re going to break down exactly what areas of the campaign the Finish Line Fund will help with AND give you the freedom to choose exactly where your donation goes.**
[**_This is a pretty big deal_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49618?t=1&akid=1107%2E3698%2Evq9y4l)**[, and we hope that you’ll choose to support one of the five critical programs that our Finish Line Fund will go towards today (you can choose exactly what program your donation goes to on the ActBlue page).](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49618?t=2&akid=1107%2E3698%2Evq9y4l)**
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49619?refcode=em20220419-1107&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1107%2E3698%2Evq9y4l)**
**_Free Yard Sign program_******
We’re sending every Erica supporter in the NC-01 district a free yard sign. Yep, completely *free*. It’s critical that we get Erica’s name and message in front of as many voters as possible as they get ready to head out to the polls in a few weeks.
One yard sign costs $16 to produce and distribute.
[_**Donate now to ensure that we’re able to send out thousands of yard signs across NC-01 »**_](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49618?t=4&akid=1107%2E3698%2Evq9y4l)
**_Phone Banking_******
We’re turning up the dial on our phone banking in these last couple of weeks. We’re a small, grassroots team and that means we have to recruit and train a lot of volunteers to be able to fill all of the phone banking shifts. Erica is even leading some phone banking sessions herself.
[**_Donate now to help us build out our phone banking program »_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49618?t=5&akid=1107%2E3698%2Evq9y4l)
**_Advertising_******
This is a *big* one. We’re up against Sandy Smith and it’s no exaggeration to say she has a huge Republican war chest supporting her. To fight back, it’s critical that we keep our own digital advertisements up and running so we don’t get drowned out.
**[Donate now to help keep our ads from going dark »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49618?t=6&akid=1107%2E3698%2Evq9y4l)**
**_Physical campaign materials_******
Besides yard signs, we need a lot of foundational materials that are easy to miss. Things like pens, clipboards, paper, printing supplies for posters, mailers, and etc. take up more of our budget than it might seem.
[**_Donate now to help us afford our foundational materials for our campaign_** ](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49618?t=7&akid=1107%2E3698%2Evq9y4l)**[»](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49618?t=8&akid=1107%2E3698%2Evq9y4l) **
No matter where you choose to donate, you can know that your contribution will have an immediate positive impact on our campaign.
Thank you for being with us,
Team Erica Smith
Erica Smith is a single mother, educator, and three-term state senator, who grew up on her family farm and spent her life fighting for rural Eastern North Carolina. Now, she’s running to represent NC-01 — _her home district_ – in Congress, where she’ll fight for economic justice and workers’ rights, universal healthcare, voting rights, and more. **[Add a donation to help us protect this competitive, open U.S. House seat and give power back to working people »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49619?refcode=em20220419-1107-box&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=1107%2E3698%2Evq9y4l)** **[Donate](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49619?refcode=em20220419-1107-box&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=1107%2E3698%2Evq9y4l)**
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220419-1107-footer&t=11&refcode2=1107_3698_vq9y4l&akid=1107%2E3698%2Evq9y4l)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=12&akid=1107%2E3698%2Evq9y4l)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=1107%2E3698%2Evq9y4l)

PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US

We’re up against Sandy Smith and it’s no exaggeration to say she has a huge Republican war chest supporting her. To fight back, it’s critical that we keep our own digital advertisements up and running so we don’t get drowned out. Physical campaign materials**** Besides yard signs, we need a lot of foundational materials that are easy to miss. Things like pens, clipboards, paper, printing supplies for posters, mailers, and etc. take up more of our budget than it might seem. No matter where you choose to donate, you can know that your contribution will have an immediate positive impact on our campaign. Thank you for being with us, Team Erica Smith Erica Smith is a single mother, educator, and three-term state senator, who grew up on her family farm and spent her life fighting for rural Eastern North Carolina. Now, she’s running to represent NC-01 — her home district – in Congress, where she’ll fight for economic justice and workers’ rights, universal healthcare, voting rights, and more. Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com

name: Ted Cruz
subject: BREAKING: We know Fauci lied.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| | |
---
| | Peter,

---
I've been 100% clear on my opinion of Dr. Anthony Fauci. He's been dishonest, political, and partisan, distorting science to exercise authoritarian control and cover up his own conduct.

**He is the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S history.**

I've demanded the Department of Justice INVESTIGATE and PROSECUTE Fauci for lying to Congress when he claimed that the federal government and his NIH did not fund "gain-of-function" research in Wuhan, China.
| **And now, we have 221 pages of records obtained by Judicial Watch through a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit that provide DAMNING new evidence, including a grant application for research involving the coronavirus that was submitted back in 2018!**
---
---
| | _When Fauci lied to Congress, he lied to the American people._

18 USC 1001 makes this a felony, punishable by up to **5 years in prison**.

_We need to know the FULL EXTENT of what Fauci is attempting to hide!_
**[**Take a stand to help me EXPOSE FAUCI**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60177675:63mUNGo3N:m:1:3253819041:2A7A92B03AF70339C1F46FD8B71E2961:r)**

This new evidence obtained by Judicial Watch shows that Fauci did indeed know about "gain-of-function" research and funding of the Wuhan coronavirus.
Fauci, the Biden administration, and the Fake News media can attack me all they want... I WILL NOT STOP fighting to expose how Fauci and his bureaucrat pals spent MILLIONS of U.S. taxpayer dollars to make viruses more harmful and deadly.
Take action now to join me in this fight, Peter | | **[**CONTRIBUTE NOW **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60177675:63mUNGo3N:m:1:3253819041:2A7A92B03AF70339C1F46FD8B71E2961:r)**
---

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

[**Support Ted Cruz for Senate**** **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60177675:63mUNGo3N:m:1:3253819041:2A7A92B03AF70339C1F46FD8B71E2961:r)
PS: And now Dr. Fauci says he supports new vaccine mandates and other onerous COVID-19 restrictions on our freedoms- such as showing proof of vaccination to get on an airplane or even visit a private home! Dr. Fauci needs to go.
**[YES - I Support Ted Cruz: Expose & Prosecute Fauci!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60177675:63mUNGo3N:m:1:3253819041:2A7A92B03AF70339C1F46FD8B71E2961:r)**

body:
We’ve seen the consequences that Biden’s America Last energy policies have had on Ohio families. Soaring gas prices, dependence on foreign imports, sh Friend, **_We need energy independence._** We’ve seen the consequences that Biden’s America Last energy policies have had on Ohio families. **❌ Soaring gas prices** **❌ Dependence on foreign imports** **❌ Shortages in American oil, coal, and gas** **❌ AND SO MUCH WORSE** We need to unleash the full potential of AMERICAN ENERGY! Now, I’m reaching out to my BEST supporters like YOU, to get crucial input.
_Friend, I need to know what you think. Friends,

I have been overseas in nations where changes in leadership come only with violence, where democracy takes hold only until the next violent upheaval.

**_America is exceptional because our constitutional system guards against that._** At the heart of our republic is a commitment to the peaceful transfer of power among political rivals in accordance with the law. President Ronald Reagan described this as our American “miracle.”

**History is watching. Our children are watching.** We must be brave enough to defend the basic principles that underpin and protect our freedom and our democratic process.

**[I am committed to doing that. I am asking for you to do the same, and I hope that you will consider contributing to my reelection campaign.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=63007d64fb604cc992720e934ac35cd1&_e=b5STASdkBo7jFysGCznqXlXb0gj8oPJLk9Y9dC22-lU7jM5_ZcmQevIYstQjfnZFE85SwO_V1kZbiSLEpuaufPi1pi8BugrSdCizXpdhd-jcuQxis713UZJ6q77DqmJ4RUxbOFojpgH74glES8y_lCQDbUWKVw911DGbMnA8fzbnuwM4UegHp74HNRlu-cSgnRRHfzs_A6IE0vJ1GMk1AIYSRgfU8zf6qf0NZ9qHf9bLaYwIn20vSEn30foY5w8DYXkoHDVdd0e4FfmJu8u5rE146nwnstesAwSurFfscmpIHMH1PsUT92y5G9i3skosyD7rFamJfttkozNZH1K_cJJ_GmSaBjZn1IRfuhLM9KPzNLrY51dDkIvGy0epsSkojVHfTjRAXlju6ET0U-4oYWFUpjTvKvHV9Hnux8QKD_p31QdYZFm0UbMJArt3qYw5F1m_E6lIuKDf-ehnh56Ocr3XmKGV61hJV79Eh4w7WZF3pprFD_yfDShaDwDnqXdacgxI8dj6PBooOBd4UTh834acZrt-d2MfWCOjtOPiyzozzIrJ3Im31KMEN2F2Kdrf)**

**For Republicans, the path forward is clear._For me, the path forward is clear._ **

Liz Cheney

clean_body: No matter what the short-term political consequences might be | | Friends, I have been overseas in nations where changes in leadership come only with violence, where democracy takes hold only until the next violent upheaval. America is exceptional because our constitutional system guards against that. At the heart of our republic is a commitment to the peaceful transfer of power among political rivals in accordance with the law. President Ronald Reagan described this as our American “miracle.” History is watching. Our children are watching. We must be brave enough to defend the basic principles that underpin and protect our freedom and our democratic process. For Republicans, the path forward is clear.For me, the path forward is clear. Liz Cheney Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming Our mailing address is: PO Box 3167 Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

| Friend,

In the [recently released texts](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=71cbc1684c&e=10c1db3257) between Senator Mike Lee and former White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows, Mike Lee said he was, **“spending 14 hours a day for the last week trying to unravel this,”** while discussing his efforts to help former President Trump fight the 2020 election results.

Fourteen hours a day, seven days a week: that’s **98 hours Mike Lee dedicated to overturning a lawful election.**

Becky would have used those 98 hours to **work on behalf of Utahns.**

Becky doesn’t waste her time, and **she won’t waste your vote.**

**Will you contribute $7, $14, $98, or whatever you can afford TODAY and help Becky Edwards spend her time fighting for you?**

subject: We must protect our police
body:
The answer is NOT defunding

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/f3d8761ce2ef/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-7061593?e=c87c5d8d97)
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-19-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast419

Friend,

The solution to the raging crime crisis is NOT to defund our police.

The Radical Left implemented defund policies and the outcome was raised crime rates in our cities. Defunding the police is NOT the answer.

Instead, we need to FUND and PROTECT our law enforcement officers so they can keep our communities safe. As mayor of Happy Valley, I fully funded our police.

When I’m in office, one of my top priorities will be standing up and fighting for our police; can I count on you to chip in today so we can give our law enforcement the support they deserve?>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-19-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast419)

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-19-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast419?amount=100
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-19-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast419?amount=50
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-19-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast419?amount=25
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-19-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast419?amount=10

The Radical Democrat’s crime policies have endangered our country for too long.

The police risk their lives everyday for us and unlike the Left, I respect what they do to keep us safe.

It’s time to protect those who protect us.

Donate any amount today so we can have a future where our law enforcement are funded for the resources they need to do their job.>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-19-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast419)

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-19-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast419

Thank you,

Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-19-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast419

Hello,
This morning, we started running our first TV ad against Chuck Grassley.
I know Election Day might feel a long way away, but if we’re going to win, I need to introduce myself to voters _now_ – before Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs begin attacking me and lying about who I am and what I stand for.
It’s a risk to begin calling out the far-right Republicans first, but we need to get going. It is time to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue.
**In order to keep our new ad up, we have to raise $32,692 a day – but I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. So unless we want to have to take our TV down, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now.**
[**Please, will you give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? I know Election Day might feel a long way away, but if we’re going to win, I need to introduce myself to voters now – before Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs begin attacking me and lying about who I am and what I stand for. It’s a risk to begin calling out the far-right Republicans first, but we need to get going. It is time to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. In order to keep our new ad up, we have to raise $32,692 a day – but I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. name: Alex-Padilla.com
subject: Money to burn
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Stand against billionaires trying to buy elections
#

**FIRST:** We found out that a self-described billionaire defense contractor is running against us, and that he booked more than $600,000 in TV ads this week alone.
**THEN:** POLITICO reported that his ad buy has already increased to **_over $2,000,000!_** He’s got money to burn and he’s not showing any signs of slowing down, telling a reporter, “I am going to win votes.”
**SO NOW:** We are asking for your help to ensure we have the resources to go toe-to-toe with our billionaire opposition. _Because the truth is, the ONLY way we’re going to match up with the almost unlimited sums of money our opponent can put into this race is with your support._
[**Please, make a donation to stand with Alex Padilla today. No matter what you can afford to give, every donation is a powerful statement of support _for_ our grassroots movement and _against_ billionaires trying to buy elections.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-apr22?refcode=em220419-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=747_159979_QhTTjg&akid=747%2E159979%2EQhTTjg)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-apr22?refcode=em220419-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=747_159979_QhTTjg&akid=747%2E159979%2EQhTTjg)**
It will not be easy. We’ve got a lot of hard work ahead of us. But as long as we continue to stand together, we can win this race and keep Alex in the Senate fighting for immigration reform, action on climate change, and universal health care.
Thank you, from Alex and from all of us, for being a part of this team. We could not do it without you.
\- Team Padilla
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-apr22?refcode=em220419-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=747_159979_QhTTjg&akid=747%2E159979%2EQhTTjg)**

name: John Fetterman
subject: The richest dude in a room full of rich dudes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
There’s only one way to win against this kind of money.
#
Derek,
We now know *exactly* how much of his own money Republican self-funding Senate candidate David McCormick is able to spend on this race, and it’s astounding.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47377?refcode=em20220419-5452&t=1&akid=5452%2E434096%2EUeaZTX)
In fact, McCormick and his wife estimate they could actually be worth as much as $289 million. _Think about how many yachts, mansions, and pierogies that could get you._
Derek, I need to be honest with you. The biggest risk we face in the race to flip PA’s U.S. Senate seat is being outspent by our opponents
No matter who ends up winning the PA GOP nomination — David McCormick or Dr. Oz — we’ll be up against a self-funding Republican who can + likely will spend literally tens of millions _from their own fortunes_ to buy their way to the U.S. Senate.
We gotta start preparing for this inevitable outcome right now...
**[I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important: Derek, will you kick in a donation right now to make sure we can compete with our self-funding GOP opponents? Seriously, anything you can spare will be a big help.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47377?refcode=em20220419-5452&t=2&akid=5452%2E434096%2EUeaZTX)**
**[Contribute $5 »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47377?amount=5&refcode=em20220419-5452&t=3&akid=5452%2E434096%2EUeaZTX)**
According to the latest FEC reports, if David McCormick or Dr. Oz win this thing, they’d become one of the *wealthiest* members of the U.S. Senate.
My question is,**is that *really* what we want Pennsylvania’s next Senator to be known for?**
I don’t know about you, but I think the people of PA deserve someone who’s known for fighting like hell for union workers + working families.
Not the richest dude in a room full of rich dudes. 🙄
As I’m sure you’ve seen McCormick + Oz keep running ads where they pretend to bale hay, toss back pints, + do their own grocery shopping (all real examples, LOL). But what they don’t want you to know is they’re spending _millions_ of their own cash to put those ads on the air without even thinking about it.
There’s really only one way we’re going to win going up against GOP opponents with virtually unlimited funds. That’s why I’m sending you this email.
**[I don’t have a huge personal fortune or take any corporate PAC money — this campaign is powered by grassroots donors like you. So, Derek, if you’re ready to be part of the team that will beat a self-funding Republican multi-millionaire in the most competitive Senate race in the nation, will you pitch in your first $5 today?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47377?refcode=em20220419-5452&t=4&akid=5452%2E434096%2EUeaZTX)**
**[Contribute $5 »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47377?amount=5&refcode=em20220419-5452&t=23&akid=5452%2E434096%2EUeaZTX)**
With your help, we’ll be able to keep up with McCormick, Dr. Oz, and their super PACs through small-dollar and grassroots donations (AKA the way all campaigns should be funded).
Let's do this,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220419-5452-footer&t=24&refcode2=5452_434096_UeaZTX&akid=5452%2E434096%2EUeaZTX)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=5452%2E434096%2EUeaZTX)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=5452%2E434096%2EUeaZTX)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: I need supporters from your area to protect our Senate majority

body:
I need your help to close this gap before midnight.
| |

**FIRST:** I reached out for your help to reach my daily fundraising goal.
**THEN:** Thousands of grassroots supporters stepped up to put me back on track and protect our Senate majority.
**NOW: I only have $2,819 to go** , and I need your help to close this gap before midnight.

name: Charles Booker
subject: Hey Peter, I’ve got BIG news.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Hey Peter, I’ve got
BIG news.

We just launched our first TV ad!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220419?refcode=em20220419-1781&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1781_346206_Dn-5BC&akid=1781%2E346206%2EDn-5BC ][IMG]

I’m so excited for you and thousands of voters all across Kentucky to see
it.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220419?refcode=em20220419-1781&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1781_346206_Dn-5BC&akid=1781%2E346206%2EDn-5BC ]With your help, we can make sure our ad is seen across Kentucky. Will
you help us keep this ad on the air by chipping in $5 today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220419?refcode=em20220419-1781&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1781_346206_Dn-5BC&akid=1781%2E346206%2EDn-5BC ]Contribute $5 →

For too long, politicians in Kentucky have been exploiting us.

But the people of Kentucky are my family, and you fight for family. That’s
why I’m running for U.S. Senate.

If we work together, we can make sure every community across Kentucky is
thriving, from the hood to the holler.

But here’s the reality: TV advertising is expensive — so we need your help
to keep our ad on the airwaves until our primary on 5/17.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220419?refcode=em20220419-1781&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1781_346206_Dn-5BC&akid=1781%2E346206%2EDn-5BC ]Will you watch my new ad and chip in $5.17 to help us keep it on
throughout Kentucky?

Thank you,

Charles

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: Moms Demand Action
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
#
Friend,
I’m so proud to receive the Gun Sense candidate distinction from Moms Demand Action:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-april/?source=em220419-1-15&refcode2=711_59515_LV2_Cp&akid=711%2E59515%2ELV2_Cp)
**[Make a contribution to my campaign so I can organize, win, and do the important work of championing gun violence prevention legislation in Congress.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-april/?refcode=em220419-1-15&refcode2=711_59515_LV2_Cp&akid=711%2E59515%2ELV2_Cp)**
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-april/?refcode=em220419-1-15&refcode2=711_59515_LV2_Cp&akid=711%2E59515%2ELV2_Cp)**
Moms Demand Action is doing the critical work of organizing to change our nation’s insufficient gun laws and protect our communities. I’ve long supported their mission — when I was elected to the state senate in 2018, no legislation related to guns had made it onto the floor in five years.
But since then, I’ve cosponsored 15 gun violence prevention bills signed into law. Just this last October, Governor Hochul signed a bill I cosponsored to crack down on the sale of ghost guns, a type of homemade gun that can be purchased without a background check — legislation that I proudly supported.
I’ll bring this same dedication to Congress and champion common sense measures like repealing the Protection of Lawful Commerce in Arms Act, which gave gun sellers immunity from lawsuits at the hands of victims of gun violence. I will also support measures like the Bipartisan Background Checks Act and the Enhanced Background Checks Act of 2021.
**[If you’re able, make a contribution to my campaign so I can go to Congress and get started on this lifesaving work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-april/?refcode=em220419-1-15&refcode2=711_59515_LV2_Cp&akid=711%2E59515%2ELV2_Cp)**
Thank you for your support. It’s so important that we elect leaders who have the willpower to make change and protect our communities.
– Alessandra
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-april/?refcode=em220419-1-15&refcode2=711_59515_LV2_Cp&akid=711%2E59515%2ELV2_Cp)**

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=711%2E59515%2ELV2_Cp).

subject: Stop Using Racial Politics to Divide Us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
This should come as no surprise. Whitmer and Attorney General Nessel stand against law enforcement. | | | |
---
| | |
## Whitmer and Nessel Use Racial Politics to Inflame and Divide
#### by Captain Michael Brown
---
|
---
| Before the investigation is even done, Governor Whitmer and her radical liberal allies are seeking to further inflame and divide our communities. They’ve asked Joe Biden’s Department of Justice to intervene pushing for an investigation of potential civil rights violations in the officer-involved shooting of Patrick Lyoya.

It’s a baseless request with zero evidence. It will do nothing more than further inflame an already difficult situation.

This should come as no surprise. Whitmer and Attorney General Nessel stand against law enforcement. They would rather put a target on the backs of our police officers than address the real problem — a dramatic increase in violent crime in Grand Rapids and other communities in Michigan.

In just the last year, violent crimes including shootings, attempted murder, assault with firearms, and assault with firearms with injuries are all up in Grand Rapids. The number of illegal guns seized is also up more than 17% over the previous year.

Law enforcement officers, in Michigan and throughout the nation, have an increasingly difficult job. As radical politicians like Whitmer and Nessel point fingers and side with the “defund the police” crowd, they encourage the public to be antagonistic to the police.

We see more and more individuals openly defy lawful orders from police officers who are simply trying to do their jobs in the safest manner possible.

Quite frankly, our officers risk their lives every day to protect the citizens of Michigan. During a routine traffic stop, domestic violence call, or store burglary, police arrive on the scene without foreknowledge of the potential threats that may await them.

Oftentimes this requires officers to make split-second decisions. That’s where their training comes into play.

During my 34 year career in law enforcement, I have been a strong advocate for effective training, as well as for the use of body cams to protect both our officers and the public during all interactions. The goal is to keep the public safe, and to return officers safely to their homes.

Whitmer, Nessel and their radical allies need to stop demonizing the police. Let the investigation by the Kent County Prosecutor and Michigan State Police continue without interference so that justice may be done.
---
|
---

name: Aadland For Congress
subject: Are you still interested?
body:
Erik needs more volunteers
| | | |
---
| Hi Peter,
You received this email because you had expressed an interest in electing Erik Aadland in the past.
I understand that may have been during Erik's Senate effort, but I wanted to touch base with you now that Erik has become The Frontrunner in the race for Congressional District 7.
You may have heard that the Congressional Assembly, on Apr 8, voted overwhelmingly to put Erik on the Primary Ballot with over 63% of the vote! His closest challenger was thirty points behind.
If you're still interested in looking at opportunities to help put Erik in the U.S. House of Representatives, please take a moment to contact me through the link below. I made the form brief as possible.
---
| [Renew your interest in helping the campaign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cw1KdI_Pvrp5SMOV3akQ-1eC5PedmnWt4VrlG8Z1Dgx1T253VgRTUiVVJCTNic3UoH4gug5J2u5ZbciaaePtFlfK0T0Q_fdcB4tf3eMp1jCk3NjgJXdWn5LGVd4FHKm7zhikjYZ2r-jSeVrfOqh_yQ==&c=HPckBwRAgJ61cSJY6YoV1oD_3ZQAScbrqNnTFjmjFc6jUzzhvpNksQ==&ch=zEDaTP1u2m1FkKQ_L9XsoT0dQk9ImYtFX9Jz7aNfVqEkSY_l9k1fpw==)

subject: re: What are your children reading?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard
body:
Peter, I want to ask you something, parent to parent - **do you know what our kids are reading in school?**

I’ve heard horror stories of teachers indoctrinating our kids with socialism and “woke” propaganda, so I decided to take matters into my own hands and write a book about **teamwork, patriotism, and service.**

**[My new book “Dawn of the Brave” is available NOW in collaboration with Brave Books and $15 of every subscription goes to Samaritans Purse which goes to help Ukrainians for the month of April subject: fw: $18k behind budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
We can’t let this shortfall stand.
| Peter,
---
I didn’t want to disturb you while you celebrated Easter, so I had my team pause our fundraising efforts from Good Friday until this morning.
---
_**But unfortunately, we’re now pacing $18,320 behind our April budget.**_
---
With our new district essentially TIED, we can’t let this shortfall stand.
---
_You’re one of my most loyal supporters, Peter, and I’m counting on you to help us make up this deficit as quickly as possible._
---
[**Please make an urgent contribution to help us get back on the budget we set to WIN Florida’s NEW 27th congressional district.**](https://links.mariaforflorida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=f036eeaf8adb4c1e8c15a6c4cec1e14e&_e=FlBJzv1rYeiAFs2MOEf0uU1rAz60dZyPR2IPalb6pLJp4nFWx1aMneCORW4c2-4AKbqYADzAUngsnwiaAK5D8uY-x1H1RadNCUn86yUpNa_qmkRtXnG-BxojdXtFIXXK8_HdC2Uw9ZoUkkPCVP3H5NFcX3XEvSAFmWESWFbQtuH8tkG_ZJdMSLkxxVhvzy78qOVxMey5XGpSX6CNb3P21lq37CsY3EKit9FPgCH32A1aT2Be74IRWmQ4xUgqKgNjg5H9H87f_LynZZDZ3c7RxtmG_S3ZYCNCngsZQInbZBr5TlPkdoMv0p0vLDhY7QqvSBQer9EM-T3iHK0h1kQy7JCjvEDR1MqJgibvsuu9eczGqDbGG10eJtaDbkONCEcyPrUaajkGSiL6rMK0zG8AFyDp7NzCieuF0ZTBpc2xvs8nMd1Qen_yucFPh8LjvKFON9-XGX9BYdzIpQ2T2dEH4fVAXsbOWHexisUDaQ57GxF8qJDUPmudLBuveXmZveyD)
