clean_body: We can’t let this shortfall stand. | Peter, I didn’t want to disturb you while you celebrated Easter, so I had my team pause our fundraising efforts from Good Friday until this morning. But unfortunately, we’re now pacing $18,320 behind our April budget. With our new district essentially TIED, we can’t let this shortfall stand. You’re one of my most loyal supporters, Peter, and I’m counting on you to help us make up this deficit as quickly as possible. Thank you, María Elvira Salazar Florida’s 27th Congressional District \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Maria Elvira Salazar Date: Thu, April 14, 2022 Subject: Florida’s new map To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, I need your urgent support. Florida’s newly drawn congressional map makes our new district the closest in the state. In 2020, it was essentially TIED between Democrats and Republicans: We’re going to be in for the fight of our lives, and every last dollar will be CRITICAL as we battle to defend my district from the onslaught of the far-left. That’s why my team and I decided to set an ambitious fundraising goal for the first half of April – and we need your help to hit it. We took Nancy Pelosi by surprise when we upset her radical puppet Donna Shalala in 2020. We won’t have that luxury this time around. Pelosi has already labeled me one of her top targets, and now that our race is the closest in Florida, she’s going to invest even more to try and unseat me. This will likely be one of the most important – and the most expensive – races in the country. We won’t have a chance at winning without the sustained support of dedicated Americans like YOU, Peter. Thank you, María Elvira Salazar Florida’s 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

name: Derek Marshall
subject: I stand with Amazon workers
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/Derek%20Marshall%20Logo%20-%20Standard%20Stacked%20Lockup%20JTree%20MAIN%20COLOR.png]
Derek Marshall is running in California's newly-created 23rd Congressional District, against incumbent Jay Obernolte, not Kevin McCarthy, who represents the former 23rd district. You may be receiving these emails because you've previously indicated you support progressive and Democratic candidates. Emails are the best way we update our supporters, but y ou can always unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/dd86f083-74bf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/b5390a1c-17c0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTM5MGExYy0xN2MwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GhxD-oO6Xms9a1PGNDmerKrG4AKqDJ6PVyPrzNyY3Go=&id=124407521 here.
Peter,
This month, Amazon workers in New York voted to unionize, making history as the first official Amazon union in the entire world. At the beginning, these workers didn’t have the support or resources that major unions did.
But they knew they deserved better than the meager pay, grueling hours, and dangerous working conditions they suffered. Amazon spent over $4 million on union-busting tactics and consultants when they could have simply paid their workers. Now they’re using the same practices to intimidate workers voting soon on a second possible union.
I unequivocally stand with these workers, and Amazon workers everywhere who face despicable working conditions despite working for the country’s 2nd biggest company.
I will always be a champion for workers–that’s why I need to replace the Republican in office who doesn’t represent us. Will you chip in and support me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-19&amount=38]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=4-19_express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=4-19_express_lane_15]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=4-19_express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $38 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane=true&amount=38&refcode=4-19_express_lane_38]
Express Donate: Other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane_other=true&refcode=4-19_express_lane_other]
Or, maximize your impact and make your donation monthly. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-19&recurring=1]
As a Member of Congress, I will stand up to corporate bullies like Amazon. I will join other Democrats demanding that Amazon pay its fair share of taxes, shore up union protections by passing the PRO Act, and always prioritize the needs of working families in my district.
Amazon is playing dirty. And let’s be honest–it should never have had this much power in the first place. That’s why I pledge to uphold values at the soul of the Democratic Party, the party of the people. We need to elect a true champion for the people in CA-23. Will you support me with a donation today and get me one step closer to victory? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-19&amount=38]
In solidarity,
Derek Marshall
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-19&amount=38]
Meet Derek [www.DerekMarshallCA.com]

P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92 395 • (760) 486-2416 [tel:(760) 486-2416]
Twitter [https://twitter.com/derekmarshallca] | Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/DerekMarshallCA] | Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/derekmarshallca]

Amazon is playing dirty. And let’s be honest–it should never have had this much power in the first place. That’s why I pledge to uphold values at the soul of the Democratic Party, the party of the people. We need to elect a true champion for the people in CA-23. Will you support me with a donation today and get me one step closer to victory? [] In solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23 Donate Now [] Meet Derek [www.DerekMarshallCA.com] P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92 395 • (760) 486-2416 [tel:(760) 486-2416] Twitter [] | Facebook [] | Instagram []

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: This extraordinary chance before us to win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I feel really good about where we are in this campaign. The only place where I know we could be doing better is fundraising.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=194%2E5257348%2ETs0oIj)
Dear Derek,
I feel really good about where we are in this campaign.
At 60,000 people and growing, we’ve got the biggest volunteer organizing team in the country right now. And these volunteers are already at the doors of Texas voters, building relationships and connecting with those who will decide the outcome of this election.
Our digital team is leveraging our social media presence to reach voters — especially young voters — with the messages that give them a reason to care about and vote in this election. It’s also been a powerful recruitment tool to bring in new volunteers.
And Governor Abbott continues to make the case for why he can’t be trusted with another term in office. Whether it’s the grid, the attacks on teachers, the failure to fix Child Protective Services, or the outright banning of reproductive healthcare freedom in Texas, he’s given Texas voters — Republicans as well as Democrats — plenty of reasons to vote for change.
The polls are starting to show it as well. A recent one has us within just two points — and within the margin of error — of Abbott.
The only place where I know we could be doing better is fundraising.
While we’ve kept pace with Abbott on a day to day basis, matching his corporate donors with grassroots support, we started this race more than $50 million behind. I really need us to redouble our commitment to meeting the very ambitious fundraising goals we’ve set if we’re going to have the resources to win.
[**As we continue organizing everywhere, I hope that you’ll consider splitting a donation between our campaign and my friend Adam Schiff’s efforts to hold the House. I need to make sure that we maximize the momentum we have, the progress we’re making and this extraordinary chance before us to win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220419_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&refcode2=194_5257348_Ts0oIj&akid=194%2E5257348%2ETs0oIj)

name: Melanie D'Arrigo
subject: The American healthcare system is killing us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO
body:
| | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dar-em-apr22?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220419healthcare_MD_full_xx_hdr&link_id=0&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-affordable-health-insurance-is-like-giving-someone-a-menu-instead-of-food-when-theyre-starving&email_referrer=email_1516146&email_subject=the-american-healthcare-system-is-killing-us&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1516146)
---
The American healthcare system is immoral, Peter Willis. Full stop.
**Our healthcare system prioritizes profits for insurance companies over health outcomes, and treats human lives as dollar signs on a spreadsheet.** Pre-existing conditions, life-threatening diseases, and emergency care are nothing but numbers to be crunched and moved around according to whatever achieves the highest profit margin.
And if you’re wondering why nobody has done anything about it yet, it’s because Big Pharma and the insurance industry has spent _$10 billion over the last 20 years_ to keep this inaccessible, expensive, and unconscionable status quo in place.
The corruption is — literally — killing us.
**It does not have to be this way. I’m running on Universal Healthcare with Medicare for All, because it is the only way to prevent people from dying because they can’t afford to see a doctor or access care.[Chip in today to help me fight for the healthcare system we all deserve.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dar-em-apr22?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220419healthcare_MD_full_xx_l1&link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-affordable-health-insurance-is-like-giving-someone-a-menu-instead-of-food-when-theyre-starving&email_referrer=email_1516146&email_subject=the-american-healthcare-system-is-killing-us&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1516146) **
[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dar-em-apr22?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220419healthcare_MD_full_xx_btn&link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-affordable-health-insurance-is-like-giving-someone-a-menu-instead-of-food-when-theyre-starving&email_referrer=email_1516146&email_subject=the-american-healthcare-system-is-killing-us&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1516146)
---
There’s a deeper layer to this, too: “Access to affordable health insurance” is touted as the ultimate policy goal for many mainstream Democrats who are terrified of upsetting their Big Pharma and insurance lobby donors. The key word there is “insurance.”
**Health Insurance ≠ Health Care.**
Any policy centered around insurance completely ignores the fact that providing “access to affordable health insurance” for someone with no money is like giving them a menu instead of food when they’re starving. **Universal health care must be the goal, and that means Medicare for All.**
The absolute last thing the insurance industry wants to see is someone like me elected to Congress, because I cannot be bought. **[But we’re going to need the help of grassroots donors to do it, because they’ll pour as much money into this race as they possibly can to defeat us. Donate today to fight back.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dar-em-apr22?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220419healthcare_MD_full_xx_l2&link_id=3&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-affordable-health-insurance-is-like-giving-someone-a-menu-instead-of-food-when-theyre-starving&email_referrer=email_1516146&email_subject=the-american-healthcare-system-is-killing-us&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1516146)**

clean_body: | | | | The American healthcare system is immoral, Peter Willis. Full stop. Our healthcare system prioritizes profits for insurance companies over health outcomes, and treats human lives as dollar signs on a spreadsheet. Pre-existing conditions, life-threatening diseases, and emergency care are nothing but numbers to be crunched and moved around according to whatever achieves the highest profit margin. And if you’re wondering why nobody has done anything about it yet, it’s because Big Pharma and the insurance industry has spent $10 billion over the last 20 years to keep this inaccessible, expensive, and unconscionable status quo in place. The corruption is — literally — killing us. It does not have to be this way. I’m running on Universal Healthcare with Medicare for All, because it is the only way to prevent people from dying because they can’t afford to see a doctor or access care. There’s a deeper layer to this, too: “Access to affordable health insurance” is touted as the ultimate policy goal for many mainstream Democrats who are terrified of upsetting their Big Pharma and insurance lobby donors. The key word there is “insurance.” Health Insurance ≠ Health Care. Any policy centered around insurance completely ignores the fact that providing “access to affordable health insurance” for someone with no money is like giving them a menu instead of food when they’re starving. Universal health care must be the goal, and that means Medicare for All. The absolute last thing the insurance industry wants to see is someone like me elected to Congress, because I cannot be bought. A LOT less. P.P.S. Peter, we're SO excited - and incredibly anxious.

Why is that? Well, there are only **four** Tuesdays left until the primary election (with ballots dropping in the mail even before then!)

Coming out of this primary strong is _crucial_ in our journey to win the general election and ultimately have Tina as our next governor. To do that, **we need to have all the resources we can get to improve our chances.**

**[Can you rush a donation of even $5 to strengthen our campaign in time? Every dollar goes to making sure Tina can talk to as many Oregonians as possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44308928/341038984/1324368245?refcode=em22_220419_4tues&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGQ0NDQ0ZS0xYmMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LvLGvLM_vhr8QC7BcW9qDYLY3FDr7aOijGVN-jbdW_Y=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44308930/341038986/1324368245?refcode=em22_220419_4tues&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGQ0NDQ0ZS0xYmMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LvLGvLM_vhr8QC7BcW9qDYLY3FDr7aOijGVN-jbdW_Y=)
You probably also know that a lot is on the line this election.

Republicans have a HUGE chance to win, reproductive healthcare is continuously on the line, climate change's impact is growing in Oregon, and so much more. **The time for an effective and progressive governor is _now._**

Tina Kotek has been a trailblazer for decades, nobody has accomplished more for Oregon and there is no doubt that she is who we need as our next governor. But this cannot happen if we don't win the primary.

**[We need all of the support we can get until then because we are officially down to the wire. If possible, please chip in whatever you can (even $5!) to help Tina get across the finish line.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44308932/341038988/1324368245?refcode=em22_220419_4tues&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGQ0NDQ0ZS0xYmMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LvLGvLM_vhr8QC7BcW9qDYLY3FDr7aOijGVN-jbdW_Y=)**

clean_body: | | = Peter, we're SO excited - and incredibly anxious. Why is that? Well, there are only four Tuesdays left until the primary election (with ballots dropping in the mail even before then!) Coming out of this primary strong is crucial in our journey to win the general election and ultimately have Tina as our next governor. To do that, we need to have all the resources we can get to improve our chances. = = You probably also know that a lot is on the line this election. Republicans have a HUGE chance to win, reproductive healthcare is continuously on the line, climate change's impact is growing in Oregon, and so much more. The time for an effective and progressive governor is now. Tina Kotek has been a trailblazer for decades, nobody has accomplished more for Oregon and there is no doubt that she is who we need as our next governor. But this cannot happen if we don't win the primary. = = We can do this together, Meghan C., Campaign Manager Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P.O. _**Marjorie Taylor Greene Says Joining Military is 'Throwing Your Life Away'**_ Did you see this blistering note from Marjorie Taylor Greene’s Democratic opponent, Marcus Flowers, yesterday? Marjorie Taylor Greene had the audacity to say that serving our country in the military is “throwing your life away” -- totally disrespecting our armed forces who are fighting for our freedoms every single day. **Marcus Flowers has served our country proudly in the U.S. Army, and now it’s time to stand with him in his campaign against Marjorie Taylor Greene.** [**Will you help Marcus defeat her by making a small contribution today?**](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUnLeFAi98TOje7ZdDxOdS5EzSlu2gMm_Nh7xebHf79sw&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220419_lifeawayfwd&n=2) \----**Begin forwarded message** \----

name: AZ Dems
subject: Persuading these voters will be the difference in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | Help us fund Latino outreach | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blueazfund?refcode=EM_FR_220419latinooutreach_N_azdems_90do_8_N_N_LOGO&amount=25.00&link_id=0&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-az-gop-is-trying-to-throw-out-native-votes-3&email_referrer=email_1512881___subject_1976147&email_subject=persuading-these-voters-will-be-the-difference-in-arizona&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1512881___subject_1976147)

---
| Team, last election cycle was a breakthrough moment for AZ Dems.

Thanks to turnout among Latinos and other communities of color, we were able to defeat Donald Trump, flip control of the Senate, and win important races up and down the ballot.

It took a lot of hard work to specifically persuade and turn out these communities. But as the top toss-up state in the country, it’s crucial we reach out to these voters again RIGHT NOW if we’re going to continue our successes this year.

**[Team, we’re planning an early organizing, persuasion, and media campaign to once again turn out Latinos and other communities of color. Can you give $10 today to help us fund this important effort?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blueazfund?refcode=EM_FR_220419latinooutreach_N_azdems_90do_8_N_N_L1&amount=10&&link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-az-gop-is-trying-to-throw-out-native-votes-3&email_referrer=email_1512881___subject_1976147&email_subject=persuading-these-voters-will-be-the-difference-in-arizona&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1512881___subject_1976147)** [
DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blueazfund?refcode=EM_FR_220419latinooutreach_N_azdems_90do_8_N_N_B1&amount=10&link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-az-gop-is-trying-to-throw-out-native-votes-3&email_referrer=email_1512881___subject_1976147&email_subject=persuading-these-voters-will-be-the-difference-in-arizona&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1512881___subject_1976147)
Our data shows that the best indicator of Latino turnout in the general election is primary turnout. 94 percent of Latino voters who voted in a recent general election voted in a primary!

That’s why we’re targeting more than 100,000 voters to listen to their concerns, engage with them early, and encourage them to vote in the primary. It’s the best way to ensure another year of record general election turnout, which could be the difference in us turning AZ completely blue or not.

But we need resources to reach these voters, and we need your help to get there.

**[Team, can you give $10 today to help us fund our new program to increase turnout?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blueazfund?refcode=EM_FR_220419latinooutreach_N_azdems_90do_8_N_N_L2&amount=10&link_id=3&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-az-gop-is-trying-to-throw-out-native-votes-3&email_referrer=email_1512881___subject_1976147&email_subject=persuading-these-voters-will-be-the-difference-in-arizona&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1512881___subject_1976147)**

subject: Your next freedom fighter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leora Levy for U
body:
I would do anything to protect freedom! Freedom is the very reason I get up every morning and fight. It is what motivates me to be a leader for our county. | No longer want to receive emails from Leora Levy for U.S. Senate? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=cb4e558c2ac44803837f054aae4890b0&_t=drzp2H6f9lr2I3r-Jy-2_6TRq-051df_DAFyDopahc30r4PwcBpPxiDfRYhP4hHrZdOC7YXYr4euRH25nRwZiA6W1LLGUU7vLhdL0ztl8TAzoxrnCoqoUIdBu92w0-wfrSj-jF-4u9KZAGkUE4PY1N-VXuBlgs9e7KC_Vqh1Pto%3D).

](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cb4e558c2ac44803837f054aae4890b0&_e=N6y57bCnnh86cOix62Up1zx2y71FnS9DtzDxS3GzkHNmQCun_JSN_ludkcYZTVxPYWAJi1KfktbRIHs2Amc1umqcVNpsSq89PzZCNsAHamxczNPa9lsyFlVD6QaSa9ir471XmDM6ffi2-coYOuxCgXPHEK8DjsJ5UxoFPwLBVcmHqwYKG7HQqN7SpsOMb_lT1gKoY36QpvvhXDTkvnxO2BWouuhFElxonyihnQ_ycvs5lgsQgA90VOq6lHawy5Wnytl9Nep5gyo_S5DGTRAVLkcZBiim7M524tBjLcQpvqcOoPUwS9kWEsGWv-oMxd53dIauRjtwlSyB5lqxlLMGvrmxQiy36RbsWfJU6Z_m1p6KOlO21ItsUJpDdEL-IthclMPpLr2hixV99o1uPDywkKxXtnSduOZYOupgDEw77_C2Qx_TMdJU4JJ1w15kNu1OH1av5bU05u3mHTcvhZrzIfrL0tq4FoyfmygG2bvLR9eoek__ISBhLkwKhFA7U0SX)
---
Fellow Conservative,

**I would do anything to protect freedom!**

Freedom is the very reason I get up every morning and fight. It is what motivates me to be a leader for our county.

**_Freedom is the cornerstone of America._**

But Fellow Conservative, every single day, that right to be free, that we have as Americans is being threatened; _it is being chipped away before our eyes._

You see, the Democrats that are in charge don’t care about freedom – they care about power. And they will do anything to gain more power... even sacrifice the founding principles of our country.

[**I have always felt a calling to stand for our country,**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cb4e558c2ac44803837f054aae4890b0&_e=N6y57bCnnh86cOix62Up1zx2y71FnS9DtzDxS3GzkHNmQCun_JSN_ludkcYZTVxPYWAJi1KfktbRIHs2Amc1umqcVNpsSq89PzZCNsAHamxczNPa9lsyFlVD6QaSa9ir471XmDM6ffi2-coYOuxCgXPHEK8DjsJ5UxoFPwLBVcmHqwYKG7HQqN7SpsOMb_lT1gKoY36QpvvhXDTkvnxO2BWouuhFElxonyihnQ_ycvs5lgsQgA90VOq6lHawy5Wnytl9Nep5gyo_S5DGTRAVLkcZBiim7M524tBjLcQpvqcC8X1uxIHGWE4TqOXToAHkkXnAXdd2T6egePP1z0qMoUJ0cQb-QwCnMUooCtKP46Af8eiuT76fb6brROSVU6f7f751dqfYVBWqJFR7S8NkafCNMnNIUhaRh_t9kl2AYZVKx-UvvunnClT6mKGsUdHuEVeVqUfWpk_gDor22pTkzZlUxs_3KO7FWJ16yxFxapRMoK2lqNrKIn4SR1SzDcAP) but Fellow Conservative, after seeing what Joe Biden and the radical Democrats are doing, I decided I could not sit on the sidelines anymore. America is in desperate need of a fighter, someone who knows what it is like when freedom is taken away and has seen the suffering of a life without liberty.

After escaping from Communist Cuba, my family and I came to America because it was a beacon for hope and a lighthouse for freedom. It is now my duty to protect those rights so that others are given the same opportunities that we found in America.

[**Fellow Conservative, I need your support to be a freedom fighter in the Senate. body:
Should we cancel it? According to the poll, just “29% oppose the idea” of student debt cancellation. I find that hard to believe. But I thought as a We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=f6822bd3714e4dad8582640fa5c0036e&_e=vzbSMEXGPWanIg8k7PP6IrUgaVxrxHcsgPWDsSS0ZBVWOZA7VjCqayhiSCNXrXP_vCmxDEtGfiYYYcAad5xAL37co6c4pnhLc5ZfUCQJ9YiAcCr7L8VJLpPOi_eh_4yplnBNsmXIONTzMy5U03bZGP4QiEIvae3tmaHTcSm01csD8PUqaIT75Y6Ny_4MqwIUxJS7j3vaxQgMGinUQYQQLIL9CzyoXWAvxEe_a4OAsei89tu4ymEJKU_ZQGEkewZiKSytu8wV6CUW6w7b5bdzITU-_zJSK0Ij5LSsFfzArAL9GVX0fqWd--l8AcrEnUamlO336tc0YJ_1hHEOKdKUDxXQPnjqarDm6xaxW-DVfVi4VnufgjmgbviRDKOecIwZM9oLDqDPdzSMhaalMIetHGsMMfYqVDrnMr0jdWlnMRSnlPDILVE4JeGsOqSji56wN-7iOMZiPXsVH_S_NHPUrw%3D%3D)

_
_
Peter,

Have you seen the polling out this week that finds **19% of Americans** want all student “debt wiped out for all borrowers?”

If President Biden did this, it would add an additional $1.6 trillion to the already out-of-control $30TRILLION + debt we hold as a nation.

Can you imagine what this would do to exacerbate the already out of control inflation we’re experiencing???

According to the poll,**just “29% oppose the idea”** of student debt cancellation. I find that hard to believe. But I thought as a candidate for Congress, I needed to know where my list of supporters stands.

**[Are you one of the 29% who oppose the idea of the cancellation of more than $1.6 trillion in Student Debt?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=f6822bd3714e4dad8582640fa5c0036e&_e=vzbSMEXGPWanIg8k7PP6IrUgaVxrxHcsgPWDsSS0ZBVWOZA7VjCqayhiSCNXrXP_vCmxDEtGfiYYYcAad5xAL37co6c4pnhLc5ZfUCQJ9YiAcCr7L8VJLpPOi_eh_4yplnBNsmXIONTzMy5U03bZGP4QiEIvae3tmaHTcSm01csD8PUqaIT75Y6Ny_4MqwIUxJS7j3vaxQgMGinUQYQQLIL9CzyoXWAvxEe_a4OAsei89tu4ymEJKU_ZQGEkewZisRlorjW1OKTAZs7D8JoJq5ybnb--95_I8h0whsMu2j2t6ktJo8afCa-zCtOguY5ilqIk0Q0VV0jrXu-7V_tNN7ES6EqU_Ks2pKKjMSDz3qL9gEoQT78tnboEkVyNeOmOenPsbKsF0XBaaC3Ok_z9GGCskEiZYcSqKvbKpZWVYPH6FJBcmY-qt5-hTQVXzNHTTkG6TO2vkQq0gFUAnCvU-A%3D%3D)**
**[ ](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=f6822bd3714e4dad8582640fa5c0036e&_e=vzbSMEXGPWanIg8k7PP6IrUgaVxrxHcsgPWDsSS0ZBVWOZA7VjCqayhiSCNXrXP_vCmxDEtGfiYYYcAad5xAL37co6c4pnhLc5ZfUCQJ9YiAcCr7L8VJLpPOi_eh_4yplnBNsmXIONTzMy5U03bZGP4QiEIvae3tmaHTcSm01csD8PUqaIT75Y6Ny_4MqwIUxJS7j3vaxQgMGinUQYQQLIL9CzyoXWAvxEe_a4OAsei89tu4ymEJKU_ZQGEkewZiI7ExLV8lEpjjoYn-jTb9-YbRF_2ynjCFJiKeULs_JKV77ehe91__Eqxc5SoZKlAtS1qjB4U4Rd-8VC359BYbD6dGAuMp1frkYdU3eZO5kUrkmpLXSVNBUPtkUMc9plbt8CupahWS2sMp1UYRUe70MyvrXIqHdAhI7yGHvjh2v_r7NZhvGE-qn_kMD1L-8LgD8xX3c_vS0S19bwvx2nc8dw%3D%3D)**

One I do know is that in my opinion, the cancelation of any student loan debt would send a message to millions of Americans that the United States government offers no questions asked loans to anyone who applies.**[What kind of lesson is that teaching the next generation of young Americans who will be responsible for running the country in the not-so-distant future? ](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=f6822bd3714e4dad8582640fa5c0036e&_e=vzbSMEXGPWanIg8k7PP6IrUgaVxrxHcsgPWDsSS0ZBVWOZA7VjCqayhiSCNXrXP_vCmxDEtGfiYYYcAad5xAL37co6c4pnhLc5ZfUCQJ9YiAcCr7L8VJLpPOi_eh_4yplnBNsmXIONTzMy5U03bZGP4QiEIvae3tmaHTcSm01csD8PUqaIT75Y6Ny_4MqwIUxJS7j3vaxQgMGinUQYQQLIL9CzyoXWAvxEe_a4OAsei89tu4ymEJKU_ZQGEkewZi3TxePyw4nwttWMiErtHQO_SYbqD1hwNz4tEL_VRrf3JSRLyObrJsO8YyJYtscLvT9iBZ1YmHoohh9b30Qh-caJRpLu-iYGfv25ceycF421Xe951dWnWmvpZXgxc4GRj0X7QeAycJ1gptFR1I_RHko6BsBvpBNmWRDZAhrqJ2EACTnGD7UOcoCL4TklPpNfkSmIA2i-F1qOq9Vs2-HMhViA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Should we cancel it? According to the poll, just “29% oppose the idea” of student debt cancellation. I find that hard to believe. But I thought as a We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | Peter, Have you seen the polling out this week that finds 19% of Americans want all student “debt wiped out for all borrowers?” If President Biden did this, it would add an additional $1.6 trillion to the already out-of-control $30TRILLION + debt we hold as a nation. Can you imagine what this would do to exacerbate the already out of control inflation we’re experiencing??? According to the poll,just “29% oppose the idea” of student debt cancellation. I find that hard to believe. But I thought as a candidate for Congress, I needed to know where my list of supporters stands. One I do know is that in my opinion, the cancelation of any student loan debt would send a message to millions of Americans that the United States government offers no questions asked loans to anyone who applies. I appreciate your participation, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. name: Andy Kim
subject: Say its name
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44309743/341043608/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2NhMzc1ZC0xZWMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TX0fW81pddQ4BBPnKfjeCBb7kKOvWwN8jON_2Kf6PiE=&emci=25aa59d0-edbf-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7cca375d-1ec0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=26261389)
---

| | I want to update you on the fight to end the opioid epidemic. It doesn't always get prime time attention on the news, but it continues to hollow out communities nationwide, including in my home district of NJ-03. **People are dying. In fact, at least one person dies in NJ-03 every day.** That means nearly everyone in my district has been hurt by this tragedy, whether they've struggled with addiction personally or watched a loved one wrestle with it. The epidemic isn't merely a drug problem; it's a human-made plague that pushes people apart, making families, friends, and neighbors nearly unrecognizable. But the pain in folks' faces – and the desperation of their actions – is heartbreaking. That's why I've made ending this epidemic a focal point of my work in Congress so far. In my first year in Congress, I joined with members of both parties to back an extra $500 million to fund new research for opioid treatment programs. I also wrote the Synthetic Opioid Danger Awareness Act to warn the public about the dangers of synthetic opioids, including fentanyl and its analogues. I was proud to see this important bill pass the House late last year and will continue to push my colleagues in the Senate to do the same. And this year, I made sure our federal budget included funding for HOPE ONE, a mobile access unit that offers overdose prevention training, referrals to recovery services, and other resources for people and family members struggling with addiction in Burlington County. **I’m proud of our work, but the job’s still a long way from being done.** The need remains great and people are still suffering every day. The scale of this problem demands a massive, thoughtful, evidence-based response. I won’t rest until we have it. Stay tuned, _Andy_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.
---|---

name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220419wu?refcode=lpfe220419wu_m [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220419wu?refcode=lpfe220419wu_m]
We’re proud to share this news with you: Moms Demand Action recognized Lizzie as a Gun Sense Candidate.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220419wu?refcode=lpfe220419wu_m [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220419wu?refcode=lpfe220419wu_m]
This distinction once again recognizes Lizzie’s efforts in Congress advocating for stronger gun-safety policies and preventing gun violence in our communities.
Just last week, Lizzie asked the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives for clear guidance on illegal machine gun conversion devices known as auto sears, weapons that can fire at a rate of up to 1,200 bullets per minute, making shootings even more dangerous and deadly. At the beginning of the year, a gunman shot three Houston police officers using an auto sear that converted the shooter’s semiautomatic pistol into an automatic weapon. The number of auto sears seized by law enforcement quintupled between 2020 and 2021.
Lizzie’s leadership builds on the Biden Administration’s efforts to address the gun violence epidemic in our country. Earlier this month, President Biden issued six executive orders to stop the sale of ghost guns and regulate another type of gun conversion device called stabilizing braces. President Biden’s orders will also encourage red flag laws that keep guns out of dangerous people’s hands, strengthen studies on gun trafficking, and increase investments in community violence intervention programs.
With the vast majority of Americans supporting common-sense gun-safety legislation, the time for action on gun violence is now.
Last week, Lizzie also joined her colleagues from Texas in another important letter: responding to Governor Greg Abbott’s political stunt at the Texas border that disrupted supply chains and left shelves empty across Texas and the country. Times are too difficult and challenges are too serious for political games like this one — that’s why we are so glad to have Lizzie in Congress.
Also a quick reminder: There’s just one week left to register to vote in the upcoming Texas runoff election! If you know someone who isn’t yet registered, the last day to register is April 25. Early voting begins May 16, and the runoff is May 24. Elections matter — and there are really important elections on the runoff ballot that will have huge implications for the future of our state and our country.
Click here to learn how to register to vote or make sure you’re already registered. [https://www.votetexas.gov/]
Thank you for being a part of the team,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220419wu?refcode=lpfe220419wu_m]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

Peter,

There should be no question to _whether_ Arizona can do better than our current leadership. **DAMN RIGHT WE CAN.**

As a two-star general - I’ve had experience flying F-16s in combat over Baghdad, commanding over 8,300 Arizona Guard Troops, and protecting our southern border.

name: Team Ronchetti
subject: See the latest update from the Ronchetti campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
I was blessed to join many friends on Easter Sunday in Aztec to talk about my relationship with God. He, and my family, are my reminder each day of wh _**Note from Mark**_ I was blessed to join many friends on Easter Sunday in Aztec to talk about my relationship with God. He, and my family, are my reminder each day of what I am fighting for. I hope everyone had a blessed holy weekend! We have lots of great events coming up on the campaign trail. I need your support to accomplish all we need to win this race and take back New Mexico. If you have an extra hour or two to volunteer please see the links below to get involved. More than anything, keep talking to your friends and family about our campaign. I appreciate each and every one of you. | |
---
**In the News**
Mark was excited to join Fox News multiple times recently. He discussed the end of Title 42 and illegal immigration in general in New Mexico. We hope you will check out his interviews:
[**Fox Digital Interview**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=62d735cdfbc64fff908e42dcb012740c&_e=-UaUyYJnUrlkKYwoh6euvN1H69d2p4n7nUQoGH9Vuc5zpPKkDB1rvJPdmQ70cld2_TSNmEKOJdLwJ6XtU6Tzx7-cn4O0O4pu_Tq_couQupBsApqN4mt1KI7pLQDFhNqLh3QLscle7H8798eEbZAoSaD4LnWWF_53k0Rp6OlWrEbw69O72GtPkD2u1QZWYRXY8tHN5XYn74EcBiY3-9-NdYQ_z7CPokuNETSpK2NsUHRoO07yZVd7txvqA2b_gS3YJpah9aYd3fZexeHEmw8JSA%3D%3D)

**Field Update**
A huge thank you to the Ronchetti team who showed up for our Volunteer Kick Off Rally in Albuquerque! We had so much fun chatting with you all about how to get involved with the campaign! And a huge thank you to our group of Albuquerque door knockers who hit the pavement with us on an early Saturday morning to contact voters!
We also had a great kick off to our Women for Ronchetti coalition. Almost 50 ladies joined us for a great evening learning more about Mark and how they can get involved with our Women’s coalition!
**_There are so many ways to get involved with Team Ronchetti! Sign up below to:_**
* Host a Meet & Greet
* Make Phone Calls
* Go Door to Door
* Be a Social Media Champion
* Help in the Office
* And more!

clean_body: I was blessed to join many friends on Easter Sunday in Aztec to talk about my relationship with God. He, and my family, are my reminder each day of wh Note from Mark I was blessed to join many friends on Easter Sunday in Aztec to talk about my relationship with God. He, and my family, are my reminder each day of what I am fighting for. I hope everyone had a blessed holy weekend! We have lots of great events coming up on the campaign trail. I need your support to accomplish all we need to win this race and take back New Mexico. If you have an extra hour or two to volunteer please see the links below to get involved. More than anything, keep talking to your friends and family about our campaign. I appreciate each and every one of you. | | In the News Mark was excited to join Fox News multiple times recently. He discussed the end of Title 42 and illegal immigration in general in New Mexico. We hope you will check out his interviews: | Field Update A huge thank you to the Ronchetti team who showed up for our Volunteer Kick Off Rally in Albuquerque! We had so much fun chatting with you all about how to get involved with the campaign! And a huge thank you to our group of Albuquerque door knockers who hit the pavement with us on an early Saturday morning to contact voters! We also had a great kick off to our Women for Ronchetti coalition. Almost 50 ladies joined us for a great evening learning more about Mark and how they can get involved with our Women’s coalition! There are so many ways to get involved with Team Ronchetti! Sign up below to: Host a Meet & Greet Make Phone Calls Go Door to Door Be a Social Media Champion Help in the Office And more! | Upcoming Events More to come! Check out upcoming events with Team Ronchetti: | Chip In! Mark is running because it’s time to restore trusted leadership to the governor's office. YOU can play a huge role in lifting him to victory by becoming a recurring donor. Will you join us by chipping in a few bucks every month until election day? | Featured Merchandise Have you visited our shop? Support the campaign and sport your favorite Ronchetti for Governor swag. From stickers to shirts, order directly from Team Ronchetti! | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer. Please send checks to Mark Ronchetti for Governor. 8100 Wyoming Blvd. NE Ste - M4, Box 225 Albuquerque, NM 87113 Click to unsubscribe.

We only won the Senate majority by _**one seat**_. With this much money, McConnell could have beaten us in the last election -- and if we don't pick up the pace now, he might have enough to flip the Senate red this year.

**If this grassroots team doesn’t step up TODAY, it may be too late!** We MUST keep our Democratic majority out of McConnell’s hands, but right now we’re falling short of our emergency $25,000 goal.

name: Marsh, Team Welch
subject: Our first ad is live. Will you take a look?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
We wanted supporters like you to be among the first to see our new ad.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=266%2E61531%2EqxZiO5)
Hello,
I’m Marsh, the Digital Director on Team Welch. I’m in charge of spreading Peter’s message online, and I need your help. We’re going up with our first TV ad, and I hope you can pitch in a donation to help expand its reach.
[](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1811?t=3&akid=266%2E61531%2EqxZiO5)
In the ad, you’ll see how Peter has rolled up his sleeves to represent Vermont. Whether it’s working to shut down toxic burn pits and ensuring veterans who were exposed to the chemicals get the care they need or lowering the cost of prescription drugs, Peter has fought to get the job done in Congress.
If you watched the ad, you know how compelling it is. I want as many people as possible to see how hard Peter works for them and why he’s the right choice to be our next Senator. _Here’s the thing: I need your help to run this ad online._
[**Every donation we receive before tomorrow helps us get these ads online and reach thousands of Vermonters. Will you make a donation today to directly help this campaign spread Peter’s message?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1810?t=4&akid=266%2E61531%2EqxZiO5)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---

---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1811?t=9&amount=100&akid=266%2E61531%2EqxZiO5)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1811?t=11&akid=266%2E61531%2EqxZiO5)
---

---
I’m from Vermont, and I’ve seen how the GOP can win here, so I know how important this election is. I hope you can help us win.
Thanks,
Marsh
Digital Director

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ed=20the=20Trucker?=
subject: We’re fighting to protect the kids
body:
This has gone on long enough. | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=e7da8b764e&e=ae0ea222da)
---
|

Friend,

We don’t need clarification, Governor Murphy. We need you to stop playing games with our children's education. As the proud father of three, I will always stand up for what’s right for our growing children. Explicit sexual education taught by teachers doesn’t pass muster.
[**< <Donate $15 right now to stop Governor Murphy>>**](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=ef84c6904b&e=ae0ea222da)

[**< <Donate $30 to end the plans for explicit sexual education>>**](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=afc9280058&e=ae0ea222da)

[**< <Donate $45 to say no to teaching “Gender Identity”>>**](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=57fab72372&e=ae0ea222da)
[](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=930b60db9c&e=ae0ea222da)
[](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=fdddf91ee7&e=ae0ea222da)
It is our job to decide when those conversations are appropriate – we don’t need Governor Murphy and the creepy, corrupt NJEA to make those choices for us. Democrats only care about science when it affects their political science, and WE CAN’T TAKE IT ANYMORE.

I will always work to protect you and your family.

Stand by me,

[](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=1d95827a4c&e=ae0ea222da)
Ed Durr
New Jersey State Senator

| | Team, Take a look at this headline: **$1.3 billion.** Revenue like that could help fund a universal early child care system and provide a major boost to education and transportation all across the Commonwealth, a major step towards actually achieving the bold, transformational change that working families need. [_**Our Republican opponents are fighting the millionaires tax, just like they’ll fight any sort of progressive future for our Commonwealth. Chip in $15 to this campaign today and help ensure we come out ahead this fall.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44310516/341046372/5769926?refcode=em_20220419_f_t_millionaire&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmM0MmJjYS0yMGMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h0UlNn7NmSgVhkO5eYovPWzfip19jZ5uTrYeYxv7dLg=) The promise of Massachusetts shouldn’t be limited to select, elite families, and we’re running a campaign to level the playing field more and more, each and every day. Passing the millionaires tax and diverting those funds to our education and transportation systems could be life-changing for generations to come. Big money and special interests are already lining up to oppose the millionaire’s tax, so it’s going to take the full strength of the grassroots movement to beat them at the ballot box. But we can get it done and win this governor’s race and the millionaires tax, together. [_**Can you donate $15 today and help us continue pushing for the progressive change Massachusetts needs?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44310517/341046373/5769926?refcode=em_20220419_f_t_millionaire&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmM0MmJjYS0yMGMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h0UlNn7NmSgVhkO5eYovPWzfip19jZ5uTrYeYxv7dLg=) Saludos, Sonia

clean_body: Passing the millionaires tax could be life-changing for generations to come. | | | | | Team, Take a look at this headline: $1.3 billion. Revenue like that could help fund a universal early child care system and provide a major boost to education and transportation all across the Commonwealth, a major step towards actually achieving the bold, transformational change that working families need. = The promise of Massachusetts shouldn’t be limited to select, elite families, and we’re running a campaign to level the playing field more and more, each and every day. Passing the millionaires tax and diverting those funds to our education and transportation systems could be life-changing for generations to come. Big money and special interests are already lining up to oppose the millionaire’s tax, so it’s going to take the full strength of the grassroots movement to beat them at the ballot box. But we can get it done and win this governor’s race and the millionaires tax, together. = Saludos, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. body:
The proof that one truly believes is in action
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44310681/341047123/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220419FirstDonation_N_KK_90DO_6_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5YTFhOTk2LTIxYzAtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ve_IRr02XrC9vZb85JvBQPfibP-A8ElOKS10z0Ox0tI=)
| Fellow activist,

With just a week left before the May 2nd voter registration deadline for the Pennsylvania primary, I’m reaching out personally to some of our most active supporters who haven’t donated yet. We’ve received a lot of support over the past few weeks heading into this deadline, but we’re still not where we’d like to be in hitting our goals to expand the electorate. **[So how about it, fellow activist — can you step up with a quick donation of $3, $5, or $10 to help us finish out our primary voter registration strong?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44310682/341047125/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220419FirstDonation_N_KK_90DO_6_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5YTFhOTk2LTIxYzAtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ve_IRr02XrC9vZb85JvBQPfibP-A8ElOKS10z0Ox0tI=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44310683/341047126/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220419FirstDonation_N_KK_90DO_6_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5YTFhOTk2LTIxYzAtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ve_IRr02XrC9vZb85JvBQPfibP-A8ElOKS10z0Ox0tI=) I know there’s a lot of competition for your generous contributions, so if you’re not convinced yet, I’d like to highlight a bit about what makes the New Pennsylvania Project special and why you should consider donating to us.
1. We are engaging and empowering young residents and those living in underrepresented and often neglected communities of color and immigrant communities **year-round** , canvassing, holding community and school events, and registration drives.

2. We are working with like-minded partners in these communities across Pennsylvania to expand the electorate in order to reflect our demographically changing population and make a better government that represents the values of **all Pennsylvanians**.

3. **Most of all,** we are providing education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods and mobilizing the electorate to **vote in every election — twice a year.**

**[All that said, I hope you’ll choose now to make your first donation — we could really use it.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44310684/341047128/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220419FirstDonation_N_KK_90DO_6_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5YTFhOTk2LTIxYzAtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ve_IRr02XrC9vZb85JvBQPfibP-A8ElOKS10z0Ox0tI=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44310685/341047130/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220419FirstDonation_N_KK_90DO_6_NG_N_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5YTFhOTk2LTIxYzAtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ve_IRr02XrC9vZb85JvBQPfibP-A8ElOKS10z0Ox0tI=)
In defense of our democracy,

Kadida Kenner

_Founding Executive Director
The New Pennsylvania Project_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44310686/341047131/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220419FirstDonation_N_KK_90DO_6_NG_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5YTFhOTk2LTIxYzAtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ve_IRr02XrC9vZb85JvBQPfibP-A8ElOKS10z0Ox0tI=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented communities of color and immigrant communities. We will register them to vote, provide education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize people to vote in every election._ _[**______**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44310687/341047132/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220419FirstDonation_N_KK_90DO_6_NG_N_BIO&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5YTFhOTk2LTIxYzAtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ve_IRr02XrC9vZb85JvBQPfibP-A8ElOKS10z0Ox0tI=)**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44310688/341047135/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220419FirstDonation_N_KK_90DO_6_NG_N_BIO&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5YTFhOTk2LTIxYzAtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ve_IRr02XrC9vZb85JvBQPfibP-A8ElOKS10z0Ox0tI=)**_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jahmal=20Cole?=
subject: 10 weeks to go
body:
Take Action. Show Up. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/87028faef1bc/10-weeks-to-go?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
# 71 days to bring change.

The time is now to step up and get involved. We have 71 days until the election.
---
| [ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=a217de2774&e=339f142c50)
---
| I launched this campaign when it was uncomfortable, when it took courage. I didn't ask for permission to be the next person in this seat. **I stepped up because I knew that the issues we were facing were too important, too urgent to keep on patiently waiting for change.**

I have been showing up too. I showed up in 2009 when I started volunteering at Cook County Jail, writing rap lyrics as a form of therapy. I showed up in 2013 by taking kids from under-resourced communities on field trips. I showed up throughout the pandemic for seniors, delivering PPE, food, and connecting them to healthcare resources. **I've been showing up, and I am going to keep doing it when I get to Congress because THAT is the kind of leader we need.**

**Now I have to ask you: will you show up for us?** We are building a movement that is going to bring real change to this district, making sure that we all have the resources we need. But I need your help getting there. **We are $5K away from our fundraising goal, and have a lot of doors to knock and texts to send. We have so many ways to take action and be a part of Team Cole, so** **I ask that you show up in whatever way you can.**

Yours in service,
Jahmal

---
| | DONATE
---
| [ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=8abdaac668&e=339f142c50)
---
[DONATE](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=c6303c8910&e=339f142c50)! We are $5K away from our April goal and could use your support. Can you help us get there?
[ ](mailto:kyoung@cole2022.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20host%20a%20fundraiser!&body=I%20want%20to%20host%20a%20fundraiser!)
---
[Host a fundraiser](mailto:kyoung@cole2022.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20host%20a%20fundraiser!&body=I%20am%20interested%20in%20hosting%20a%20fundraiser%20for%20Jahmal%20Cole.%20Could%20you%20give%20me%20details%3F)! If you have 20 friends who might be interested in learning about Jahmal and what we're fighting for, this is a great opportunity to get more people involved. Support always provided.
| | VOLUNTEER
---
| [ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=fb9566b3c1&e=339f142c50)

Join us TOMORROW for our first text bank! We'll provide training and get started at 6pm. [Sign up here](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=f24d37ebf5&e=339f142c50).
[ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=847a5a0407&e=339f142c50)
---
Canvass with us! We are hosting weekend canvasses across the district, and could use your help talking to voters. [Sign up today](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=438dd816cf&e=339f142c50)!

I stepped up because I knew that the issues we were facing were too important, too urgent to keep on patiently waiting for change. I have been showing up too. I showed up in 2009 when I started volunteering at Cook County Jail, writing rap lyrics as a form of therapy. I showed up in 2013 by taking kids from under-resourced communities on field trips. I showed up throughout the pandemic for seniors, delivering PPE, food, and connecting them to healthcare resources. I've been showing up, and I am going to keep doing it when I get to Congress because THAT is the kind of leader we need. Now I have to ask you: will you show up for us? We are building a movement that is going to bring real change to this district, making sure that we all have the resources we need. But I need your help getting there. We are $5K away from our fundraising goal, and have a lot of doors to knock and texts to send. We have so many ways to take action and be a part of Team Cole, so I ask that you show up in whatever way you can. Yours in service, Jahmal | | DONATE | ! We are $5K away from our April goal and could use your support. Can you help us get there? mailto:kyoung@cole2022.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20host%20a%20fundraiser!&body=I%20want%20to%20host%20a%20fundraiser! mailto:kyoung@cole2022.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20host%20a%20fundraiser!&body=I%20am%20interested%20in%20hosting%20a%20fundraiser%20for%20Jahmal%20Cole.%20Could%20you%20give%20me%20details%3F! If you have 20 friends who might be interested in learning about Jahmal and what we're fighting for, this is a great opportunity to get more people involved. Support always provided. | | VOLUNTEER | Join us TOMORROW for our first text bank! We'll provide training and get started at 6pm. . Canvass with us! We are hosting weekend canvasses across the district, and could use your help talking to voters. ! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Friends of Jahmal Cole, All rights reserved.

body:
Let's keep on hammering down Peter | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7c7a696101&e=fe4b890356)
---
| **Today marks an important deadline in the Governor's race, Peter.**

Signatures to get your name on the Republican Primary ballot were due today - 15,000 valid signatures from Michigan voters.

Several so-called "frontrunners" in this race were scrambling to get their signatures in before the deadline - paying big bucks to hire paid, out-of-state petition circulators. So much for Michigan First?

Good thing for us, we were the first to submit signatures \- **_over 21,000_** \- _way back in January_ , and delivered our final few thousand earlier today.
---

| THANK YOU to every Michigander who signed or circulated our petition these past 8 months. This is YOUR campaign for Governor, and I can't tell you how much I appreciate our volunteers who devoted their time and talents to moving us forward.

In a few weeks, we'll know which candidates will be on the Republican Primary ballot on August 2nd. **We must be prepared to overcome silver spoon self-funders and establishment insiders** \- _and I need your help to continue beating expectations with grassroots fundraising. _

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: an outrageous amount of money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Now, it's going to take even more resources to make sure Mitch's noise doesn't drown out Malcolm's message
#

We have bad news, folks:
Politico reported that a Mitch McConnell-connected super PAC will spend $24 million — yes, $24,000,000 — in Pennsylvania over the next few months to defend Pat Toomey's old seat.
That's an outrageous amount of money, frankly. And now, it's going to take even more resources to make sure Mitch's noise doesn't drown out Malcolm's message before our May 17 primary. So we're asking:
[Will you please rush $3 to help us prepare for the barrage of dark money that’s about to hit Pennsylvania? We need a surge of grassroots support today to make sure our message for working families stands out no matter what the Republicans throw at us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44310847/341047601/-347403939?refcode2=55e8f2ad-22c0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220419-1-30-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWU4ZjJhZC0yMmMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHJUrBz37_LpQvGgpggQM2yVnEGMtY6yjkXXPARqY5M=)

This race is shaping up to be one of the most expensive in the entire country, and it's only going to get worse.
Malcolm isn’t accepting any donations from corporate PACs, and unlike others in this race, he doesn’t have large amounts of personal wealth to pour into this campaign.
So that means he’s counting on us. The only way we’ll have the resources to win this primary and defend our Democratic Senate majority is if we’re in this together.
We're relying on the response we receive to emails like this one to keep our message in front of voters and win this race. That is why we're asking you directly:
[Please — can you chip in $3 or any amount to Malcolm Kenyatta today? Every donation will help elect Malcolm to the Senate and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44310849/341047603/-347403939?refcode2=55e8f2ad-22c0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220419-1-30-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWU4ZjJhZC0yMmMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHJUrBz37_LpQvGgpggQM2yVnEGMtY6yjkXXPARqY5M=)
Thanks for adding your support today,
Team Malcolm

Everything comes down to this. | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-wrapper?refcode=em-header&link_id=0&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-morning-of-may-25th&email_referrer=email_1516204&email_subject=another-tv-ad&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1516204) Peter, we have two MAJOR updates:
1. Henry Cuellar just started running a **brand-new** TV ad.
2. The latest FEC report just came out and **Cuellar has $1.4 million dollars** cash on hand.

All of our work over the last two years comes down to this runoff election and we need your help to fight back against Cuellar corporate PAC checks. [_**Will you rush a $3 donation right now to help us increase our TV ad spend since Henry Cuellar just launched a new ad?**_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-email-20220419?refcode=em20220419&link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-morning-of-may-25th&email_referrer=email_1516204&email_subject=another-tv-ad&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1516204) [Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-email-20220419?refcode=em20220419&link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-morning-of-may-25th&email_referrer=email_1516204&email_subject=another-tv-ad&refcodeEmailReferrer=email_1516204) We don’t want to wake up on May 25th — the morning after the runoff — and wonder if there was anything else we could have done. name: Tony Vargas
subject: I just stepped off the stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I need you in my corner

|
---

| | I just stepped off the debate stage. [**_I spent every second up there fighting for you. Now, I’m asking you to fight for me. The latest poll has me narrowly WINNING -- so your $14 has never been more important than it is in this critical moment. If I win, we could actually secure the House for Democrats. So please, can I count on you to chip in? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44310877/341047800/1129282168?refcode=20220419_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzc4NjlmNy0yMmMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qcve7IuGArAdtGaWSKnzSF-Lw36gf813PgvOyzjZjsQ=) Not only did we stand up for working families everywhere... We proved that someone who comes from an immigrant family like I do... Who lived from paycheck to paycheck... Who struggled to overcome adversity like I did... Can flip this seat for Democrats. [**_I need a massive showing of support in these next 24 hours to show the strength of my campaign and prove that I’m in this for the long haul. I left it all out on that debate stage. If I made you proud, your $14 would mean so much to me in this moment. Can I count on you? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44310878/341047802/1129282168?refcode=20220419_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzc4NjlmNy0yMmMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qcve7IuGArAdtGaWSKnzSF-Lw36gf813PgvOyzjZjsQ=) I know I can win this primary and take on Don Bacon. He was just declared the most vulnerable incumbent in Congress. The latest poll shows me LEADING him by 1 point. Now, GOP donors panicked and rushed him cash. body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3353%2E3611125%2EY5oPYU ][IMG]

Folks,

Donald Trump just endorsed far-right Silicon Valley hack JD Vance for
Ohio’s open Senate seat. And honestly, that probably tells you all you
need to know about the guy.

But let’s assume—for some wacky reason—you actually wanted to know more
about JD Vance. Well, we’ve compiled 5 things you should know about Donald
Trump’s new favorite lackey.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10863?t=1014&amount=25&akid=3353%2E3611125%2EY5oPYU ]But first, if you’re ready to defeat JD Vance and his far-right
backers, will you chip in $25 to support Tim Ryan for Ohio’s open Senate
seat?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10863?t=1015&amount=25&akid=3353%2E3611125%2EY5oPYU ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10863?t=1016&amount=50&akid=3353%2E3611125%2EY5oPYU ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10863?t=1017&amount=100&akid=3353%2E3611125%2EY5oPYU ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10863?t=1018&amount=200&akid=3353%2E3611125%2EY5oPYU ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10863?t=1019&amount=250&akid=3353%2E3611125%2EY5oPYU ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10863?t=1020&amount=30&akid=3353%2E3611125%2EY5oPYU ]Other Amount

1. Vance is backed by billionaire Peter Thiel’s multi-million dollar super
PAC. Seriously, there is no limit to the amount of money Vance and his
allies can (and will) spend to buy this Senate seat.

2. And let’s not forget that JD Vance already has the support of Marjorie
Taylor Greene, Tucker Carlson, and Donald Trump Jr. Yikes.

3. He attacked Tim for making this campaign “about union jobs” and
“blue-collar workers.” Yes, that’s exactly what our campaign is about.
Thanks for understanding, JD.

4. After calling Tim “a fraud and a phony,” Vance tweeted that for the low
price of $10,800, you could have dinner with him and Peter Thiel. Because
nothing says “I represent the working class” like charging someone $10,800
for dinner.

5. Tim is polling just one point ahead of JD Vance. And that was before
the entire MAGA fundraising operation threw their support behind his
extremist campaign!

We could go on and on. But we promised we’d stop at five (and honestly,
we’re starting to feel a little sick having to type all of this out). So
here’s the bottom line ...

Dark money groups and millionaire GOP donors are getting ready to throw
unlimited resources behind Vance’s campaign and the vicious attacks on Tim
are about to ramp up.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10863?t=1021&amount=25&akid=3353%2E3611125%2EY5oPYU ]So, if we want to take down JD Vance and his entire far-right
fundraising operation, we need your help. Please—will you chip in any
amount to support Tim’s campaign and defeat Donald Trump’s handpicked
Senate candidate in the process?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10863?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3353%2E3611125%2EY5oPYU ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10863?t=1009&amount=50&akid=3353%2E3611125%2EY5oPYU ]Donate $50

Thanks for your support,

Team Ryan

body:
He’s a proven leader that has defended our nation at our forefronts, now he’s onto his next mission: defending our country from Radical Democrats. | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=62b29a059df64b368d4b52817e754765&_e=szTaAXKvU8yh_FUAcOiOcoQIB5HsRjNB5CUAOjFEB5akBhbs4IvBC55RyuU8e4ZxhnzkWVKp5h0iB2Mn4byemb5iPdFR-TUHw4gxqgOpjx5L7L2lQwHMuvbylY0g_rCnBYhC9OQGy0jGBKcqWu65AfWlGtHq5qmXowizE4jTW181WPW86aiwSVNofd71vUroGjb5HWNWbaZJ4F3qGSSPhYGqA1_a92zPbhTduXAeGePWtNpXvPQZia-LHnZHZn4OqEzBi45T31Pkt1JdGQMt8OkksYvk-1rdO86iEzmKyngzQsdm_KzPyCbmWG09cp6u8lH7Ojmv1594j677xm5CzIhhV2AKKnhDUD1lYHT9VRfBO3JcSEshAgh8Nyl15Mag)

Fellow American,

Here’s what I know for sure: Washington D.C. _does not_ need any more Far-left members of Congress who fail to understand the importance of freedom and putting America first.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: RSVP: Virtual Debate Watch Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Join us for a fun-filled night while we watch John at the debate!
#
Hi Derek,
The first televised primary debate of 2022 is this Thursday, April 21, and we need all hands on deck to support John as he takes the debate stage!
**That’s why you’re invited to our campaign’s official Virtual Debate Watch Party this Thursday, April 21 at 7:30 PM ET!**
Together,we’ll cheer on John and amplify our campaign’s message on social media. Plus, our team has **all kinds of exclusive activities in store —** join us for official campaign trivia, a brand-new social media training, and of course watching John debate
[**Can you RSVP now to let John know you’ll be coming to support him while he’s on the debate stage? Thursday, April 21 at 7:30 PM ET is your chance to show support for our campaign and get involved right now.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47393?t=1&akid=5440%2E434096%2EYc0rcl)
**[RSVP](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47393?t=2&akid=5440%2E434096%2EYc0rcl)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47393?t=3&akid=5440%2E434096%2EYc0rcl)
Make sure to share this invitation with friends + family who might want to join – we want as many supporters as possible to be a part of our Virtual Debate Watch Party.
See you soon,
Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220419-5440-footer&t=4&refcode2=5440_434096_Yc0rcl&akid=5440%2E434096%2EYc0rcl)**

Plus, our team has all kinds of exclusive activities in store — join us for official campaign trivia, a brand-new social media training, and of course watching John debate Make sure to share this invitation with friends + family who might want to join – we want as many supporters as possible to be a part of our Virtual Debate Watch Party. name: Mark Kelly Breaking News
subject: This is an all-hands-on-deck moment
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — we have a very troubling update this afternoon. Do you have a minute?
**FIRST:** A Mitch McConnell-backed super PAC dropped $14 million in ads against Mark.
**THEN:** Donald Trump said he‘s set to make an endorsement in our race.
**NOW:** Politico just projected that Republicans will RETAKE THE SENATE.
This is an all-hands-on-deck moment. With Mark’s race a complete toss-up, control of the Senate is on the line. Arizona’s seat is the difference between Minority Leader Mitch McConnell and Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.
So, if Mark is going to defend this seat and win again, he needs you to make your first donation to this campaign. It’s our only chance.
That’s why we are respectfully asking:

A lot of people are asking me why I decided to run. The simple answer is: _I'm in it for the right reasons._ I've got a public servant's heart, and I'm willing to serve the American people.

Peter, I recently went on Fox News for the first time since I announced I was running to represent the great people of Alaska in the United States Congress. A lot of people are asking me why I decided to run. The simple answer is: I'm in it for the right reasons. I've got a public servant's heart, and I'm willing to serve the American people. I've been fighting for a better America my entire life, and I'm looking forward to proving why I am the best candidate, the only candidate, who can fight to put Alaska First every single day. Your support will be the difference between a winning and a losing campaign, Peter. Can I count on you to step up? Thank you, Sarah Palin Candidate for Congress for Alaska | Paid for by Sarah for Alaska. | P.O. BOX 871235 WASILLA, AK 99687 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

| Peter,

Yes, it’s true that our campaign has a lot of momentum. We led the field in the first three months of 2022 in fundraising, and we did it with two-thirds of our contributions coming in at $50 or less!

And we’ve received humbling endorsements, including our most recent endorsement from the Carpenters Union!

So you might be asking:[ _**why does Josh’s campaign need to keep asking for contributions?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44312134/341053706/-1015964469?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220419-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODkzZWY2ZS0yOGMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MZPCFPfC5dYhvpCZhK_53BHE4wn8RVk8YsDGVhOmUCg=)

And here’s the truth, Peter: you don’t have to give to every email we send (and we don’t expect you to).

But, we still have a lot of funds to raise to meet our full budget, reach enough voters, and the only way we can keep up our momentum is if everyone chips in a few bucks when they can to help send Josh Riley to Congress.

[_**So, we’re emailing to humbly ask you to make your first $5 contribution to support our grassroots-powered movement.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44312135/341053707/-1015964469?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220419-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODkzZWY2ZS0yOGMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MZPCFPfC5dYhvpCZhK_53BHE4wn8RVk8YsDGVhOmUCg=)

clean_body: Yes, it’s true that our campaign has a lot of momentum. | = | Peter, Yes, it’s true that our campaign has a lot of momentum. We led the field in the first three months of 2022 in fundraising, and we did it with two-thirds of our contributions coming in at $50 or less! And we’ve received humbling endorsements, including our most recent endorsement from the Carpenters Union! So you might be asking:= And here’s the truth, Peter: you don’t have to give to every email we send (and we don’t expect you to). body:
Here’s the deal, Peter,

The Democrats are in control, and they are on a path of destruction.
❌ reckless spending
❌ skyrocketing inflation
❌ open borders
❌ failing America on the national stage
❌ pandemic restrictions

But we have a chance to take back the majority and end the reckless socialist agenda the Democrats are aggressively forcing on Americans.

But to succeed, we need committed conservatives, like you, on our team who we can rely on to be with us every step of the way.

When we were reviewing our records, your name stuck out as one of our top supporters. So, we wanted to send you our exclusive Take Back the Senate Majority questionnaire.

Thank you,
NRSC

| | More exciting news. **My team just released our second ad today! **It's all about my work passing one of the country's most progressive and comprehensive reproductive rights laws. Take a look: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44312402/341054830/-750309136?refcode=2022-04-19-abortion-ad&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d5ed9316-2ac0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWVkOTMxNi0yYWMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5dv-LNWGAT8fiH7LXRJPMBkO4l4yhDEvcF325W31oy8=) **I fought for reproductive freedom in Oregon, and now we're one of the ****few places where people won't lose their abortion rights if**** _Roe v. name: Morganizing Team
subject: Two weeks 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Morganizers are trying to engage every community in Ohio in this election and we need your help to make sure they have what they need.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220419-969-footer-ak&t=2&akid=969%2E90090%2EFIWQMB)
Can you believe we only have two weeks until the primary?
The Morganizing team certainly can! We have been working every day to turn out the vote for Morgan and engage communities in the democratic process. **[Can you support the campaign with a contribution now to help us win on May 3rd?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/32026?t=3&akid=969%2E90090%2EFIWQMB)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/32032?refcode=em20220419-969&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=969%2E90090%2EFIWQMB)**
We know that we can’t just show up two weeks before Election Day and expect voters to vote our way, even if they are Democrats. **We’ve seen time and time again that early engagement is crucial to defeating the GOP.**
That’s why the campaign built a Morganizing team months ago – and we have been full speed ever since. Now, we need your help to buy the supplies we need to keep up the pace: food, paper, clipboards, literature with more information about Morgan, and everything else. **[Will you make a contribution of $14 or whatever you can afford now to support our Morganizing team?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/32026?t=23&akid=969%2E90090%2EFIWQMB)**
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/32026?t=24&akid=969%2E90090%2EFIWQMB)
From all of us, thank you!
Onwards,
The Morganizing Team

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220419-969-footer&t=25&refcode2=969_90090_FIWQMB&akid=969%2E90090%2EFIWQMB)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=969%2E90090%2EFIWQMB)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

| | Peter, Do you support American energy independence?

Joe Biden’s crusade against American energy producers is coming back to haunt our country in a big way. Gas prices are through the roof, and he’s practically begging dictators to take our money.

As Republicans, we believe it’s a complete failure on all levels.

If you agree, we’re putting together a petition to push the United States towards an energy independent future. Will you sign on?
