name: =?utf-8?Q?Bruce=20Starr?=
subject: News release - U.S. SENATE CANDIDATE HARBICK IS REPUBLICAN FRONTRUNNER
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Harbick for U
body:
Darin Harbick is Republican Frontrunner | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/484c294b215c/meet-darin-harbick-and-kyle-blain-8948129?e=97f786938b)
---
| | **NEWS RELEASE**
Harbick for U.S. Senate
PO Box 2122
McKenzie Bridge, OR 97413

April 19, 2022

**Takes the lead in straw polls and fundraising**
**U.S. SENATE CANDIDATE HARBICK IS REPUBLICAN FRONTRUNNER**

**McKenzie Bridge, Ore. –** U.S. Senate candidate Darin Harbick has taken the lead among the six other Republican candidates running in the Oregon primary election scheduled May 17.

Harbick is leading his Republican competition on two fronts – public opinion polls and fundraising.

One straw poll, conducted by Northwest Observer, shows Harbick leading by more votes than his competition combined having more than 63 percent of the vote. The Northwest Observer is an online news website at [northwestobserver.com](https://harbickforussenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3dd8e7fd3b4e92c0bcc1988f&id=3a6b0bb384&e=97f786938b). A straw poll is an unofficial ballot that is taken to discover how people intend to vote in an election.

Another straw poll, conducted by Benton County GOP Central Committee, shows Harbick ahead of all his competition after a candidates’ debate in Corvallis on March 31. Harbick walked away as the preferred candidate among voting members of the audience, receiving 33 ballots out of 40 total over three rounds of voting.

“While these straw polls are not scientific surveys and don’t illustrate a representative sample, it does clearly identify Darin has the support of a majority of GOP primary voters,” said Harbick’s campaign manager Bruce Starr.

In taking the lead in the straw polls Harbick has the momentum to win the race to represent the Republican Party and face off against Democratic incumbent U.S. Sen. Ron Wyden in November, according to Starr.

Starr pointed out that Harbick has received more campaign financial contributions than his Republican competitors.

“Darin has raised more than three times the amount of money of all his primary opponents combined by the end of the first quarter,” Starr said. “In addition, he has more than five times the amount of his closest competitor.”

Harbick’s total contributions come to $265, 692 with $66,317 cash on hand. Sam Palmer’s total is $65,084 with $10,788 cash on hand. Jo Rae Perkins total is $21,809 with $14,110 cash on hand. Jason Beebe’s total is $12,774 with $4,814.37 cash on hand. And Ibra Taher’s total is $6,263, with $0 cash on hand. All contributions stated are as of March 31. Two candidates, Chris Christensen and Robert Fleming, reported no political contributions.

“Given the success Harbick has garnered so far, in terms of campaign contributions and opinion polls, he definitely is the probable candidate who will face Sen. Wyden in the general election,” Starr said.

Harbick said his strong lead and public support reflects what he is hearing on the campaign trail.

"I am grateful to Oregonians who have rallied around my campaign message of fighting inflation, securing the border, properly managing our forests and public lands, and ending the extraordinary federal government overreach and spending,” Harbick said. “Oregonians want a clear choice between the status quo and a new path for Oregon in November," he added.

Voters in Oregon will elect one member to the U.S. Senate in the general election on Nov. 8, 2022. The primary is scheduled for May 17 next month. The election will fill the Senate seat held by Ron Wyden (D), who first took office in 1996.

For details about Harbick and his platform, public events and endorsements, visit online at [harbickforUSSenate.com](https://harbickforussenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3dd8e7fd3b4e92c0bcc1988f&id=510138d62e&e=97f786938b).

**About Darin Harbick**
Darin Harbick, 53, was born in Springfield, Ore. and lives in Rainbow, Ore. Harbick graduated from McKenzie High School. His career experience includes working in management at a national-chain grocery store; owning and managing restaurants, a grocery store and motel; establishing a state-licensed, faith-based mental care treatment facility in Rainbow; and starting a logging and hauling business. Harbick has served on the McKenzie School District Board of Directors, McKenzie Chamber of Commerce, and Travel Lane County tourism board. He has also coached women’s’ basketball teams at the middle school, high school and college levels. Harbick and his wife Kail have three adult children and two grandsons. For information about Harbick and his platform, public events and endorsements, visit online at [harbickforUSSenate.com](https://harbickforussenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3dd8e7fd3b4e92c0bcc1988f&id=c7148148ae&e=97f786938b).

# # #
**Media Contact:**
Bruce Starr, campaign manager
503-310-7500
[bruce@harbickforussenate.com](mailto:bruce@harbickforussenate.com)

| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc)._

---
REGISTERED TO: **YOU**
STATUS AS OF 4.19: **INCOMPLETE**
APPROXIMATE TIME COMMITMENT: **90 SECONDS** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/will-you-vote/?source=VPP_20220419_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc) [**WILL YOU VOTE IN 2022?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/will-you-vote/?source=VPP_20220419_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/will-you-vote/?source=VPP_20220419_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=10&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc)

[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/will-you-vote/?source=VPP_20220419_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=12&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc)
_*YOU ARE**ONE OF 1,500 DEMOCRATS** SELECTED FOR THIS POLL BECAUSE OF YOUR COMMITMENT TO THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY. PLEASE, ANSWER HONESTLY BEFORE MIDNIGHT!*_
Friend, as you read this, Republicans are scheming to destroy our Democratic Majorities in the House and Senate.

**Our Majorities are so slim, they are hanging on by a THREAD ... _and the GOP only needs to win a handful of seats to FLIP CONGRESS RED._**

That's why we desperately need to know your plans for November:
_Please, let us know by MIDNIGHT:_
[**WILL YOU VOTE IN 2022?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/will-you-vote/?source=VPP_20220419_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=13&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc)
[YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/will-you-vote/?source=VPP_20220419_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=14&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc)
---
[NO »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/will-you-vote/?source=VPP_20220419_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=15&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/will-you-vote/?source=VPP_20220419_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=16&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc)
With our Majorities so slim, we NEED to hear from top Democrats like you as we plan our strategy, identify roadblocks, and chart our path to victory.

**We only selected 1,500 Democrats, and you were one of them -- because YOUR feedback is so valuable, Friend.**

**Before midnight, take 90 seconds to complete our urgent poll:**
[**WILL YOU VOTE IN 2022?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/will-you-vote/?source=VPP_20220419_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=17&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc)
[YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/will-you-vote/?source=VPP_20220419_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=18&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc)

[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/will-you-vote/?source=VPP_20220419_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=20&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc)
Thank you,

_\--VPP Research Team_

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=5&akid=1877%2E878179%2EcQ5Tjc)

**As of this week, this race is officially TIED –– and Dean asked us to reach out because he needs**** _your_****help to take first place and take back Nevada.**

* _Record-high gas prices_

**It doesn’t have to be like this, Peter. **_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: Eliminate Taxes on Social Security Income
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
As Tax Day 2022 passes us by, I am thankful that two weeks ago the Senate voted to eliminate the tax on Social Security income | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=0414e8ec2f&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | | As Tax Day 2022 passes us by, I am thankful that two weeks ago the Senate voted to eliminate the tax on Social Security income and cut the first-rate of income tax nearly in half. If enacted this would be the largest tax cut in the history of the state of Minnesota. I voted YES and am working hard with my colleagues to get this across the finish line. Minnesotans are overtaxed and we deserve our money back! Watch my video from this day on [Facebook](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=058db73dc1&e=9d6926af69).
---
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=cd2e654c6b&e=9d6926af69)
---
| **Your Support**

Together we can fight to create a Safer, Better, and Stronger Minnesota!

We have a long road to get through the state convention next month and the general election in November but we can defeat Tim Walz and put Minnesota on the right track.

**If you can help please donate by making a secure donation today at [https://secure.winred.com/michelle-for-minnesota/donate](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=4bafd546df&e=9d6926af69)**

Sincerely,

[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=9b513f3d33&e=9d6926af69)
Michelle Benson
[Candidate for Governor](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=c61ec88355&e=9d6926af69)

PS
Don’t hesitate to visit my website at [www.michelle4mn.com](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=9d19ef6d72&e=9d6926af69) or to reach out via email: [Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com](mailto:Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com) or by phone at (612) 356-2256 if you have any questions or would like to volunteer to help my campaign.

name: Team AOC
subject: 4 anti-trans measures you should know about — and how to fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria believes that Trans Lives Matter, and our movement will continue fighting for trans liberation and gender equity.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220419-2960-header&t=1&akid=2960%2E2526796%2ERg1AIb)
From Texas to Florida, we’re seeing legislatures pass anti-trans and anti-LGBTQ bills — on everything from sports to banning educators from discussing gender identity and sexuality in the classroom – that severely threaten the daily lives of trans folks.
These attacks are fueled by the misogyny and transphobia that’s alive and well in the Republican party.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220419?refcode=em20220419-2960-P_FND_CHA_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2960_2526796_Rg1AIb&akid=2960%2E2526796%2ERg1AIb)
We’ve compiled four of the most recent anti-trans attacks and pieces of legislation that have passed in the last few months in hopes of educating our communities so that we can collectively fight back:
1. Earlier this month, **Alabama Governor Kay Ivey signed SB 184 into law, criminalizing healthcare providers who offer gender-affirming care to transgender youth.** The law would subject doctors to 10 years in prison for providing puberty blockers and hormones to trans kids1, effectively relegating trans youth to nearly zero bodily autonomy until adulthood.
2. **Alabama’s Governor Ivey also signed HB 322 into law this month,** forcing trans children to use bathrooms of their birth sex and banning discussions of sexual orientation or gender identity in kindergarten through fifth grade.2
3. In February, **Texas Governor Abbott made an alarming announcement when he directed state agencies to investigate gender-affirming care for minors as “child abuse,”** calling on doctors, teachers, and the general public to report the parents of trans children for prosecution.3 This announcement came as Texas Attorney General Paxton released an opinion claiming that gender-affirming care for minors “can legally constitute child abuse under several provisions” of state law.
4. In what has become a centerpiece of public attention in regards to anti-LGBTQ legislation, **Florida recently passed what has been dubbed the “Don’t Say Gay” law** which prohibits classroom discussion of “sexual orientation and gender identity” in order to target LGBTQ+ students, teachers, and curriculum topics.4 This forces many queer and trans kids, and kids with LGBTQ+ parents, to find themselves the targets of censorship.

These attacks put trans youth in direct fire. Trans youth already face the highest rate of youth homelessness, and Black trans women face disproportionate fatal violence. This in addition to discrimination many trans people face in employment and housing.
**Alexandria believes that Trans Lives Matter, and our movement will continue fighting for trans liberation and gender equity — that means fighting for gender protections that include TLGBQ+ folks in the public and private sphere.**
[If you’re able to, can you help us fight back against these attacks by splitting a contribution between our movement and SONG Power? SONG Power is the political arm of Southerners on New Ground — a home for LGBTQ liberation that is building a multi-issue southern justice movement in the struggle for dignity and justice for all people.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220419?refcode=em20220419-2960-P_FND_CHA_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2960_2526796_Rg1AIb&akid=2960%2E2526796%2ERg1AIb)
**[Split a $3 contribution for Trans Lives](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220419?refcode=em20220419-2960-P_FND_CHA_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2960_2526796_Rg1AIb&akid=2960%2E2526796%2ERg1AIb)**
Thank you for standing up for trans lives today,
Team AOC
* * *
1 - [Montgomery Advertiser
](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13485?t=23&akid=2960%2E2526796%2ERg1AIb)2 - [Montgomery Advertiser
](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13485?t=24&akid=2960%2E2526796%2ERg1AIb)3 - [them.
](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13486?t=25&akid=2960%2E2526796%2ERg1AIb)4 - [them.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13487?t=26&akid=2960%2E2526796%2ERg1AIb)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220419?refcode=em20220419-2960-P_FND_CHA_LEG&t=27&refcode2=2960_2526796_Rg1AIb&akid=2960%2E2526796%2ERg1AIb)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220419-2960-P_FND_CHA_LEG&t=28&akid=2960%2E2526796%2ERg1AIb)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Team Sinema
subject: Arizona’s fourth national park
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
We might be biased, but when it comes to our nation’s natural spaces, Arizona’s are by far the most stunning. We’re proud to be home to the Grand Canyon, a national treasure and an engine for our state’s economy. That’s why Kyrsten introduced the _Grand Canyon Protection Act_ to protect Arizona’s water supply, outdoor recreation opportunities, tourism industries, and tribal communities, and she’s continuing her work to preserve Arizona’s natural resources for generations to come. **So since it’s National Park Week, we’re excited to share that Arizona is close to adding another national park to the list.** This month, the Senate unanimously passed the _Chiricahua National Park Act,_ which Kyrsten cosponsored, designating the area surrounding Chiricahua National Monument in southern Arizona as Chiricahua National Park. The 12,025 acre site is a "Wonderland of Rocks" with 17 miles of hiking trails — and it’s another incredible example of Arizona’s extraordinary outdoors. This bill will help protect the Chiricahua National Monument, boost tourism, and create jobs. **Chiricahua National Park would be Arizona’s fourth national park, joining the Grand Canyon, Petrified Forest, and Saguaro.** [**Team, will you kick off National Park Week with us and add your name supporting our work to ensure the _Chiricahua National Park Act_ is signed into law?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44314280/341062864/60096677?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220419_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDUwZTk4Ny0zMGMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x23NEF9mMmj13FGSHJjtjOG1j8-KHdwEoH70nN9aMrw=&emci=111cd884-2cc0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8450e987-30c0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2415496) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44314281/341062865/60096677?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220419_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDUwZTk4Ny0zMGMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x23NEF9mMmj13FGSHJjtjOG1j8-KHdwEoH70nN9aMrw=&emci=111cd884-2cc0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8450e987-30c0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2415496)

Peter,

Fiscal insanity in Washington is catching up with us. It’s far past time to fix this mess.

Our national debt recently hit the $30 TRILLION mark – an almost unfathomable figure.

And a new report from the Federal Reverse has confirmed that Joe Biden’s reckless spending last year is to blame for the 41-year high inflation that’s driving up the cost of virtually everything we consume!

If MTG were an effective representative, she’d be leading the charge to rein in this insanity. But she’s not. She’s entirely consumed by conspiracy theories and publicity stunts.

Jennifer is running to GET THINGS DONE in Washington. She’s fighting for our future.

Your support now is crucial as we ramp up to WIN the primary on May 24th!

body:
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=1b606dfdd82f4bd39a588ba1b539136b&_e=6-8NnQa3jPRwDSGmm7FkZikuzjLppX6BvmPlzUT1vlHG1QMdxTRDIIM6MoifJ0MBjZOguOrXh41MkPqdkxnAoP_F3ajmMFNW6NX96Ar7yRQrHCZuVxEd7eVBnm7A09pl3gJRmwX10CBtwfodZ-ufGzjHmjjQP2Ycc9tmwAjyR5aZqmsw9rNm5oizY9Qte7s-uNhRE272xDBAlKroVi0AUzxser-DF07sPA-skEyP-zxnva3xHy1A4gGU3tsyL4U-FNX3NSSvyMNFn9k3nGLHsJ5iTtwxMmpFQ-wm1nIvxtHR84GNJZMqxQSvvFv2x3Dp0lpX8jPD-mWFj-EeWPU0hNgX0ws73HiaoxX4mYoFbdM%3D) My friend, I am honored to be endorsed by former US Congresswoman Michele Bachmann! Please see her endorsement below. Thank you, [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=1b606dfdd82f4bd39a588ba1b539136b&_e=6-8NnQa3jPRwDSGmm7FkZikuzjLppX6BvmPlzUT1vlHG1QMdxTRDIIM6MoifJ0MBjZOguOrXh41MkPqdkxnAoP_F3ajmMFNW6NX96Ar7yRQrHCZuVxEd7eVBnm7A09pl3gJRmwX10CBtwfodZ-ufG8_6IXnBP7JdxZoYoqq_-U_0Pr1ZrIh9x1afNOb5jvBgP_r4VUf6JY8XsyCDhTE9Gw6dooioHIbdoKhG2VmAv3nsLVG7RvYY5Ex6zNPCCbvRRqe_ENLflj-qqdbvkUzTRLr5PzmA5Z0t8yOmU8JZcOt-a7EGdbY1rxl1MERdClWhvbRun4wjFill5jI-K0POVDf-ZvFcOHsHM9eZ4geQA_U%3D) Senator Paul Gazelka _Candidate for Governor_ [**Join Rep. Bachmann >> Donate NOW**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=1b606dfdd82f4bd39a588ba1b539136b&_e=6-8NnQa3jPRwDSGmm7FkZikuzjLppX6BvmPlzUT1vlHG1QMdxTRDIIM6MoifJ0MBjZOguOrXh41MkPqdkxnAoP_F3ajmMFNW6NX96Ar7yRQrHCZuVxEd7eVBnm7A09pl3gJRmwX10CBtwfodZ-ufG6qHU0zbTzHjsWuM1A0H5Fm5li6ASnnKU-fWOZqQHf_UNKfnLx9kNErCL94c2Yt4IwZn2rCn7TljrG-7VjimTOPQDa3gFKZ1hWcyx0WZyQLTgpE_eCF0zTQ0b8bchJ__j-DDYg9JLeR3JS9cNQqFVj2U3klXrCGtoUookg0UdQO4P7EJPRO1LA9ZR2914cU0aTzulznyYEl16FMix5Ob-rM%3D) Beloved fellow conservatives, and wonderful Minnesota friends, This is a momentous day with the potential to course correct the perilous path Minnesota politics has taken our once sane exemplary state. God help us to recognize how truly grave the times are that we live in. We’re beyond the twilight of a fading western civilization, we’re actually closer to days of lawlessness than to reason. Your pulse must inform you instinctively the urgency of this moment. If we don’t grasp the chance to take courageous, bold actions now, a formerly independent, innovative strong Minnesota will descend into near-irreversible poverty; our shopping/public venues will become too dangerous to allow for normal commerce, and our schools will delude our kids into hating their God given bodies, their parents, or our faith in God and our true heritage. You know these things are already happening in Minnesota where we’ve become a place we no longer recognize. Our highways and roadsides are now made filthy by litter and graffiti. It’s soul crushing to look at because Minnesota was never like this. We need to wake up now and recognize we pay unusually high taxes for lavish salaries going primarily to the political left, while regular Minnesotan’s can no longer find basic justice nor simple public safety. We can’t even trust many Minnesota medical experts or hospitals anymore. Their advice killed and hurt a lot of people during the pandemic. I can promise you I will never again submit to a lockdown for me, my family, my house of worship or my place of employment. The things we used to take for granted, like normalcy, are a fond memory. I know our current Governor as a former political colleague. Like you, I’ve observed him impose emergency orders so far reaching he took away our constitutionally guaranteed bill of rights without a care, all without blinking an eye. What are laws to this lawless Governor? What is wrong with us that we’ve put up with his brazen illegal actions? If we don’t end his mindless authoritarianism this November, there won’t be a second chance for Minnesota. That isn’t rhetoric, that is a statement of fact. Most of the time I’m disgusted by weak willed Republicans who never seem willing to fight to conserve or return to us our basic rights. These people disgust me because we’ve run out of time to get Minnesota back on a path to success. For over 20 years I’ve known and worked with Paul Gazelka. Paul showed up to help with some of the toughest political fights I was privileged to be part of. During the midst of advocacy and debate Paul was the consistent, strong player who did not waiver. He was highly unusual. While other colleagues were silent, Paul was vocal, he was tireless and I always knew he wouldn’t be the one to fold his tent and give up. He didn’t. He always chose to fight instead. How many people do that? How many people have a 20 year record of fighting in the Minnesota political arena? Imagine how many successes there would have been had others stood with Paul Gazelka? Many did, but not enough. A good Governor could rescue our state. Paul Gazelka can be trusted to guarantee our constitutional rights. He can be trusted to keep the doors of our Houses of worship open. He is trustworthy to protect all human lives no matter the color of one’s skin, from conception to natural death. Life isn’t political for Paul, it is a core conviction. Paul will protect our private property rights, and my right to protect myself with a firearm and my right to not be censored by a corrupt government. Most of all, Paul is intent to back our police departments, emts, fire fighters, first responders. Paul knows we can’t exist as a society without public safety. It is why he was endorsed by the MPPOA. I’m not interested in being political, I’m interested in living in a safe Minnesota again, where criminals get punished and where good people can be free and not punished for finding success in living a quiet, peaceable life. I’m convinced Paul Gazelka should be our next Governor in Minnesota and I endorse him in this endeavor. Sincerely, your friend, Michele Bachmann [**Donate for a Better Minnesota Today**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=1b606dfdd82f4bd39a588ba1b539136b&_e=6-8NnQa3jPRwDSGmm7FkZikuzjLppX6BvmPlzUT1vlHG1QMdxTRDIIM6MoifJ0MBjZOguOrXh41MkPqdkxnAoP_F3ajmMFNW6NX96Ar7yRQrHCZuVxEd7eVBnm7A09pl3gJRmwX10CBtwfodZ-ufG2n3SKVg2NGplknRwkJg_cEAhoN9Sbau-rFJxlL9cEVc0q4QOxv86mIWz4KGN5s8YU3PmmW51BPkOTHS6N2BjNVUiQNJ_y3dXYly6O0UahHjGuzwYYt3gJDcrjqYb9C7QEvXDeUD7Tz7WRNfilMbzpqFvD6tQzzYFk1PofZ74uLPaEAeFxwWAV3DEDWX14KNWpnLpbW-4d07M7sZz8bMsPM%3D) | | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=1b606dfdd82f4bd39a588ba1b539136b&_e=6-8NnQa3jPRwDSGmm7FkZh-5EkFs2pURdi5qGJC2GGEbklfltb87nK2fWh33F5P0Ngedi2Yx2Hz0gCJh6kHyrFpMv3jN91Io2_AHHB3wZRxSzKVhmJoK5grqJTS8K9lybEtk930r0galPH4doUaBFNU-LO433Vc0YNNv4TYQB8-UjSKFTglry734Lo5GWOapvBU4731wG4yQRRspB7o_f6JKgKnxnwHePjQRgoRA2gZLamdM2d_QY7CcOkCT17EQR2_3n0MSRa_pJTYDwvRWQw%3D%3D) | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=1b606dfdd82f4bd39a588ba1b539136b&_e=6-8NnQa3jPRwDSGmm7FkZg72VJsy0M_SXcDa9MUx6LQQTBb91K3dbMy_EgN34JhdScoTa7P94Ki8NF1rdw-Ftjfi5KalfNhM0AUigF9N83xmYlNiR7aEscx6ieN-x0jJoLLtOhYixuF_jfkQIDdFzkxzGfh8jiTq7uqyc7RDfZMYrF-hSlgKgHF7jGVtbo2-9fDY-S-L-FwLYBnd82ECsaJxGnf51H3v55_JGoMqmWfPcEO6OL6EuzG34hKZrxsopnJ_7XJi7M6_89p41LlvoQ%3D%3D) | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=1b606dfdd82f4bd39a588ba1b539136b&_e=6-8NnQa3jPRwDSGmm7FkZsd36PgMtkY2jeqXvtzamTo8wUZd3v6f4_v0tJ8_0HESHWxnH0NPJTdAryo885UnErgTvEhTcyZPMFfYND1NStzlHCsiKaffVjM2YfvpY1SBndU29agQMQxCpqoSkt3un8vloSe-Pzuf_vTLL4JZUt7nnuPfh0kGEbJ3fnk6uLWgZa-uSA546VD9nR3xIxM91nhLuwAPHsfaE17UbPG3Oecu4fawsCwh4qbkEZ3PkNjSars43fg3v2-M22vpULOUUA%3D%3D)

clean_body: My friend, I am honored to be endorsed by former US Congresswoman Michele Bachmann! Please see her endorsement below. Thank you, Senator Paul Gazelka Candidate for Governor Beloved fellow conservatives, and wonderful Minnesota friends, This is a momentous day with the potential to course correct the perilous path Minnesota politics has taken our once sane exemplary state. God help us to recognize how truly grave the times are that we live in. We’re beyond the twilight of a fading western civilization, we’re actually closer to days of lawlessness than to reason. Your pulse must inform you instinctively the urgency of this moment. If we don’t grasp the chance to take courageous, bold actions now, a formerly independent, innovative strong Minnesota will descend into near-irreversible poverty; our shopping/public venues will become too dangerous to allow for normal commerce, and our schools will delude our kids into hating their God given bodies, their parents, or our faith in God and our true heritage. You know these things are already happening in Minnesota where we’ve become a place we no longer recognize. Our highways and roadsides are now made filthy by litter and graffiti. It’s soul crushing to look at because Minnesota was never like this. We need to wake up now and recognize we pay unusually high taxes for lavish salaries going primarily to the political left, while regular Minnesotan’s can no longer find basic justice nor simple public safety. We can’t even trust many Minnesota medical experts or hospitals anymore. Their advice killed and hurt a lot of people during the pandemic. I can promise you I will never again submit to a lockdown for me, my family, my house of worship or my place of employment. The things we used to take for granted, like normalcy, are a fond memory. I know our current Governor as a former political colleague. Like you, I’ve observed him impose emergency orders so far reaching he took away our constitutionally guaranteed bill of rights without a care, all without blinking an eye. What are laws to this lawless Governor? What is wrong with us that we’ve put up with his brazen illegal actions? If we don’t end his mindless authoritarianism this November, there won’t be a second chance for Minnesota. That isn’t rhetoric, that is a statement of fact. Most of the time I’m disgusted by weak willed Republicans who never seem willing to fight to conserve or return to us our basic rights. These people disgust me because we’ve run out of time to get Minnesota back on a path to success. For over 20 years I’ve known and worked with Paul Gazelka. Paul showed up to help with some of the toughest political fights I was privileged to be part of. During the midst of advocacy and debate Paul was the consistent, strong player who did not waiver. He was highly unusual. While other colleagues were silent, Paul was vocal, he was tireless and I always knew he wouldn’t be the one to fold his tent and give up. He didn’t. He always chose to fight instead. How many people do that? How many people have a 20 year record of fighting in the Minnesota political arena? Imagine how many successes there would have been had others stood with Paul Gazelka? Many did, but not enough. A good Governor could rescue our state. Paul Gazelka can be trusted to guarantee our constitutional rights. He can be trusted to keep the doors of our Houses of worship open. He is trustworthy to protect all human lives no matter the color of one’s skin, from conception to natural death. Life isn’t political for Paul, it is a core conviction. Paul will protect our private property rights, and my right to protect myself with a firearm and my right to not be censored by a corrupt government. Most of all, Paul is intent to back our police departments, emts, fire fighters, first responders. Paul knows we can’t exist as a society without public safety. It is why he was endorsed by the MPPOA. I’m not interested in being political, I’m interested in living in a safe Minnesota again, where criminals get punished and where good people can be free and not punished for finding success in living a quiet, peaceable life. I’m convinced Paul Gazelka should be our next Governor in Minnesota and I endorse him in this endeavor. Sincerely, your friend, Michele Bachmann | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and Provided by Gazelka for Governor P.O. Box 175 Little Falls, MN 56345

| | | | | | | | Dear Friends,

As we rapidly approach the finish line of the May primary, we recognize how powerful your support has been and will continue to be. It's the grassroots efforts and resources you provide that are the driving force of our campaign. But we can't let up now and your donations are as critical as ever.

[Your invaluable donation will help continue and enhance our abilities to reach Oregonians throughout the state](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=67b52f698f&e=7e91be8cad). For only $10, $20, or even $50 you can put your stamp on our campaign and say you were a part of the better future for Oregon.

name: NRSC
subject: We’ve noticed you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Here’s the deal, Fellow American,

The Democrats are in control, and they are on a path of destruction.
❌ reckless spending
❌ skyrocketing inflation
❌ open borders
❌ failing America on the national stage
❌ pandemic restrictions

But we have a chance to take back the majority and end the reckless socialist agenda the Democrats are aggressively forcing on Americans.

But to succeed, we need committed conservatives, like you, on our team who we can rely on to be with us every step of the way.

When we were reviewing our records, your name stuck out as one of our top supporters. So, we wanted to send you our exclusive Take Back the Senate Majority questionnaire.

🔒This is your secure link🔒:[**Fellow American’s TAKE BACK THE SENATE MAJORITY QUESTIONNAIRE**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dc784b1a870543938f5c3992cfde7267&_e=omBfof9C9WGcrdLg0wZ2bzPmtQTmYBDWsbhfMRGocFAqcEZGf398qsUhGMwChYW6U8Smld_EHLkSnjCngD-rxx7rxII9f1txdLrxi9nXINtD706lMGs0b6PSNaVKI6iOWswwDtb3ed2lb821NeGZ54PHMPR9CDmcrlLNaxvXcY6vZukjK05K5veg4sMu_1AirFVR2sf_uRHlJkXn_EHIBuU63-h6AkfKtL6KeeSESi4bJfZdetE5XhXKsUnsXm3EJSUhZYANeecjVgghaqDa3YsoTG91XcAmgNQLNsxePluwzguxNyYswjrt7Hra8ysKoZsPgRtgwPJeJAh6bTxIrlVrP99_UWjw5YDKxlxEfG02H-BEcAfh6q_O69t-bQiAI0vwkD_2rA1f98z-5uGe3wOKRWAGA1Aq1x7uC5qts8FP8nUttuFR0SJ0UorX7FwFUEeLmsoBFUYKVN_P584qqo26HKYbgpeWtWZKBpbjjxY7wrCHy5jFZVKrL72GutRi)

Thank you,
NRSC

Friend,

Tom Cotton here.

Mariannette Miller-Meeks’s race was the closest in the country last year. She won by just six votes, and she needs all of us to step up and help her win again.

Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are doubling down. They know that if they defeat Mariannette, odds are they keep the U.S. House. **We have to fight back harder than ever before — can we count on you to step up right now?**
| [**STEP UP NOW**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=db8c6f82981d4a918c3a04cefbe3b7a8&_e=gYH2LKFmIdxANocft26LT2hO8YTE7c6HVoiN-kuY4m6x-DlSDPYZFpQqke8I3rsOZRXSJFniVASE8TfTEmoiO0zWG242cGRtA2sqeoqoTKbkUHM9ilRJgzXXhmUz6jIZ7y0fujWDYpraC8njsWN1bDl0YbVI2rkmithAUOdIUkLKyb8p7iuRPxFaVxKEk3CEjBC2bDbRllE90cP-EevT_CvsP3DfASZFU7VOh-X4G9YycRvB_si0j90ToZ4UG_BDsXgcLxBpjoHLvo5bQ-nbqfrFHw_NO2Vnz1ejqD9yGQbhhLX68Dum4aSDLkiekseUXC6SMjucS1ZF21S8Em6nHRGcsf95IdMYS03Os4fX1GdxCQsh8o6F0h5Q-Q_RXW2glQbxJVwd-L_ErURfvjmyu5Mk0PuRYvgWAHpJ9xBZcJXcT3TwNh6hlcGAl99-3I_sE7Qj1rMaydsxMAYcJrcLVPZJLmFC3NRJVg41XpXonL634UxV3klqlSINV7HWAEGtGtwTxwj0_-NAbCrtkbbQMLqW8pmwm8sZ4ch9nwnw0B4%3D)
---

Pelosi’s handpicked candidate, Christina Bohannan, is going to do whatever it takes to defeat Mariannette. We **_must not_** allow that to happen. With your help, we can fire Nancy Pelosi, win back the House, and keep this seat red.
[**STOP THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=db8c6f82981d4a918c3a04cefbe3b7a8&_e=gYH2LKFmIdxANocft26LT2hO8YTE7c6HVoiN-kuY4m6x-DlSDPYZFpQqke8I3rsOZRXSJFniVASE8TfTEmoiO0zWG242cGRtA2sqeoqoTKbkUHM9ilRJgzXXhmUz6jIZ7y0fujWDYpraC8njsWN1bDl0YbVI2rkmithAUOdIUkLKyb8p7iuRPxFaVxKEk3CEjBC2bDbRllE90cP-EevT_CvsP3DfASZFU7VOh-X4G9YycRvB_si0j90ToZ4UG_BDsXgcLxBpjoHLvo5bQ-nbqfrFHw_NO2Vnz1ejqD9yGQbhhLX68Dum4aSDLkiekseUFUDFtUFUwgAqZn6alsYYRa8IdAFpz3-nhpiawLIPgEgokek5vfxB3eqG8rM_Z_MxyUcoD40E8VTm2ORWYRsUz5UxIpRP4Mf8GtUk8Knv_CQwn6BYVBBSlOtJL2q8UJX0cm4CDzmkda9rm-YgYfUGk1zhbomJdiXTxTT8m358p3uzjvSEepSvQTHtl6Mm2KsLQ0lMvbFshiy22O7W0SdxawpvbD7KzxrRuZLrof297eM%3D)

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: I just wrapped up on MSNBC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
I just wrapped up an appearance on MSNBC's The Last Word With Lawrence O'Donnell where I discussed how, after national Republicans tried and failed twice to kick me off the ballot, I'm more resolved than ever to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) here in Iowa. This win is so crucial for expanding Democratic Senate control – but it's also about standing up for our democracy. You see, Republicans have taken to attacking our election process from multiple vantage points – which is an attack on the very foundation of our democracy. In Iowa, they tried to kick me off the ballot. Across the country, they've passed voter suppression into law. In the U.S. Senate, so-called leaders like Chuck Grassley defend the former president's attempts to use his DOJ to overturn the 2020 election results.
Hardworking families deserve a senator who’s going to fight to protect our democracy – not spread baseless conspiracy theories and double down on their defense of Trump, like Sen. Grassley. It's no surprise that _only 27%_ of Iowans want to reelect him for an eighth term in the U.S. Senate.
**Iowa is ready for and deserves new leadership – and I have every intention of defeating Sen. Grassley. But with Washington Republicans sitting on a war chest of more than $41 million, I simply cannot win without your grassroots support.[Can you pitch in $5 – whatever you can spare to flip Iowa blue – before midnight tonight to defend our Democratic Senate majority and protect our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44317212/341100154/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk956-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2Q3ZTE0YS01NmMwLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKXMLvI70b05gTk0QsWu0iVkDVgOcLcSPb7kEId_o1A=)**

clean_body: | | | I just wrapped up an appearance on MSNBC's The Last Word With Lawrence O'Donnell where I discussed how, after national Republicans tried and failed twice to kick me off the ballot, I'm more resolved than ever to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) here in Iowa. This win is so crucial for expanding Democratic Senate control – but it's also about standing up for our democracy. You see, Republicans have taken to attacking our election process from multiple vantage points – which is an attack on the very foundation of our democracy. In Iowa, they tried to kick me off the ballot. Across the country, they've passed voter suppression into law. In the U.S. Senate, so-called leaders like Chuck Grassley defend the former president's attempts to use his DOJ to overturn the 2020 election results. Hardworking families deserve a senator who’s going to fight to protect our democracy – not spread baseless conspiracy theories and double down on their defense of Trump, like Sen. Grassley. It's no surprise that only 27% of Iowans want to reelect him for an eighth term in the U.S. Senate. Iowa is ready for and deserves new leadership – and I have every intention of defeating Sen. Grassley. But with Washington Republicans sitting on a war chest of more than $41 million, I simply cannot win without your grassroots support.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With gratitude, Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States

name: South Bay CRA
subject: SBCRA April 25th
body:
South Bay Republican Assembly South Bay CRA News At the last South Bay CRA meeting, we had the official vote and I'm honored to announce that I'm no
| |
---
|
---
## South Bay Republican Assembly
---
|
---
# **South Bay CRA News**
At the last South Bay CRA meeting, we had the official vote and I'm honored to announce that I'm now officially the SBCRA President. I will do my very best to serve our community, State, and Nation with integrity and humility. I'm looking forward to growing our club in numbers so that we can have a much greater impact in the mission of saving our country.
The next SBCRA meeting is on April 25th and we have some exciting guest speakers attending.
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
**upcoming meeting on the 25th @ 6:15 Walter Buisness Men's Club. 24004 Neece Ave, Torrance, CA 90505**
## Monday Evening Meeting! Monday, March 25th 6:15 PM to 8:30 PM Walter Buisness Men's Club. 24004 Neece Ave, Torrance, CA 90505
---
---
|
---
# **Barbie George**
Barbie is the Westcoast director for Blexit. Blexit is a Nationwide movement encouraging and supporting the Black exit from the democrat party. Barbie has been at the frontline of our fight for the Nation.
|
---
# **Leo Zacky**
Leo is running for California Governor.
Leo's campaign is about fixing what has been destroyed by the liberal progressives. He is fed up with the destructive policies, corruption, and political agendas that have turned our California dreams into a nightmare! He loves California and is a patriot on a mission to take back our state!
|
---
# **Rudy Melendez**
California Congressional District-29
Rudy is an amazing candidate and a staple in the Conservative Freedom movement in California. Rudy is also known in the political community to be a major encouraging force to other candidates and those seeking to be involved.
|
---
# Derrick Gates
Derrick is running for congress in the new CA-36th (former 33rd) against Ted Lieu
Derrick has spent 20 years serving communities around the world as a minister. Derrick has been a corporate mediator for fortune 500 companies, a documentary filmmaker, an author, and even a bounty hunter for 2 years.

Fellow Conservative,
**_It is my great honor to announce to you that I have endorsed Ted Budd’s campaign to be the next Conservative Senator of North Carolina._** | [**JOIN ME IN SUPPORTING TED BUDD!**](http://links.buddfornc.com/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=69004cd40b564e89bc3513b3a6f872a0&_e=U1VrjP6J1mW6F5Y7gmxRrUXPrdB4KSp13Wn_SiJGvFTUZzaXG-LZnqaxta9AHfSUB7UJePenk6RQ6kLzdlk8tYI6CdU4k0H6zkhYndqAixSUKVwe0VNYEXtWQHP_LiBJWnHf1c601JUCjpi9GTxrw2BRZLcn9fcBTl9BGT7JL31JAMFr2Iywxw_dUCZ5qGIp3v0CWdS8EjoA5CoSFs92HEGfil6MzRA_S2fpY6zDTHX-cGRLXtKFzmbAloZymfMFwSQ-5vmn2r8U5QCdYloTyRsxF5lZUW_3tYUWGNMYf7-tH3yVDSjOBc5_o83LEHfE5Gg1P_g61z1dPuaPlv5rfrstIBGpSMLxI0ur55L4TTRp-THQAl45msygsNKK6qvZnXx8vnCZdBhcDdUaSuUixmpTMmN8MYve13hwZBFQo2ZZ-rl5tK9iiEeDmQ3S9Oa_NWWyAtam2qmMF1fCsyHS7nFDwP6oW4ZelmdAU0ZfVCg%3D)

He knows those same freedoms are under attack every waking moment that Democrats in D.C. are in charge. As he closes in on a tough primary, I knew that it was time for me to Conservatism is under attack in this day and age, and Ted is ready to bring true conservatism back to politics and back to N.C. Ted Supports Law Enforcement, Fights for the Right to Life, and knows we have to Secure our Southern Border. I could not imagine a better choice for the great state of North Carolina than Ted. name: Team Beto
subject: $0.00 (re: corporate PACs)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
This is really important to Beto.
#
We want to take a moment to tell you about something that is really important to Beto: **his pledge not to accept corporate PAC money — none, not a cent.**
It was true in 2018, and it's true today. For Beto, this was a common-sense decision. He's running for Governor to represent ALL Texans — not corporations or special interests.
_But that's not how Greg Abbott operates._ Instead, Abbott is relying on mega-donors and corporate energy executives to fund his race. Need proof? Look no further than the massive checks he took from the profiteers of the deadly power grid failure last year.
**By refusing corporate PAC donations, Beto is able to ensure that the only people he'll represent as Governor are Texans — NOT pharmaceutical, telecom, energy, or insurance corporations.** But that also means our campaign relies entirely on grassroots donations of $5, $15, and $25 to go up against Greg Abbott and his corporate mega-donors.
[We wouldn't ask if it weren't important. Abbott is going _all out_ to try and weaken our movement. Please, if you can, will you chip in $3 or more today to elect Beto?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55611?refcode=ema20220419-185789&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=185789%2E444211%2E-E4oiZ)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55611?refcode=ema20220419-185789&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=185789%2E444211%2E-E4oiZ)**
Abbott is preparing to spend over **_$100,000,000_** directly attacking Beto before Election Day. We need to be prepared for GOP Super PACs to flood the airwaves with lies and misinformation about Beto and our movement.
That's why we're getting our message out now through digital ads, at the doors, over the phone, and in person as we travel the state. **We're building the biggest organizing program Texas has ever seen to spread Beto's positive, unifying vision and to turn out a historic number of voters — but we can't do it all without your help.**
[If you want to support this grassroots work and defeat Abbott, please chip in $3 or more now to our people-powered movement.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55611?refcode=ema20220419-185789&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=185789%2E444211%2E-E4oiZ)
Together,
Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220419-185789-footer&t=22&refcode2=185789_444211_-E4oiZ&akid=185789%2E444211%2E-E4oiZ)**

name: Team Oakley
subject: We need a real champion for progressive values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

Ultimately, the race to represent NJ-10 isn’t about progressives and non-progressives. It’s about who we can trust to show up and fight for us.

For years, Rep. Donald Payne Jr. has barely shown up for his job, taken a tepid stance (at best) on progressive priorities, and padded his pockets with plenty of corporate money.

Meanwhile, Imani has put in the work. She’s been out in our communities, uplifting marginalized voices, organizing for real progressive change, and serving as our advocate on issues from housing justice to climate change while Rep. Payne Jr. stayed silent.

Seems like an obvious choice, doesn’t it?

Imani has proven time and again that she’ll ALWAYS show up and fight for us. Will you chip in $5 to help her continue her record of steadfast advocacy and bold leadership as our next Congresswoman? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?refcode=419rollcall]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=419rollcall]

Sure — Payne Jr. may have the power of New Jersey’s political machine behind him. He may have support from the corporate establishment. But he doesn’t have a shred of proof that he’s used his position to uplift our communities or deliver change for those who need it.

He didn’t even pretend to care about his constituents until Imani out-raised him in our first quarter of fundraising with ZERO corporate backing.

We deserve better than a do-nothing Congressman who pads his pockets with corporate money and relies on establishment backers to pave his path to victory.

If you agree, click here to chip in $5, fight back against Rep. Payne Jr. and his establishment support, and help elect a representative who will ALWAYS show up for us. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?refcode=419rollcall]

Thank you for your support.

— Team Oakley

name: Trump Alert
subject: re: Trump's TINY crowds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **BREAKING: "GOP strategist spots ominous warning sign for Trump"**

_Trump's rally crowds are SHRINKING FAST! But while Trump plans another White House run, we need to know where this grassroots team stands:_**

Do you approve of Donald Trump?**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7306?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220419-TrumpAlert-TrumpWarningSign-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220419-TrumpAlert-TrumpWarningSign-Pros-sl1&akid=3859%2E9716520%2EOF8FIF)
Team -- Could this be the end of Donald Trump’s comeback dreams?

While Trump flies around the country rallying his MAGA base, **the number of supporters turning out is _plummeting._** In a recent visit to battleground North Carolina, crowds were down as much as 85% from their highs!

If Trump's support is really falling as fast as it seems, **it spells DISASTER for Republicans,** which is why we NEED to update our data on Trump's standing.

**Our records indicate we’re missing your response, so please, let us know before 11:59 PM:**

**Do you approve of Donald Trump?**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7306?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220419-TrumpAlert-TrumpWarningSign-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220419-TrumpAlert-TrumpWarningSign-Pros-sl1&akid=3859%2E9716520%2EOF8FIF)
Thanks,

Team DSCC

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Add your name: end racist gerrymandering
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Earlier this year, Tennessee Republicans redrew congressional maps to
break up the progressive stronghold of Nashville — where Justice Democrat
Odessa Kelly was running in TN’s 5th Congressional District. The GOP did
this to essentially remove a blue seat in Nashville and form house
districts that favor Republicans.

This is racist, anti-democratic gerrymandering. The GOP is doing
everything it can to block Black, brown, and low-income voters from
getting the representation they need in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103361?t=1002&akid=22947%2E1203867%2E2x9AOQ ]Will you stand with Odessa and Justice Democrats today and add your
name to call on Congress to immediately ban racist, anti-democratic
gerrymandering?

Add your name

Odessa re-launched her campaign after redistricting and is running in TN’s
7th District — it will be an uphill fight, taking on a Republican
incumbent in a tough district.

Our fight for a more just and equitable society will continue, and so will
our fight to fairly represent the interests of historically
disenfranchised voters. The GOP knows the majority of the country does not
support its policies, so it will continue to gerrymander, break rules, and
game the system in order to keep control. We can’t let it
continue, Peter.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/103361?t=1003&akid=22947%2E1203867%2E2x9AOQ ]Please, sign on to our call to end racist gerrymandering right now »

Add your name

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=22947%2E1203867%2E2x9AOQ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=22947%2E1203867%2E2x9AOQ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220419-22947-footer&t=1006&refcode2=22947_1203867_2x9AOQ&akid=22947%2E1203867%2E2x9AOQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=22947%2E1203867%2E2x9AOQ

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

We have been working overtime to win this race so we can stop radical Leftist Josh Shapiro from getting anywhere near the Governor’s mansion. But we need your help, Peter Willis. Watch our new TV ad and help spread our message! It is so important right now, to FLOOD the TV airwaves with this ad. We are calling on Lou’s #1 supporters to help us raise $34,000 in the next 12 hours to keep this ad on the air! We are less than one month from Election Day. We need your help to keep this ad on the air to remind the people of PA of Lou’s record of fighting the important fights for PA conservatives! Whether it be fighting illegal immigration, fighting the liberals’ radical anti-energy agenda, or being one of the first in the country to endorse Donald Trump, Lou has always been there for us. Now it’s our turn to be there for him! Do not let this ad go off the air, Peter Willis. The people of Pennsylvania deserve to see what Lou has done for Pennsylvania. You have always stood by us during necessary times and I know we can count on you once more. Lou needs to raise at least $34,000 in the next 12 hours or else we risk falling behind. Can he count on your support? Thank you, Team Barletta | | | | To contribute by mail, please make payable to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201 =

subject: Hollywoke Punches Florida
body:
[****](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eafa7f86755147cea2ee939df41598be&_e=VVtilRxAaIkOBiuUFLnftuvUfTZYHH1a8vbqIUHuECLZ9FeSvEBOX8X1uDiTCQbSCGM5hN3P6VTBzpzo9j7BswE522_3j_OoR9zSYecyyQP14QVJsrcXPMBDiM2A2QX82kewzMi2EOgYDhgLeNDpYgXZTqYaIGD-BCmTFnGAvLV_j4Bhyg_2E3Y81hmviuaKwFgX--ZYDylsqk9l5cTBg5x_HzICAbonyJuIONAIFGBDCVlkquwyAav3lixYgM3TjfN0aatueZwzXhCfI0qNJrggb88ll8lllwY6ncpTBZx3frLsuGwa5Fg8-Ciqt9RglttVhFTmrLlSwjUJPrRHUbsnAP8h9FsCvh41YBaEIO6EUMgzVsnxMXXRvtckxw5MhRp9fKRV7XHtYH_aIz19kQ%3D%3D)

Peter,
Florida was again the Left's favorite punching bag as out-of-touch Hollywood elites continued their smears against me.
But I can tell you this, if Hollywood is attacking you, you must be doing something right.
I wish I could say I was surprised to see spoiled Hollywood hypocrites lecture parents about what is best for their children, but sadly their willingness to lie, distort and distract is par for the course. _**Their dishonesty knows no bounds. **_
_**If the same Hollywood elites who upheld degenerates like Harvey Weinstein now oppose our efforts to protect parental rights, I wear that like a badge of honor. **_
Rest assured - I'm not worried about what out-of-touch "entertainers" have to say, and I'm certainly not going to be intimidated by people who don't live in reality. **And the chances of me backing down to Disney-owned ABC or the low-rated Oscars is precisely zero. No amount of sloganeering from the liberal machine will change that.**
Despite these baseless charges from Hollywoke and the legacy media, I was proud to sign the Parental Rights in Education Bill to ensure that children K - 3 are not taught R-rated content in their G-rated years.
Peter, I will always stand up for parents and families and for what's right. **I 'm not backing down.**
**[Can you help me to punch back and continue to fight against the radical Left and the dishonest corporate media? Rush in $50, $25, or $15 now>>>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eafa7f86755147cea2ee939df41598be&_e=VVtilRxAaIkOBiuUFLnftuvUfTZYHH1a8vbqIUHuECLZ9FeSvEBOX8X1uDiTCQbSCGM5hN3P6VTBzpzo9j7BswE522_3j_OoR9zSYecyyQP14QVJsrcXPMBDiM2A2QX82kewzMi2EOgYDhgLeNDpYgXZTqYaIGD-BCmTFnGAvLV_j4Bhyg_2E3Y81hmviuaKHITKAQqCgPTUX005_AkzNmoUEy8kRNdjjBjoDC3QUV77i8quc7JnhRi273HAfpU8JWOoqWfrOwaGOsmVjRMErMcLWLSUEd-ZLX90K3WBcgMzIpEkJq3xs8i0lv6ZiUOEw3Fr4xS0FdxutbBQDg9rs92yy4i-Y-pWg1nscn5GPiYupQcH3d1UnNYdWxfGL0DxGfGRo5Xa1PvZtVWpK8IRyw%3D%3D "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/hollywoke-punches-florida-hf")**
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

But I can tell you this, if Hollywood is attacking you, you must be doing something right. I wish I could say I was surprised to see spoiled Hollywood hypocrites lecture parents about what is best for their children, but sadly their willingness to lie, distort and distract is par for the course. Their dishonesty knows no bounds. If the same Hollywood elites who upheld degenerates like Harvey Weinstein now oppose our efforts to protect parental rights, I wear that like a badge of honor. Rest assured - I'm not worried about what out-of-touch "entertainers" have to say, and I'm certainly not going to be intimidated by people who don't live in reality. And the chances of me backing down to Disney-owned ABC or the low-rated Oscars is precisely zero. No amount of sloganeering from the liberal machine will change that. Despite these baseless charges from Hollywoke and the legacy media, I was proud to sign the Parental Rights in Education Bill to ensure that children K - 3 are not taught R-rated content in their G-rated years. Peter, I will always stand up for parents and families and for what's right. I 'm not backing down. "" Sincerely, Ron DeSantis "DONATE NOW" Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: $27 MILLION
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Politico just reported that McConnell’s super PAC has upped their total initial ad buy in North Carolina
#

We have breaking news
Politico just reported that McConnell’s super PAC Senate Leadership Fund has upped their total _initial_ ad buy in North Carolina to $27 MILLION.
It’s the second-highest amount of ad spending anywhere in the country. It’s a clear indication of just how competitive and important McConnell and his allies see our race.
[**Please donate right now to help us prepare for the dark money that’s about to flood North Carolina. Defending and expanding our Senate majority could easily come down to North Carolina, but Cheri cannot take on McConnell and his super PACs alone.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220419-1-t2&refcode2=740.357359.9QSfnx&t=1&akid=740%2E357359%2E9QSfnx)

****
$27 million — yes, $27,000,000 — is an unprecedented investment in North Carolina from McConnell’s super PAC at this point in the cycle.
It’s even more than the Senate Leadership Fund initially booked in North Carolina in 2020. By Election Day 2020, that race became the most expensive Senate race in American history.
This is why it’s so urgent that we raise the resources right now to fight back. Every piece of data — polling, nonpartisan analysts’ rankings and now Republicans’ spending — indicates that this is going to be among the most competitive and closest races in the country.
[**Can you please make a donation today to help us fight back and flip this seat? We can win this race and send Cheri Beasley to the U.S. Senate — but only if we do this together.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220419-1-t2&refcode2=740.357359.9QSfnx&t=26&akid=740%2E357359%2E9QSfnx)
This race could be decided by a handful of votes in November. So the resources we raise right now could make the difference between winning and losing on Election Day.
Thank you,
Team Beasley

name: Biden Accountability Committee
subject: What grade should we give Joe Biden?
body:
Peter,
The Biden Administration has been one disaster after another.

Between soaring inflation, out of control gas prices, and weak leadership, someone needs to hold him accountable for his failures, and we know his own party will never call him out.

**We’re reaching out to dependable patriots across America to grade Biden on his performance in the White House, and your request is critical to our mission to hold Joe Biden accountable.**

| | | **_Learn More About Chuck_**

---
---
| | | Family, hard work and community. These are the things that have defined me as a person more than anything else and are the things that make New Hampshire a special place. Several local Salem community leaders became role models and mentors and got me involved with helping our community. With their encouragement, I ran for Salem Selectman and won. I ran for Town Moderator and won. Then I ran for State Representative and served for two terms from 1998-2002. I was elected to the State Senate in 2002 and was appointed to the Finance Committee. My experience running a business, meeting a payroll, and keeping a conservative budget helped prepare me for the challenges of crafting a balanced state budget. I quickly became known as one of the state’s leaders in budgeting and tax policy. I took a step back from politics in 2006. My daughter was starting her junior year in high school and Susan and I spent most of the next few years traveling to her field hockey and basketball games. We were her biggest fans. In 2010, I was reelected to the Senate. When I returned to the Finance Committee, I found the financial mess that the Democrats had put our state in. The state had an $800 million deficit. We quickly turned that around and put the state’s finances back on a sustainable path. For my work, colleagues gave me the greatest honor of my life — electing me the Senate President in 2013. In 2020, I led Republican efforts to retake the majority in the State Senate. New Hampshire was the only state in the country that was able to flip a blue state legislature to red and it was largely due to our strong fight against the Democrats’ proposed state income tax. Last year, we passed one of the most conservative and fiscally responsible budgets that New Hampshire has ever seen. It is balanced, cuts taxes for small businesses, provides more than $300 million in property tax relief, bans late-term abortions, and prohibits the use of discriminatory teaching in our schools. It puts New Hampshire on a path to long-term prosperity. The work ethic, commitment to family and sense of community that I learned at a young age have stuck with me as an adult and drive everything I do. I still wake up at 4am every morning to work at our business before going to Concord to do the people’s business. More often than not, I still take my first phone calls of the day while driving a tractor. Washington, D.C. has enough silver-spoon, Ivy League lawyers. I believe that I am a product of all the best parts of New Hampshire — the spirit of freedom, sense of volunteerism and responsibility of giving back to the community that has helped shape me into the person I am today. I want to bring New Hampshire to Washington and makes sure our voices are heard. I want to bring New Hampshire values to a place that needs them now more than ever. I want to work for you and I hope you will consider electing me to represent you in the U.S. Senate.
